These products are slow, unstable, and don't lead to material improvements in efficiency. When using these systems, the average human cost to originate a loan is still over $11,000.

Loancrate builds AI-native tooling to automate mortgage workflows

title: Dynamic Customer Service Specialist in Logistics
description:
Company Overview:

Recur is a logistics company based in New Zealand. We are committed to providing top-quality service to our customers by focusing on operational excellence and maintaining a positive work environment for our employees. We are currently hiring for a Customer Service to join our team.



Company Culture and Values:

We offer a competitive salary package, but what sets us apart is our commitment to job security. Our company has a long-standing reputation for stability and we prioritize providing our employees with a secure and stable working environment.



In addition to job security, we also value career growth and advancement. We provide our employees with opportunities to develop their skills and expertise through ongoing training and development programs. We believe in promoting from within and providing our tea
mbers with a clear path for career advancement and promotions.



We understand the importance of a safe and healthy working environment. Our company prioritizes the health and wellbeing of our employees and we go to great lengths to ensure this.



Job Description:

As a Customer Service Specialist, you will be responsible for managing and coordinating our fleet of trucks and drivers to ensure timely deliveries and pickups while maintaining accurate records. You will be responsible for dispatching and planning trucks and drivers, monitoring drivers' progress, and communicating with customers regarding any delays or issues. In addition, you will be responsible for providing excellent customer service to clients and vendors.



Responsibilities:



- Dispatching and Planning trucks and drivers to ensure timely and efficient delivery of goods

- Monitoring drivers' progress and communicating with customers regarding any delays or issues

- Communicating with drivers regarding any route changes or issues that may arise during their trips

- Providing excellent customer service to clients and vendors

- Other duties as assigned



Qualifications:



- Exceptional analytical skills with a passion for problem-solving

- Strong analytical and critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently, think creatively, and develop innovative solutions to complex problems



Career Growth and Development:

At Recur, we believe in supporting and encouraging our employees to take on new challenges and grow within their role. We provide our employees with a supportive environment that encourages them to push their limits, expand their skills, and take on leadership roles within the company. As a long-term goal, we want our applicants to take on a leadership role, train others, and manage a team.



Compensation & Hours:

The working hours will be from 2am-1pm PHT (11 hours), Monday - Friday, which should be a good fit for you. Paid overtime weekends are also available. We provide a highly competitive compensation package that includes a salary commensurate with your level of experience. Additionally, we offer a performance-based Christmas Bonus to recognize and reward outstanding contributions to our team's success.



To apply, please click the link below.


/hgTOkO4q4kwB5UKHl8xp



We look forward to welcoming a driven and motivated individual to our team who shares our values and vision.

Job Summary:



We are seeking a motivated and highly organized Customer Service and Operations Specialist to be the primary point of contact for our clients. This role is central to our operations, involving handling inbound leads, driving sales, managing customer billing and payments, scheduling logistics, and coordinating with our drivers and partners. The ideal candidate excels in communication, has a great attitude, is receptive to feedback, is sales-oriented yet customer-focused, learns quickly, and thrives in a remote, fast-paced environment, reporting directly to the company owners.



Working Hours & Expectations:



This is a full-time remote position requiring approximately 35-40 hours per week.

The schedule includes partial weekdays (aligning with Los Angeles/Pacific Time afternoon/evening hours) and partial days on Saturday and Sunday (aligning with business hours).

High responsiveness during working hours is critical.

Must maintain a professional remote work environment with a reliable high-speed internet connection suitable for VoIP calls.

Compensation:

Manage incoming customer calls and inquiries via VoIP, providing exceptional customer service.

Effectively communicate service offerings, provide quotes, and convert leads into sales.

Process customer payments accurately for dumpster rentals.

Schedule dumpster deliveries and pickups efficiently.

Coordinate closely and maintain clear communication with the company driver regarding schedules and job details.

Professionally broker leads for out-of-service-area requests to partner companies.

Prepare and send invoices to partner companies who broker orders to our service.

Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, sales, payments, and scheduling using Google Suite and other designated tools.

Collaborate effectively and professionally with owners, the driver, and partner company contacts.



Job Requirements

Language: Exceptional (Native or C1/C2 level) verbal and written English fluency is mandatory.



Experience: 1-3 years preferred in Customer Service, Sales, Dispatch, Operations Support, or similar roles. Proven success in CS and/or Sales is a significant advantage. Dumpster rental experience preferred.



Skills:



Strong sales and negotiation skills with a charming, customer-centric approach.

Excellent communication, interpersonal, and rapport-building skills.

Strong organizational and scheduling/coordination skills.

Proficiency in Google Suite (Gmail, Calendar, Sheets).

Experience and comfort using VoIP phone systems.

Ability to learn new processes and information quickly.



Personal Attributes:



Highly responsive and reliable.

Positive, professional attitude with minimal ego.

Collaborative team player, able to work effectively with the driver and owners.

Open and receptive to feedback.



Technical: Stable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, professional home office environment suitable for VoIP calls.

Scalable, profitable ad campaigns

We are a HubSpot consulting practice looking for a hands-on HubSpot Specialist to support backend CRM execution across multiple client accounts.



This role is execution-focused, not strategy. You will be responsible for building, configuring, and maintaining HubSpot systems based on defined requirements.



You will work directly with the founder and a project manager to deliver clean, scalable HubSpot implementations.



---



What You’ll Be Doing



HubSpot Configuration & Builds

Build and maintain workflows (automation, assignment, lifecycle updates)



Create and manage lists, forms, and basic
 automations

Data Management

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
# Executive Virtual Assistant



**Company:** A hospitality and technology holding company

**Location:** Remote (Philippines preferred)

**Type:** Full-time

**Compensation:** $800 to $1,000/month USD



---



## About Us



We are a bootstrapped holding company with businesses across India, Thailand, and the UAE. The portfolio covers specialty coffee, boutique hospitality, and AI-powered SaaS products. We are founder-led, we move fast, and we are in the middle of a serious growth phase.



---



## About the Role



We need someone who can be the founder's operational right hand. Not a traditional VA who sits around waiting for tasks. The person in this role keeps the entire operation moving. You track tasks across multiple teams, you follow up relentlessly, you consolidate reports from our physical locations, you support our fundraising process, and you manage calendar and travel across three countries.



If something is overdue, you catch it before anyone has to ask. If someone has not delivered, you are already chasing them. If there is a blocker, you bring it up with enough context that a decision can be made in minutes.



---



## What You Will Do



### Task Tracking and Follow-Ups (This is the main job)

- Own the daily and weekly follow-up cycle across all teams and contractors

- Maintain a central task tracker with clear statuses. On track, blocked, overdue, completed.

- Chase people for updates. Proactively, not when asked.

- Send a daily end-of-day summary to the founder. What moved, what is stuck, what needs attention tomorrow.

- Deliver a weekly rollup covering progress, open items, and deadlines across all businesses.



### Operations Reporting

- Collect daily and weekly reports from multiple store locations across three countries

- Consolidate everything into one central dashboard. Revenue, footfall, inventory flags, staffing issues, anything notable.

- Flag anomalies and trends before they become problems

- Chase store managers for reports when they are late



### Fundraising and Investor Support

- Maintain and update an investor CRM with outreach status, follow-up dates, and notes

- Draft outreach
s and messages using templates the founder provides

- Schedule investor calls across multiple time zones

- Follow up after meetings with thank you notes, document sharing, and next steps

- Research investors and prepare briefing materials before calls



### Calendar, Travel, and Coordination

- Manage the founder's calendar across India, Thailand, and UAE

- Book flights, hotels, and transport for frequent international travel

- Coordinate with vendors, landlords, and contractors. Confir
etings, chase invoices, follow up on deliverables.

- Handle visa and documentation logistics



### Research and Admin

- Pull together market data, competitor info, and benchmarks when needed

- Research tools, platforms, and service providers

- Manage inbox triage. Flag what matters, archive the noise, draft responses where you can.

- Keep shared drives and folders organized



---



## What This Role Is Not



You will not be making strategic decisions. You make sure decisions actually get executed. You will not be managing people. You track whether people are delivering. You will not be creating marketing content or analyzing marketing data. Those are separate roles on the team.



---



## Tools



Google Workspace (Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Gmail), Notion or Asana, WhatsApp, Slack, lightweight CRM tools, travel booking platforms. Using AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude for drafting and research is encouraged.



---



## What We Are Looking For



**Must have:**

- At least 2 years as a VA or executive assistant, ideally working with a startup founder or small business owner

- Exceptional written and spoken English

- Comfortable working across multiple time zones (India, Southeast Asia, Middle East)

- Highly organized with a natural bias for action. You chase, you do not wait.

- Strong with spreadsheets. You can build and maintain trackers and dashboards without hand-holding.

- Experience with Google Workspace and project management tools



**Good to have:**

- Background in F&B, hospitality, or SaaS

- Experience supporting fundraising or investor relations

- Experience working with distributed teams across multiple countries



---



## How We Measure Success



- Daily EOD summaries sent every working day without fail

- Every task tracked and followed up within 24 hours

- Store reports consolidated daily by a set deadline

- Zero double-bookings on the founder's calendar

- Only real blockers get escalated. No noise.

- Weekly rollup delivered every Friday or Saturday



---



## First 30 Days



**Week 1:** Onboarding. Understand all the businesses, meet key tea
mbers and store managers, get access to everything, shadow the founder's workflow.



**Week 2:** Take over calendar, inbox triage. Start building the task tracker and store reporting template.



**Week 3:** Own the daily follow-up cycle. Consolidate first full week of store reports. Begin investor outreach support.



**Week 4:** Full ownership. Daily summaries, store dashboard, investor CRM, first weekly rollup delivered.

title: Content Editor and Operator
description:
# Content Editor and Operator



**Company:** A hospitality and technology holding company

**Location:** Remote

**Type:** Full-time

**Compensation:** $900 to $1,100/month USD



---



## About Us



We are a bootstrapped holding company with businesses across India, Thailand, and the UAE. The portfolio covers specialty coffee, boutique hospitality, and AI-powered SaaS products. Six brands, each with its own audience, voice, and platform strategy. We are scaling our content output significantly and need someone who can keep up.



---



## About the Role



We need a content operator who can do two things really well.



First, atomization. The founder regularly writes long-form content. Articles, threads, essays, video scripts. Your job is to take that material and break it into dozens of platform-native social media posts. Each one tailored to the right brand, the right platform, the right audience.



Second, original creation. You will get content ideas in proper formats. No one-line concept. No voice note. Sometimes a rough brief or a reference post but mostly a proper brief. You take that and turn it into a fully finished creative. Copy, visual direction, hashtags, CTA. Ready to schedule.



This is not a proofreading job. You need to understand that what works on LinkedIn does not work on Instagram. You need to match six different brand voices without mixing them up. And you need to turn one good idea into ten pieces of content without losing what made it good in the first place.



---



## What You Will Do



### Content Atomization (50% of your time)

- Take the founder's long-form content (articles, Substack posts, video transcripts, thread drafts, podcast notes) and break it into platform-native posts

- Adapt tone, length, and format per platform. LinkedIn posts, Instagram captions, X threads,
 posts, carousel outlines, reel scripts.

- Pull out quotable lines, stats, hot takes, and standalone insights

- Add each piece to the content calendar with a suggested publish date

- Make sure no two platforms get the same post. Everything should feel native to where it lives.



Typical output from one long-form piece:

- 2 to 3 LinkedIn posts (short-form and carousel outlines)

- 2 to 3 Instagram posts (caption plus visual direction)

- 1 to 2 X threads or standalone tweets

- 1
 post where relevant

- 1 Substack teaser or cross-promo if applicable



### Original Content Creation (40% of your time)

- Get a content idea from the founder and build the full creative. Headline, hook, body copy, CTA, hashtags, visual direction.

- Match the right brand voice for each piece

- Suggest the best platform and format

- For visual posts, write a clear creative brief or image prompt

- For carousels, write all slides with a clear hierarchy

- For reels and short video, write scripts with hook, body, CTA, and visual treatment notes



### Content Pipeline (10% of your time)

- Maintain the content calendar across all six brands

- Keep the posting cadence consistent. Target is 50+ posts per week across all brands combined.

- Flag gaps in the calendar proactively and suggest filler or repurposing ideas

- Quality check everything before it goes out. No typos, correct handles and hashtags, links work, voice is right.



---



## The Brands



You will write for six brands spanning specialty coffee, boutique hotels and bars, AI SaaS, hospitality technology, a founder's personal brand, and a consumer app. Each one has a different voice:



- **Specialty Coffee (India, UAE):** Warm, craft-forward, premium but approachable

- **Boutique Hospitality (Thailand):** Adventurous, laid-back, experiential

- **AI SaaS:** Sharp, technical but accessible, thought-leadership

- **Hospitality SaaS:** Professional, solution-oriented

- **Founder Brand:** Bold, entrepreneurial, builder energy

- **Consumer App:** Emotional, relatable, playful, Gen-Z and millennial



Full brand guidelines and past content will be shared during onboarding.



---



## Content Standards



These apply to everything you write:



- No em dashes. Use commas, periods, or restructure the sentence.

- No AI-sounding language. If you catch yourself writing "delve", "landscape", "leverage", "utilize", or "harness", delete it and try again.

- Clean, punchy prose. Short sentences. Strong verbs.

- Write like a human, not a brand playbook.

- All drafts delivered in markdown format.



---



## What This Role Is Not



You are not managing ad spend or paid campaigns. You are not doing graphic design, though you will direct visuals. You are not writing investor decks. You are not analyzing platfor
trics or building dashboards. A separate Growth Analyst handles that. You are not managing comments or DMs.



---



## Tools



Google Sheets or Notion (content calendar), Google Docs or Obsidian (writing), Buffer or Later or SocialBee (scheduling, TBD), Canva (basic creatives), Midjourney or similar (image prompts), WhatsApp, Slack,
. Using AI tools for drafting and ideation is fine and encouraged, but every output must be human-edited and voice-matched before you hand it over.



---



## What We Are Looking For



**Must have:**

- At least 2 years creating social media content, ideally for multiple brands at once

- Strong English copywriting. You write punchy, scroll-stopping social copy.

- You understand platform-native content. What works on LinkedIn, Instagram, X,
, and TikTok are all different and you know why.

- Experience breaking long-form content into social posts (atomization or repurposing workflows)

- Comfortable working from rough briefs, voice notes, and half-formed ideas

- Basic visual sense. You can put together a clean Canva graphic or write a solid image prompt.



**Good to have:**

- Experience in F&B, hospitality, or tech/SaaS content

- Familiarity with Obsidian, markdown workflows, or AI-assisted content pipelines

- Experience writing carousel scripts and short-form video scripts



---



## How We Measure Success



- 30+ posts delivered per week across all brands

- Atomized content turned around within 48 hours of receiving the long-form input

- Original posts delivered within 24 hours of receiving a brief

- Voice accuracy is high enough that the founder only needs light edits, not rewrites

- No brand goes more than 2 days without a scheduled post



---



## First 30 Days



**Week 1:** Onboarding. Study all six brands. Read the last 3 months of content. Understand the founder's voice. Review brand guidelines.



**Week 2:** Shadow the current process. Atomize 2 to 3 existing long-form pieces as a test. Get feedback on voice and platform fit.



**Week 3:** Take over daily atomization. Start creating original posts from briefs. Set up or take ownership of the content calendar.



**Week 4:** Full ownership. The founder gives you ideas and long-form. You handle everything from there.

title: Growth Analyst and Marketing Ops
description:
# Growth Analyst and Marketing Ops



**Company:** A hospitality and technology holding company

**Location:** Remote

**Type:** Full-time

**Compensation:** $900 to $1,200/month USD



---



## About Us



We are a bootstrapped holding company with businesses across India, Thailand, and the UAE. The portfolio covers specialty coffee, boutique hospitality, and AI-powered SaaS products. Six brands, physical locations in multiple countries, and growing digital presences across all of them. We are in an active growth phase and need someone who can own the marketing data layer end to end.



---



## About the Role



We need someone who can look at our marketing data across six brands and tell us what is working, what is not, and what to do about it. Not just dashboards. Not just numbers in a spreadsheet. Actual insight. "Here is what happened, here is what it means, here is what we should change."



You will also own influencer outreach across all brands and markets. Finding the right people, reaching out, managing the relationship, and tracking whether the collaboration actually moved the needle.



If you are the kind of person who sees a metric and immediately thinks "okay but why, and what do we do now?", this is your role.



---



## What You Will Do



### Marketing Analytics and Reporting (40% of your time)



**Weekly Dashboard (every Monday)**



A consolidated view across all six brands covering:



**Social Media (Instagram, LinkedIn, X,
, TikTok)**

Follower growth, engagement rates, top performing posts, reach and impressions trends, which content formats are winning.



**Google Business and Maps**

Profile views, search appearances, direction requests, review count and ratings across all physical locations.



**Website Analytics (GA4 and Google Search Console)**

Sessions, users, bounce rate, top landing pages, traffic sources, keyword rankings, conversion events.



**Ad Platforms (Meta Ads, Google Ads)**

Spend, impressions, clicks, CTR, CPC, conversions, ROAS per campaign. Clear recommendations on what to pause, scale, or adjust.



**Monthly Deep Dive (by the 5th of each month)**



Month-over-month trends. What worked and why. What underperformed and your best guess at why. 3 to 5 specific recommendations for the next month. Competitive benchmarks where you can find them.



The founder does not want a data dump. He wants a briefing he can read in 5 minutes that makes it obvious what to do next.



### Influencer Outreach and Partnerships (30% of your time) - A Marketing strategists leads this, you are in a support role.



**Finding the right people**

- Build and maintain an influencer database by brand and market (India, Thailand, UAE)

- Focus on micro (5K to 50K) and mid-tier (50K to 200K) influencers

- Evaluate based on audience overlap, engagement rate, content quality, and brand alignment. Not just follower count.

- Prioritize by relevance. Food and coffee creators for the cafe brands. Travel and hospitality for the hotel brand. Tech and AI for the SaaS products. Couples and relationship content for the consumer app.



**Running the outreach**

- Send initial outreach via DM and
 using approved templates

- Negotiate terms. Barter (complimentary stays, products, access) or paid, depending on the situation.

- Manage the full workflow from outreach to agreement to content coordination to posting to follow-up

- Keep a central tracker with every detail



**Tracking results**

- Track ROI on every collaboration. Reach, engagement, follower lift, website traffic, promo code usage.

- Score influencers and flag who is worth repeating and who is not



### Paid Ads Support (20% of your time) - Founder leads this, you are in a support role.



- Run day-to-day Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns across the brands

- Set up campaigns, ad sets, and creatives based on the founder's direction

- Monitor daily and make tactical calls. Budget shifts, audience tweaks, creative rotation.

- A/B test creatives and copy, coordinating with the Content Editor for assets

- Give clear spend recommendations with data behind them

- This part of the role will grow over time as budgets increase



### Strategic Insights (10% of your time)



- Surface growth opportunities proactively. Come with data, not just opinions.

- Spot content trends across markets and platforms

- Recommend experiments. Should we try a new platform? Double down on a format? Test a new audience?

- Feed insights to the Content Editor so content decisions are backed by numbers, not just gut.



---



## How This Role Fits the Team



You work alongside two other people:



**Content Editor** creates all content. You tell them what is working and what to make more of. You give them briefs for influencer collab content. You share performance data so they can adjust the content mix.



**Executive VA** handles logistics. If an influencer needs a complimentary hotel stay, the VA books it. If a store needs to prep for a visit, the VA chases the store manager.



**Founder** sets the strategy. You bring the data and recommendations that help him make better decisions.



---



## What This Role Is Not



You are not creating content. The Content Editor does that. You are not managing operations or chasing internal tasks. The VA does that. You are not making final budget or strategy calls. You recommend, the founder d
. You are not a full-time performance marketer yet. Ads are part of the role, not the whole role.



---



## Tools



Meta Business Suite, LinkedIn Analytics, X Analytics, TikTok Analytics, Google Analytics 4, Google Search Console, Google Business Profile Manager, Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, Google Sheets (primary reporting), Looker Studio (nice to have), WhatsApp, Slack,
. Using AI tools for research and analysis is encouraged.



---



## What We Are Looking For



**Must have:**

- At least 2 years in digital marketing analytics, growth marketing, or social media management

- Comfortable working in GA4, Meta Business Suite, Google Ads, and Search Console

- Can build clean dashboards in Google Sheets or Looker Studio that people actually want to look at

- Experience with influencer marketing. Finding them, reaching out, negotiating, and tracking results.

- You translate numbers into "so what?" and "now what?", not just "here is the data"

- Basic to intermediate experience running Meta Ads and/or Google Ads

- Strong written English



**Good to have:**

- Background in F&B, hospitality, or SaaS marketing

- SEO and content marketing analytics experience

- Experience with influencer tools like Modash, HypeAuditor, or Upfluence

- Experience managing data across multiple brands or markets at once



---



## How We Measure Success



- Weekly dashboard delivered every Monday by a set deadline

- Monthly deep dive delivered by the 5th

- At least 20 new influencer outreach messages per week across all brands

- At least 4 active influencer collaborations per month by month 3

- Every weekly report includes at least 3 specific, actionable recommendations

- Ad performance included in the weekly dashboard



---



## First 30 Days



**Week 1:** Onboarding. Get access to every analytics platform across all six brands. Audit the tracking setup (GA4, pixels, UTMs). Understand where each brand stands.



**Week 2:** Build the first version of the weekly dashboard. Deliver the first Monday report, even if the data is not complete yet. Start influencer research for the two highest-priority brands.



**Week 3:** First complete weekly dashboard. First batch of influencer outreach (at least 10 messages). Audit any existing ad campaigns and share initial recommendations.



**Week 4:** First monthly deep dive. At least 2 influencer conversations in progress. Present a 90-day growth roadmap to the founder covering quick wins and longer bets.

title: Social Media and Digital Marketing VA
description:
Social Media and Digital Marketing Operations

About Me: I am a seasoned real estate agent in Los Angeles, California.

Your Role: You will manage my complete digital presence across YouTube, Instagram,
, LinkedIn,
, Google Business, and paid advertising channels, plus blog content development. You will create short-form content from listing videos, develop cohesive marketing strategies that showcase properties and build my personal brand as an agent.

Responsibilities: Developing and executing a 30–60–90 day account growth strategy targeting defined client avatars — luxury sellers age 50+ and second-generation affluent Asian buyers age 20–35. Creating and managing content calendars, editing video content from listing materials and creating short-form clips for all platforms, scheduling posts across all channels, automating workflows, optimizing Google Business and LinkedIn profiles, managing paid ad campaigns, leveraging AI tools for content enhancement, monitoring analytics, and providing strategic recommendations based on market trends and performance data.

4 posts/week Instagram

• 2 Reels minimum

-1 Story every day

• Weekly YouTube upload

-Optimize posting time

What We Need: Strong knowledge of social media platforms, scheduling and automation tools, video editing software, AI productivity tools, and blogging platforms. Real estate market understanding is essential, or ability to quickly develop fluency by studying successful agent content.

The Right Fit: Self-directed, detail-oriented, comfortable working independently in a fast-paced environment. This is a long-term, stable position.

Success Metrics — 30, 60, 90 Day Plan: Follower growth. Listing video views increasing monthly. Private inquiries tracked and reported weekly.CKPIs (How You’ll Be Measured) Content Performance — average video views per post, Reel plays, and YouTube watch time increasing month over month.

Engagement Rate — likes, comments, shares, and saves as a percentage of followers. A healthy target for real estate is two to three percent.

Google Business — profile views, click-through rates, and direction requests growing monthly.

Lead Generation — number of direct messages, profile link clicks, and contact form submissions tracked weekly.

Content Consistency — hitting the posting schedule with zero missed weeks, maintaining the four-post weekly cadence.

Paid Ad Performance — cost per click and cost per lead decreasing as campaigns are optimized over time.

YouTube — subscriber growth and average watch duration improving monthly.

To Apply: Please send your resume and a portfolio with social media content and videos you have created.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (CapCut)
description:
Paid Trial To Complete (Required to Apply, $150 if you complete it!)

When submitting your application, include these 3 trial videos: 
tion.site/Editor-Application-Test-Brief-326f
ede1d820b810?source=copy_link



Applications without the trial will not be considered.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour.

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Video Editor / Creative Strategist (Performance-Based Pay + Free Courses Included)
description:
About Us

We're a performance creative agency that produces direct-response video ads for US-based health and supplement brands. Our clients spend real budgets on the ads we make — which means when your work performs, you earn more.

We're looking for a video editor who wants to grow into a Creative Strategist — someone who doesn't just cut footage, but learns to think about why an ad works and builds the instinct to create ads that sell.



The Role

You'll start by editing short-form video ads (UGC-style, direct response) using scripts, AI tools, and briefs we provide. Over time, you'll develop into a full Creative Strategist — learning how to research markets, develop angles, and build ad concepts from scratch.



Schedule & Time Zone

We don't care when you work — as long as your daily output is delivered and you make the Saturday strategy call. You manage your own hours.

Daily output: 1 ad concept with 3 video variations.



You'll use AI and structured prompts for scripting and iteration, upload deliverables to Google Drive, log everything in our tracking sheet, and join weekly strategy calls. This is a system — you follow the process, use the frameworks, hit your output, and you earn.



How You Get Paid

You earn 2.5% of the first $10,000 in revenue generated by each ad concept you create.

That's up to $250 per winning concept.

At 5+ concepts per week, you're getting 20+ shots on goal every month. You don't need every concept to win. You need a few. And as your skill improves, your hit rate goes up — and so does your income.

There is no monthly cap. The more winners you produce, the more you make.

Revenue is tracked transparently in a shared sheet and payments are made bi-weekly.



What You Get Beyond Pay

Access to premium direct-response and copywriting courses (valued at thousands of dollars) — included free as part of the role

Hands-on training in performance creative strategy — the same skillset US agencies charge $5K–$15K/month for

AI-powered workflow — you'll work with cutting-edge AI tools for scripting, ideation, and review

A real path to growth — you're not stuck editing clips forever. You're building a skillset that compounds



Most editing roles pay you to stay in the same place. This one pays you to get better. You'll understand how ads are built, why they work, and how to create them from scratch. That knowledge compounds whether you stay with us long-term or go on to build something of your own.



This Role Is For You If…

You can edit video cleanly and quickly (Premiere, DaVinci, CapCut — whatever you're fast in)

You want to learn direct-response marketing, not just push pixels

You're reliable, consistent, and can hit a daily output target

You're excited by the idea of getting paid based on results, not hours

You want a long-term role where your earning potential grows as you grow



This Role Is NOT For You If…

You want a fixed salary with no performance component

You're not comfortable with a learning curve

You can't commit to consistent daily output



Final Notes

This is a performance culture.

You get rewarded for speed, output, and results.

If you want to make more, produce more, test more, win more.

The system is here to make sure your pay scales with your impact.

? Quote: “Concepts fuel scaling. Winners pay the whole team.”



To Apply

Fill out this short form below and link any past work (ads, reels, edits — anything that shows you can cut video).

title: Virtual Assistant  – Apply to Patent Agent Jobs in Specific U.S. Regions

Remote (US only)

Job accepts Patent Agent or technical degree

Patent Agent fields: Software, Mechanical Engineer, Chemical Engineer, Electrical Engineer, AI, Cloud Tech) 

Does NOT require law degree (unless I approve)

Full-time position preferred

If unsure ? save the job and ask me first.

Steps:

Open job posting

Click Apply

Upload resume

Paste cover letter template

Fill application form carefully

Submit application

Location

Website

Link to job

Applied? (Yes/No)

Notes

Must follow instructions exactly

Experience as VA preferred

Experience applying to jobs preferred

Your VA experience

If you used LinkedIn / Indeed before

Your hourly rate

The word: PATENT (to confirm you read instructions)

title: Cold Caller / SDR — US B2B Outbound | $6/hr + Bonuses (Multiple Positions, Part-Time 30 hrs/wk)
description:
EARN $780-$1,100+/MONTH — MULTIPLE POSITIONS OPEN



We're a small US-based digital marketing agency serving ecommerce brands. We manage paid advertising (Google Ads, Meta Ads) and help clients grow profitably. We're building out our outbound sales team and hiring multiple cold callers.



THE ROLE



You will cold call US-based ecommerce business owners and marketing directors to book 20-minute discovery meetings. That's the job — book meetings. You're not closing deals, writing proposals, or managing accounts.



This is high-volume outbound dialing using a power dialer. If you're energized by conversations and comfortable hearing "no" 50 times a day, keep reading.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Cold call
US prospects per day using a power dialer (we provide it)

- Follow a provided script — you'll be trained, not left to figure it out

- Book discovery meetings via Calendly

- Log activity in a shared tracking sheet

- Leave pre-recorded voi
s and send templated follow-up texts

- Join brief daily check-ins via video



SCHEDULE



- 30 hours/week (Mon-Fri, 6 hours/day)

- Must overlap with US business hours (Pacific or Eastern time)

- Consistent daily schedule required



COMPENSATION



- $6/hour base (30 hrs/wk = ~$780/month)

- $75 bonus per booked meeting that is attended by the prospect

- $250 bonus when a booked meeting converts to a signed client

- 13th month pay

- 2-week paid trial at full base rate



Realistic monthly earnings once ramped: $780-$1,100+



WHO THRIVES IN THIS ROLE



- You've done cold calling before and actually liked it

- You don't take rejection personally

- You're coachable — you follow the script first, then suggest improvements

- You show up on time, every day, without being chased

- You want a long-term position, not a 2-week gig



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Full cold call script and objection handling playbook

- Power dialer — no personal phone needed

- Lead lists — you do not source your own leads

- Paid training during your first week (mock calls, script practice, tool setup)

- Accent coaching resources (ELSA Speak subscription + pronunciation training materials)



REQUIREMENTS



- Clear spoken English (you will be voice tested — accent is fine, clarity is what matters)

- Previous cold calling experience preferred (B2B preferred, not required)

- Reliable internet + quiet workspace

- Backup internet (mobile hotspot)

- Laptop or desktop with USB headset



TO APPLY — READ THIS CAREFULLY



Applications without BOTH of the following will not be reviewed:



1. Record a 60-second voice memo introducing yourself as if you are cold calling a business owner. Say: "Hi [Name], I'm calling from a US digital marketing agency. We help ecommerce brands get better results from their advertising. I had a quick question about your ad spend — do you have 30 seconds?" Upload to Vocaroo and include the link.



2. How many cold calls did you make per day in your most recent calling role? If you have no cold calling experience, say so honestly and tell us what relevant experience you have.



We review voice memos first. If your English is clear and energetic, you'll be invited to a short Zoom interview.

title: Prop Firm Trader / Day Trader (FX/Futures/Crypto)
description:
Hello Traders!



Isla Capital is growing — and we’re looking to bring on disciplined, serious traders to join our team.



We work with experienced prop firm traders to trade evaluation and funded accounts through firms such as FTMO, Apex, Alpha Capital Group, and similar platforms.



This opportunity is designed for Filipino professionals who understand prop firm rules, respect risk, and can trade with consistency and control.



This is not a casual trading role — it is a structured, performance-driven environment with a clear path toward higher earnings and long-term growth. Over time, this role will expand into live portfolio trading, where earning potential increases significantly.



What You’ll Do...



• Trade prop firm evaluation (challenge) accounts and funded accounts

• Strictly follow all prop firm rules and drawdown limits

• Maintain daily trading journals

• Provide consistent performance updates



What We’re Looking For...



• Experience trading prop firm accounts

• Strong risk management and discipline

• Ability to work independently

• Honest and reliable communication

• Understanding of scalping and/or day trading strategies



Compensation & Growth...



• Weekly base salary potential

• Bonus for passing evaluations / challenges

• Profit sharing on funded account payouts

• Performance bonuses based on payout milestones

• Access to in-house coaching from experienced traders



Important Notes...



• Accounts must be registered under the trader’s name (per prop firm rules), but all accounts and profits are part of Isla Capital

• All prop firm fees and account costs are fully covered by Isla Capital

• Strict confidentiality is required



Who This Is For...



This is a performance-first opportunity for traders who take their craft seriously.



We are building a system where disciplined Filipino traders can earn meaningful income and grow long-term within a structured trading environment.



If you are consistent, controlled, and committed — this could be a strong fit.



How to Apply...



Please apply and include:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Your prop firm experience

• Your trading style and psychology

• Resume or link to resume (if available)



Let's build something serious together!

title: Sales & Operations VA
description:
About Gutter Guru

Gutter Guru is a growing commercial gutter cleaning company serving property managers, HOAs, and commercial clients across the country. We connect customers with a trusted network of local subcontractors and pride ourselves on reliable service, clear communication, and professional results. As we scale, we're looking for a detail-oriented tea
mber to support our sales and operations pipeline.



Role Overview

The Sales & Operations Coordinator plays a critical behind-the-scenes role in keeping Gutter Guru's growth engine running. You'll own our outbound lead generation, daily
 outreach, contact data management, and financial tracking — ensuring our pipeline stays full and our books stay clean. This is a high-accountability role for someone who is organized, persistent, and comfortable working across multiple tools and workflows simultaneously.



Key Responsibilities



Lead Generation

- Research and identify potential leads using LinkedIn and Apollo based on target customer criteria

- Collect key contact information including name, company, and
 address

- Add and maintain leads in the designated Google Sheets folder, ensuring all records are accurate, complete, and properly formatted for outreach campaigns

- Keep lead lists clean and organized for use in YAMM mail merge campaigns



Daily
 Outreach (YAMM)

- Execute daily outbound
 campaigns using YAMM (Yet Another Mail Merge) via Gmail — approximately 50–60
s per sending account per day

- Set up correct
 templates and verify merge fields are accurate before each send

- Review YAMM reports after each campaign and record key metrics 
s sent, opens, replies, etc.) in the tracking sheet

- Maintain organized documentation of all outreach results for reporting and performance review



Phone Number Research

- Work through existing contact lists to locate and add missing phone numbers

- Source numbers by reviewing
 conversations, signatures, and other available records

- Update Pipedrive CRM with all discovered contact information



Subcontractor Payments

- Process payments to subcontractors and track payment schedules

- Confirm subcontractors are paid accurately and on time

- Maintain organized payment records for internal reporting



Accounts Receivable Management

- Monitor outstanding customer invoices and follow up on pending or overdue balances

- Communicate professionally with customers regarding payment status

- Record received payments in both the CRM and QuickBooks to keep financial records up to date



What We're Looking For

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail — data accuracy is non-negotiable

- Comfortable working with tools like Google Sheets, LinkedIn, Apollo, YAMM, Pipedrive, and QuickBooks

- Self-starter who can manage daily workflows independently without heavy oversight

- Clear communicator, both written and verbal

- Prior experience in lead generation, sales support, or administrative operations is a plus



Why Gutter Guru

- Flexible remote work environment

- Clear processes and workflows — you'll know exactly what success looks like

- A growing company where your contributions have a direct impact

- Collaborative, no-nonsense team culture



Please apply using the link below:

title: Web Developer
description:
I’m looking for a reliable web developer/designer to help manage and improve several websites across Wix, WordPress, and Shopify.



This role will start as part-time (about 10 hours per week) with a $500/month salary (USD), with the goal of growing into a full-time position as you take more work off my plate.



Responsibilities

 • Design and develop pages on Wix, WordPress, and Shopify

 • Update website content, layout, and functionality

 • Improve site design and user experience

 • Implement small feature requests and fixes

 • Optimize websites for performance and responsiveness

 • Assist with general website maintenance



Requirements

 • Experience working with Wix, WordPress, and Shopify

 • Ability to handle both design and development

 • Strong understanding of modern web design and UX

 • Ability to work independently and communicate clearly

 • Reliable and responsive



Details

 • 10 hours per week

 • $500/month (USD)

 • Potential to increase hours and transition to full-time

title: YouTube Video Editor – 2D Cartoon Explainer / Faceless Channel
description:
I run a YouTube channel that explains cybersecurity risks for small businesses.



The videos tell real stories about cyber attacks and show business owners how they can avoid these problems.



Each video is around 5–8 minutes long and follows an explainer/story style using 2D cartoon style visuals.



I will provide:

• Script

• Voiceover

• Scene outline

• Visual style references



Your job will be to:

• Create or generate simple 2D explainer visuals

• Assemble scenes that match the VO

• Add subtitles

• Add simple motion (zoom, pan, transitions)

• Add background music and simple sound effects to improve the video.

• Export the final video ready for YouTube



Editing software can include CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects or similar tools.



Important:

All project files and visual assets must be delivered so they can be reused for future videos.



This is a long-term position if the work quality is good.



To confirm you read this job post, please start your application with the word CYBER.



Please also include:

• 2 YouTube videos you edited

• What software you use

• Your expected price per video

title: Social Media Manager for UK Food Businesses (3 Accounts)
description:
We are looking for a creative and reliable Social Media Manager to manage and grow the Instagram presence of three food businesses in the UK.



Your role will be to create and schedule engaging content that helps attract customers, build brand awareness, and keep our social pages active and professional.



This is a long-term role for someone who understands food content, visual storytelling, and social media growth.



Responsibilities



You will manage 3 social media accounts.



Each week you will produce:



3 posts per account



2 reels per account



That is 15 pieces of content per week total.



Your tasks will include:



Creating engaging posts and reels using provided photos/videos or stock content



Writing captions that match the brand voice



Adding relevant hashtags and local targeting



Scheduling posts



Maintaining a consistent posting schedule



Suggesting simple content ideas that help promote the businesses



Basic engagement (replying to comments/messages if required)



Content Style



Our businesses are food-focused, so content should include:



Food photos and short video clips



Reels showing preparation, dishes, or behind the scenes



Promotional content (offers, specials, etc.)



Local engagement style posts



Requirements



Experience managing Instagram business accounts



Experience creating Reels



Basic graphic design skills (Canva or similar)



Strong written English



Reliable and consistent



Ability to work independently



Bonus if you have experience with:



Food or restaurant social media



Local marketing



Short-form video editing



Weekly Workload



Approximately 4–6 hours per week.



This is a recurring weekly role.



To Apply



Please include:



Links to Instagram accounts you currently manage or have managed



Examples of reels or posts you have created



Your weekly rate



The word “FOOD” in the first line of your application so we know you read the full job post.



If you're creative, reliable, and enjoy food content, we'd love to work with you long term.

title: Part-Time Amazon PPC & Listing Optimisation Assistant (Long Term, Low Hours)
description:
We run a small UK Amazon FBA brand selling a reusable filtered water bottle and replacement filters.



We are looking for a reliable long-term assistant to manage and optimise our Amazon Seller Central account weekly.

This is not a high-pressure growth role — we need steady maintenance, optimisation and cost control.



Your job is to keep advertising efficient and gradually improve the listing performance.



Your weekly tasks

Adjust bids and budgets to reduce wasted ad spend



Add negative keywords



Move converting keywords into manual campaigns



Check search term reports



Suggest improvements to product title & bullet points



Suggest improvements to images



Monitor ACOS & conversion rate



Basic keyword research (Helium10 / DataDive / Amazon search)



Help maintain Subscribe & Save eligibility



Occasional flat file edits if needed



Important



We do NOT want:



Agencies



Teams



Course sellers



“Amazon gurus”

This is long term small weekly work — not full time.



NEED TO HAVE SKILLS IN THE FOLLOWING:



Amazon Seller Central



Amazon PPC optimisation



Search term report analysis



Keyword research



Understanding ACOS and conversion rate

title: Home Health Care Coordinator
description:
Omni Therapy, Inc. is looking for dedicated, knowledgeable Care Coordinators to handle home health referrals on our team. Candidates should have a proven successful track record of working in the healthcare field as a nurse, therapist, or similar role to a healthcare case manager or care coordinator.



Care Coordinators work side-by-side with members of the staffing, Q.A. and human resource teams to provide support by managing activity on referrals after the initial visit has already been conducted by a therapist.



Job Benefits:

• Competitive Pay

• Full time employment

• Health Insurance

• Team bonuses

• Paid Time Off

• Sick Time

• Paid Holidays

• 100% Remote Full-Time Opportunity



Job Requirements:

• 2+ years of recent experience as a healthcare care coordinator / healthcare case manager

• Candidates with 2+ years experience as an RN or Physical Therapist / Occupational Therapist are welcome to apply as well.

• Experience working graveyard shift with an international company is a big plus.

• Must be available to work full-time hours: Mon – Fri, 9am – 5:30pm Pacific Standard Time.

• Experience with home health is a big plus.

title: Long form YouTube Video Editor
description:
Video Editor – Motorsport YouTube Channel (Part-Time, Ongoing)

$5 USD/hr | ~4 hours/day | Remote



About the Channel

I race formula cars in the Australian Drivers Championship and document it on YouTube. The channel covers real racing, car builds, mechanical work, and sim racing content. Videos range from produced race recaps to raw behind-the-scenes footage of what it actually takes to run a racing car. The audience are motorsport fans who value authenticity — your job is to make the story land and keep people watching.



The Role

I have a steady, ongoing flow of footage and need a reliable editor who can turn around videos within the week. Raw material includes GoPro onboard, phone footage, drone clips, and voiceover commentary. This is not a one-off project. I’m looking for someone I can work with long-term who treats deadlines seriously.

Important: I use 
 to give feedback directly on the timeline. You must be comfortable working within that review workflow inside Premiere Pro. This is non-negotiable.



What You’ll Be Editing

Race recap videos (onboard + commentary + b-roll), car build and mechanical walkthrough content, sim racing and hardware content, behind-the-scenes and vlog-style event footage, occasional YouTube Shorts cuts.



Requirements

Adobe Premiere Pro (proficient, not just familiar), 
 revision workflow experience, able to colour-grade mixed footage sources (GoPro, phone, DSLR), comfortable cutting to voiceover and pacing for retention, basic motion graphics and text overlays, reliable internet for file transfers, strong English comprehension.



What I Need From You

Videos turned around within one week of receiving the brief. Proactive communication — if something will be late, tell me before the deadline, not after. Available for a quick message during your working hours. Accept feedback and revise promptly. Treat this like a professional commitment.



Nice to Have

Interest in or knowledge of motorsport, experience editing YouTube channels with an established audience, ability to put together basic thumbnail compositions, experience handling GoPro footage (compression, fisheye correction).



How to Apply

Send a message with the subject line “MOTORSPORT EDITOR” — this tells me you read the full post. Include links to 2–3 videos you’ve edited (YouTube preferred), a brief description of your Premiere Pro and 
 experience, your availability and typical daily hours, and one sentence on why you’re a good fit for this type of content. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. If you’re reliable and do good work, this role is yours to keep.????????????????

title: Amazon FBA Product Research & Alibaba Sourcing VA (Part-time, Takealot / South Africa)
description:
I run a Takealot store in South Africa and currently do retail arbitrage using Temu. I want to transition my top products to direct importing from China to improve my margins.I’m looking for an experienced Amazon FBA VA who has done product research and Alibaba/1688 supplier sourcing before.Your main tasks will be:Use my existing Takealot product links and Temu links to find the same or very similar products on Alibaba / 1688.Contact multiple suppliers to get quotes (unit price, MOQ, packaging, lead time).Find and compare freight options (air/sea/courier or freight forwarders).Calculate total landed cost per unit in South Africa (product + shipping + estimated duties).Prepare comparison sheets showing how much I will save vs buying on Temu.Requirements:Previous experience as an Amazon FBA VA (product research & supplier sourcing).Strong experience using Alibaba (and ideally 1688).Good English and clear communication.Strong at using Google Sheets / Excel.Nice to have:Experience calculating landed cost and profit margins.Experience with other marketplaces (e.g. eBay, Shopee, Lazada).Workload: initially this is a Gig but going forward~10 hours per week looking for arbitrage products on Alibaba/express/madeinchina/etc. In order to sell on 
 

Budget: R1,500–R2,000 per month equivalent to start, with potential to grow if we work well together.To apply, please:Share your experience with Amazon FBA product research and Alibaba sourcing.Send a sample of a product research or supplier comparison sheet you’ve done before (you can hide sensitive info).Tell me what tools you use for research and costing.

title: Video Editor (Short-Form & Long-Form Content | Real Estate Content)

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Remote Sales Development Representative

Kelly Agency: Allstate – Pottstown, PA



Our challenge:

The Kelly Agency, a leading Allstate Insurance Agency, is looking for a dynamic Remote Sales Development

Representative to join our Outside Sales Team. Earn a 240 PHP base wage plus daily and monthly bonuses, with

top performers averaging 10,000+ PHP/month in bonuses.



Who we are:

At the Kelly Agency, we are driven by passion and teamwork, committed to building strong personal

relationships. As one of Pennsylvania’s largest remote-friendly Allstate Agencies, we rank in the top 10%

nationwide for new business growth and customer satisfaction. Our team thrives on shared incentives and

continuous improvement, all while maintaining a healthy work-life balance. Embracing cutting-edge technology,

we utilize digital tools such as social media, texting, video, online quoting, and lead management software to

enhance our operations.

We take immense pride in our customer experience, safeguarding what matters most to our clients and their

families. Our core values are: putting customers first, staying positive, being honest, embracing growth, and

working together.



Follow us on Social 

Visit our Website: 



The job description:

Insurance is essential, yet often confusing. As a Sales Development Representative, you'll provide a friendly,

reliable, and informative experience to prospective customers, by connecting with them on the phone and

introducing them to our licensed agents for quoting. This entry-level position offers a career path within our

agency, with opportunities for growth and advancement.



The traits we are looking for:

- Passion for helping people protect their assets and gain peace of mind.

- Highly motivated with a hunter’s mentality.

- Skilled at handling objections while prioritizing customer interests.

- Strong computer skills and the ability to multitask across various programs.

- Drive to win and a willingness to follow our proven success system.



The core job requirements:

- Must have ability to work from home. This includes: a quiet working space, computer, monitor, headset, mouse.

- Make 475+ calls daily to provide warm leads to our licensed agents.

- Pre-qualify insurance prospects for insurability and quality of risk.

- Transfer a minimum of 8 qualified leads to our Outside Sales Team daily.

- Collect and maintain accurate data in the CRM system, including contact information, market data, and

qualifiers.

- Participate in daily meetings to ensure team alignment.



Some benefits we provide:

- Work from home

- 13th Month Bonus

- Paid time off after 180 days

- Health Insurance



Join us at the Kelly Agency and be a part of a forward-thinking, tech-driven team dedicated to customer

excellence and personal growth.

title: Essay Editor/Academic Writer
description:
We’re an academic consulting firm that helps high school students gain admission to top-tier universities in the U.S., and we’re currently seeking a part-time Essay Editor/Academic Writer with strong writing, editing, and critical thinking skills to join our team.



This role is ideal for someone who can take rough or underdeveloped student essays and turn them into polished, well-structured pieces that read naturally and professionally. The position is part-time and flexible, but it’s also deadline-driven and requires strong reliability, responsiveness, and attention to detail.



This is not a general content writing role. We’re specifically looking for someone who can revise and rewrite essays so they are clearer, stronger, and more compelling while still aligning with the original prompt, intended message, and required word count.



Key Responsibilities:

• Edit and rewrite high school-level essays based on specific prompts and word count requirements, improving structure, clarity, grammar, tone, and overall impact.

• Manage multiple essay assignments at once while meeting tight turnaround times, typically within 24–48 hours, and communicate proactively regarding deadlines or issues that may affect delivery.



Applicants should be able to:

• Rewrite and strengthen weak or underdeveloped drafts without losing the original intent, while elevating flow, structure, readability, and overall quality.

• Demonstrate excellent grammar, sentence control, and word choice, and write with a level of polish that reads as fluent and natural in English.



To proceed with your application, please send a message with your resume, 2-3 writing samples for review, and an estimate of how many hours you can commit each week.

title: Appointment Setter - Solar
description:
APPOINTMENT SETTER — SOLAR

Remote | Base + Commission | Full-Time



THE BASICS

Location: 100% Remote

Hours: Full-time  (10am-4pm UK time)

Base Pay: $300 USD/month

Commission: $15 USD per sat (attended) appointment

Minimum Target: 15 appointments/month

Expected Earnings: $750/month at 30 appts | $1,050/month at 50 appts





ABOUT THE ROLE

We run an outbound call centre booking solar assessments for homeowners across the UK. You will be making outbound calls to leads we provide, qualifying homeowners, and booking them in for a solar assessment with one of our consultants.

This is a remote, performance-based role with a guaranteed base — we want people who are serious about earning, not just clocking hours.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Making outbound calls to homeowners across the UK

Qualifying prospects using a script we provide

Booking confirmed, attended appointments into our calendar

Maintaining accurate call notes and daily reporting

Hitting a minimum of 15 sat appointments per month



WHAT WE PROVIDE

Full dialler licence and system access — no cost to you

Proven call scripts and objection handling guides

Lead lists — you won't be sourcing your own leads

Full onboarding and product training before you go live

Weekly pay.



PAY STRUCTURE

Appointments/Month

15 appts/month ? $300 base + $225 commission = $525/month

30 appts/month ? $300 base + $450 commission = $750/month

50 appts/month ? $300 base + $750 commission = $1,050/month

Commission paid from appointment 1. No earnings cap. 2 week day grace period for new starters.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Previous experience in cold calling, outbound sales or appointment setting

Confident, clear spoken English

Self-motivated and able to work independently from home

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

Comfortable with rejection — this is a numbers game and we know it



Nice to have:

Experience in solar, energy or home improvement

Familiarity with diallers or CRM tools

Previous experience with Australian, USA or UK clients

title: Graphic Designer-  Ads Creator (Conversion-Focused – Full-Time)
description:
Graphic Designer / Ads Creator (Conversion-Focused – Full-Time)



We are a fast-growing international e-commerce company looking for an experienced Graphic Designer / Ads Creator who can create high-converting ad creatives for social media platforms.



We are not looking for someone who copies existing ads.

We are looking for someone who understands marketing psychology, hooks, and what actually makes creatives convert.

If your work is generic, templated, or copied — this role is not for you.



What We’re Looking For:

Proven experience creating high-converting ad creatives (Meta, Pinterest, etc.)

Strong understanding of direct response marketing

Ability to create original, scroll-stopping designs

Deep understanding of hooks, angles, and customer psychology

Ability to work independently and deliver consistently



Application Task (MANDATORY)- If you are interested in this position, complete the task below:

Create a 1:1 static ad for the English market for a weight loss product.

Use your creativity and marketing knowledge to create something that would actually convert, not just look good.



We are specifically looking for:

Strong hook

Clear visual hierarchy

High CTR design style

Original concept (no copying existing ads)

Applicants who do not complete this assignment will not be considered.



Job Requirements:

Must be available between 7:00 AM – 10:00 AM PH Time (Monday–Saturday) for communication (we are based in the US)

Full-time position only – cannot be combined with other jobs

High attention to detail and strong work ethic



Application Instructions- To be considered:

Submit your portfolio

Submit your custom ad assignment

Start your application with: Creative -Ready to Convert

End your application with your favorite fruit

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed. We also do not read any applications that apply with less than 10pts, spam applications or mass-applications. 



If you understand what makes ads convert and want to work with a serious, performance-driven team — we want to hear from you.

title: Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist (Remote)
description:
Apex Social brings together experienced educators, therapists and care providers with families who have special care needs and provides personal & career development through a unique, collaborative work experience for Care Professionals in a new state or new country.



Our Mission

Unlocking children’s greatest potential through integrating skilled Care Professionals into their family’s daily life.

Empowering Children to develop to their fullest abilities.

Empowering Care Professionals by providing personal & career development, experiential learning and cultural enrichment through a unique, collaborative work experience.

Empowering Families by providing specialized, skilled child care and cultural exchange in the home through an individualized recruiting and matching process.

Empowering Schools & Universities by providing career coaching and support for their students and alumni to gain interdisciplinary paid work experience & continuing education in Germany, the United States and Australia.

Empowering Tea
mbers by providing a collaborative, remote work environment with opportunities for training and growth as well as a commitment to our mission ensuring that we find purpose, fulfillment and a sense of belonging in our careers.



Position Overview:

We’re looking for an experienced recruiter to partner closely with our team and accelerate hiring across multiple roles. This isn’t a traditional VA position—it’s for a highly professional, proactive recruiter who can take ownership of full-cycle hiring, quickly match candidates, and support onboarding after minimal training.



Key Responsibilities:

-Collaborate with Manager and leadership to understand role requirements and priorities.

-Source, screen, and shortlist high-quality candidates efficiently.

-Manage multiple hiring pipelines independently.

-Ensure fast, accurate matching of candidates post-onboarding.

-Maintain candidate engagement and provide updates to stakeholders.

-Recommend process improvements to increase time-to-hire and candidate quality.



Qualifications & Experience:

-Minimum 10 years in HR, recruitment, or talent acquisition.

-Proven full-cycle recruiting experience, ideally in US-based or international contexts.

-Strong judgment in evaluating candidates and making recommendations.

-Experience with agency recruiting or high-volume hiring is a plus.

-Excellent communication, organizational, and stakeholder management skills.

-Able to work independently and hit the ground running after onboarding.



Working Hours: PST or EST Timezone. Occasional flexibility may be required to accommodate urgent scheduling needs or communication with U.S.-based participants.



Compensation and Benefits:

- Competitive salary based on experience and market standards.

- Paid time off, holidays, and remote-friendly work environment.

- Opportunities for professional growth and cross-cultural experience with U.S.-based teams.

title: Healthcare Call Center / Virtual Assistant - Healthcare experience is required.
description:
We’re a fast-growing ophthalmology practice in California for a skilled and responsible Virtual Assistant to join our call center team! If you’re organized, a great communicator, and love helping people, this is a great opportunity to be part of a supportive and growing team.



In this role, you’ll answer patient calls, schedule and confirm appointments, make outbound calls for reminders and follow-ups.  You'll also help with miscellaneous administrative tasks as needed. You’ll play an important role in keeping our clinics running smoothly and ensuring a great patient experience.  



We’re looking for someone with strong English and/or Spanish communication skills, prior call center or virtual assistant experience, and excellent attention to detail. You should be reliable, able to multitask efficiently, and comfortable handling a high volume of calls.  



The schedule is Monday through Friday from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM (Los Angeles time). 



To apply, please send a short introduction about yourself, resume, your relevant experience, a 1–2 minute voice recording, typing speed, and your internet speed test results.

title: PH Day Shift: Part-Time Intake & Client Support Specialist
description:
Position: Part-Time Intake & Client Support Specialist (Remote – Philippines)

Bonus: $20 USD per lead converted during shift

3 months trial period to permanent staff



Schedule



5:00 PM – 11:00 PM Eastern Time (with a 30-minute break)

Monday–Friday (flexible depending on needs)



Role Overview



We are a growing East Coast-based law firm seeking a reliable, detail-oriented Intake Specialist to serve as the first point of contact for potential clients during evening hours. This role is critical in converting leads into retained clients while maintaining a high level of professionalism, empathy, and responsiveness.



This position works closely with the firm’s attorney and paralegal and plays a key role in client onboarding, data accuracy, and overall client experience.



Key Responsibilities

Client Intake & Communication



Answer incoming phone calls and respond to website live chats promptly and professionally



Collect key intake information (name, contact info, charges/issues, court dates, location, etc.)



Follow structured intake scripts while maintaining a natural, human tone



Communicate with empathy and professionalism, especially when clients are stressed, anxious, or overwhelmed



Handle difficult or emotional client interactions with patience, professionalism, and composure



Provide general information about services (no legal advice)



Schedule consultations and confirm appointments



Client Conversion & Onboarding



Send payment contracts/retainer agreements to clients



Prepare and send payment links for retainers and fees



Accurately input client information into retainer agreements before sending



Guide clients through the onboarding process and ensure documents are completed



Follow up with leads to encourage conversion into retained clients



Lead Management, Data Entry & Invoice Support



Enter and update client information accurately in CRM (e.g., Smokeball, spreadsheets, or other systems)



Maintain organized, accurate, and complete intake and client records



Perform consistent data entry with a high level of attention to detail



Assist with basic invoice management, including sending invoices, tracking payments, and updating records



Track all incoming leads and ensure no inquiries are missed



Follow up with missed calls, voi
s, and unconverted leads



Team Communication



Communicate consistently with the attorney and paralegal regarding new leads, urgent matters, and client updates



Escalate important or time-sensitive issues promptly



Follow internal workflows and instructions provided by the legal team



Administrative Support



Draft 2 SEO-optimized blog articles per day (topics and guidance provided)



Assist with light administrative tasks (data entry, document organization, basic research)



Support basic marketing tasks if needed (posting blogs, formatting content, etc.)



Responsiveness & Coverage



Be available and responsive during scheduled hours, even if call volume is low



Monitor systems continuously for new leads (calls, chats,
s)



Ensure fast response times (ideally within minutes)



Requirements



Excellent written and spoken English with strong grammar, clarity, and professionalism



Strong communication skills with the ability to explain information clearly and confidently



Ability to communicate with compassion, patience, and emotional intelligence



Ability to handle difficult, sensitive, or emotional client situations calmly and professionally



Strong attention to detail and high level of accuracy in data entry and document preparation



Ability to follow scripts while sounding natural and not robotic



Highly reliable and able to work independently



Strong organization and time management skills



Comfortable using CRM systems, Google Docs, and chat/phone platforms



Preferred Qualifications



Prior experience in legal intake, customer service, or call center roles



Experience working with U.S.-based clients



Experience handling sensitive or high-stress client interactions



Familiarity with SEO writing (or willingness to learn quickly)



Reporting Structure



This position reports directly to the firm’s attorney and paralegal



Must be responsive to instructions, feedback, and workflow updates



Compensation



Competitive monthly pay based on experience



$20 USD bonus for each lead converted into a retained client during the shift



On average, the firm receives 2–3 converted leads per day, providing strong bonus earning potential



Performance-based bonuses may be offered for consistent high performance



What Success Looks Like in This Role



Fast response times to all leads



High-quality, accurate data entry, contract preparation, and invoice handling



Smooth onboarding process from first contact to signed retainer



Strong conversion of inquiries into retained clients



Clients feel comfortable, respected, and supported from the first interaction



Consistent, reliable communication with the legal team

title: Virtual Assistant – Cold Caller (Real Estate Wholesaling)
description:
## **Job Title:** Virtual Assistant – Cold Caller (Real Estate Wholesaling)



### **Job Overview:**

We are seeking a motivated and experienced **Virtual Assistant Cold Caller** to join our real estate wholesaling team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for generating leads, qualifying potential sellers, and setting up appointments for our acquisitions team. This position requires excellent communication skills, a positive attitude, and the ability to handle rejection while maintaining professionalism.



---



### **Key Responsibilities:**



? **Cold Calling**

- Make 1300+ calls to potential property sellers using a provided script a day.

- Follow up with leads through calls, SMS, and
s.

- Overcome objections and build rapport with property owners.



? **Lead Qualification**

- Ask targeted questions to identify motivated sellers (e.g., property condition, mortgage status, reason for selling).

- Determine the seller's level of motivation and urgency.

- Record all lead details accurately in the CRM.



? **Appointment Setting**

- Schedule follow-up calls and appointments for the acquisitions team.

- Ensure all scheduled appointments are logged and confirmed.



? **CRM Management**

- Keep detailed records of all calls and interactions in the CRM (**PropStream, Resimpli, MOJO

- Tag and categorize leads based on motivation level and property status.

- Update lead status and notes after each call.



? **Script and Objection Handling**

- Use a proven cold-calling script while remaining flexible to adjust based on conversation flow.

- Handle objections confidently and professionally.
