title: Technical LinkedIn Sourcer (IT Staffing - Canada/US)
description:
About Us: We are a highly successful IT Staffing Agency based in North America. We provide top-tier technical talent to massive enterprise clients like TD Bank and Fiserv. We are looking for a highly analytical, detail-oriented LinkedIn Sourcer to become the backbone of our delivery team.



The Role: You will not be calling candidates. Your only job is data mining and list building. Every day, our team will give you specific IT roles (e.g., Senior Java Developer, Cloud Architect). You will use LinkedIn to find 100 perfectly matched candidates and format their data flawlessly into a Google Sheet for our Recruiter to call the next morning.



Your Daily Tasks:

-Execute complex Boolean searches on LinkedIn to find niche IT talent in Canada and the US.

-Review candidate profiles to ensure they match our strict technical requirements.

-Input candidate data (Name, LinkedIn URL, Current Title, Key Tech Stack) into our tracking sheets with 100% accuracy.



Requirements:

-Exceptional written English.

-Strong understanding of IT terminology (You must know the difference between Java and JavaScript, or AWS and Azure).

-High-speed, stable internet connection.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY): 

-Do not send a generic cover letter. To apply, you must message us with your resume and the answers to the "3-Question Practical Test" below. Applications without these exact answers will be deleted immediately.



1. Boolean Logic: Write the exact LinkedIn Boolean search string you would use to find a Software Engineer who has experience with BOTH "Spring Boot" and "Microservices", but you want to EXCLUDE anyone who has the word "Manager" in their profile.



2. IT Knowledge: Briefly explain the difference between "Front-End" and "Back-End" development in two sentences or less.



3. Attention to Detail: What is the name of one of the massive enterprise clients mentioned in our "About Us" section?

title: Experienced Cold Caller / Appointment Setter Needed for Digital Marketing Services
description:
We are an outbound lead generation agency that helps digital marketing agencies connect with home improvement businesses (plumbing, pest control, roofing, and similar companies) who will benefit from the marketing help (SEO, Google Maps Ranking, Google Ads, Google Business Profile Optimization, etc.)



We are looking for a highly disciplined cold caller (aka. appointment setter) who enjoys speaking with business owners and booking qualified meetings.



You will not be working alone. You will be part of a structured calling system with scripts, materials, and ongoing support from experienced callers and the founder.



Your primary responsibility will be to contact business owners and determine whether they are open to taking on new jobs, then schedule appointments for our clients.



This is a long-term role with opportunities to grow into positions such as:

- Cold Calling Team Manager

- High-Ticket Sales Representative

- Internal Sales Coach

& others



If you are consistent, coachable, and enjoy outbound communication, this role can become a stable long-term opportunity.



1) What Makes This Role Different?



Unlike typical freelance calling roles, you will work inside a structured system with real support.



You will receive:

- Proven scripts and calling frameworks

- Structured training on the system (from multi 4-figure business coaching & courses)

- Live feedback and call reviews

- Weekly team calls

- Mindset training (for continuous growth & support)

- A supportive team of other callers

- Direct guidance from the founder



Your job is execution. The strategy, systems, and materials are already prepared.



2) Who You Will Be Calling?



You will contact home improvement contractors, including:

- Plumbing companies

- Pest control companies

- Roofing companies

- Similar residential service businesses



Your goal is to determine whether they have the capacity to take on additional jobs and schedule a meeting with our client if appropriate.



3) Your Responsibilities



Your work will include:

- Calling business owners using a provided lead list

- Following the provided scripts and frameworks

- Qualifying prospects based on simple criteria

- Booking appointments for our clients

- Logging calls and outcomes in the tracking sheet

- Participating in team feedback sessions



Tools you will use include:

- GoHighLevel

- Google Sheets

- Notion

- Google Workspace tools



4) Requirements



- Strong English proficiency with minimal accent

- Comfortable speaking with business owners

- Consistent work ethic and reliability

- Ability to follow structured processes

- Previous cold calling or appointment setting experience



5) Preferred (But Not Required)



- Located in a United States time zone

- Experience calling local service businesses

- Familiarity with CRM tools



6) Work Structure



Part-time to start.

Opportunity to grow into full-time based on performance.

Work alongside a team of other callers.

Regular team communication and support.



7) Personal Traits We Value



We are looking for someone who is:

- Consistent in their work habits

- Coachable and open to feedback

- Calm and confident on the phone

- Professional when speaking with business owners



Cold calling is a skill that improves with discipline and repetition.

We value people who are committed to mastering the craft.



To confirm you have read this description, include the number 77 in your application.

title: Senior Laravel + Vue 3 Engineer – ERP Migration & Accounting Validation (Full-Time Remote)
description:
About the Project



We are rebuilding our mature legacy ERP system (PowerBuilder client-server) as a modern SaaS application using Laravel and Vue 3.



The system includes:



• Real Estate Management

• Full Accounting Module (Chart of Accounts, Cost Centers, Subledger, General Ledger)

• Financial Reports (Trial Balance, Income Statement, Balance Sheet)

• Contract Management

• Lease & Payment Transactions

• Multi-branch handling

• Role-based permissions



The legacy system is fully operational and will serve as the reference system for validation and reconciliation.



This is not a startup MVP.

This is a modernization and stabilization role for a mature ERP system.



Role Overview



We are looking for a strong full-stack engineer who can:



• Audit and understand an existing Laravel + Vue 3 codebase

• Validate SaaS outputs against a legacy ERP system

• Ensure accounting logic and financial reports reconcile correctly

• Identify mismatches and root causes

• Improve transaction posting integrity

• Review and optimize database structure

• Enhance UI consistency and professional polish

• Implement structured regression testing

• Deliver stable, production-grade releases



This role requires strong analytical thinking and discipline — not just feature development.



Required Experience



• 5+ years Laravel experience

• 3+ years Vue.js experience (Vue 3 preferred)

• Experience working on production SaaS systems

• Strong REST API knowledge

• Strong MySQL database design knowledge

• Experience taking over and improving existing codebases

• Experience with Git workflows



Strongly Preferred



• Experience working on ERP, accounting, financial, or transaction-based systems

• Understanding of double-entry accounting concepts

• Experience validating financial reports

• Experience optimizing legacy or mature codebases



Compensation



• $1,200 USD per month

• Full-time (40 hours per week)

• Long-term, stable product role



Application Requirement 



Our SaaS system is a rebuild of an existing legacy ERP that includes a full accounting module.



To proceed with your application, please answer the following:



If you were assigned to validate that our SaaS system produces identical financial outputs (Trial Balance, Income Statement, Balance Sheet) as the legacy system, how would you structure your validation approach?



Please briefly describe:



• How you would prepare test data

• How you would compare reports between systems

• How you would detect and log mismatches

• How you would handle rounding or posting differences

• How you would prevent regression issues after fixes



Structured answers are preferred.

title: Senior Marketing Strategist (Demand Generation & Growth)
description:
Part Time with option to move to full time after initial 3 months



I run an automation agency called Designed For Results



We help service-based businesses generate more leads, improve conversion, and scale through automation, CRM systems, and workflow optimisation.



I’m now looking for someone to own and drive marketing for the business.



This is not a content role.



This is a commercial, strategy-led role focused on generating enquiries and building authority.



What you’ll be responsible for



You will own and execute the marketing strategy across:



* Organic content (social media, blogs, newsletters)

* Paid campaigns (where appropriate)

* Funnel strategy and optimisation

* Community building and engagement

* SEO and long-term inbound growth

* Website optimisation (Squarespace) to improve conversion



This includes reviewing and improving:



* messaging and positioning

* page structure and user journey

* calls to action and conversion points



Your goal is simple:



Generate consistent, qualified enquiries and position the business as a leader in its space.



About the business



Designed For Results is a business efficiency and automation agency.  



We:



* design and build custom systems in tools like GoHighLevel, Airtable and HubSpot

* automate lead capture, follow-up and internal workflows

* help businesses save time and increase revenue through better systems



Most of our clients are service-based businesses (trades, construction, and similar industries).



What I’m looking for



You must:



* Think commercially, not just creatively

* Understand how to turn messaging into enquiries

* Be able to identify and articulate strong USPs

* Know how to write hooks that stop attention and drive action

* Understand funnels and how traffic converts (not just traffic generation)

* Be confident reviewing and improving website copy and structure for conversion

* Be able to plan and execute a strategy, not just post content



This is NOT a junior role



Please do not apply if your experience is mainly:



* posting on social media

* Canva design

* following content calendars without strategy

* basic VA or admin marketing tasks



What success looks like



* Consistent inbound enquiries

* Growth in the right audience (not vanity followers)

* Clear positioning in the market

* A website that converts visitors into leads

* Content that drives action, not just engagement



Application questions (required)



Question 1



Based on what you’ve read above, what would be the first 3 things you would do to generate enquiries for this business?



Be specific.



Question 2



Describe a campaign, funnel, or strategy you have personally worked on that generated leads or revenue.



Include:



* the goal

* what you did

* what worked (and what didn’t)

* the outcome



Question 3 (important)



If a website is getting traffic but not converting into enquiries:



* what are the most likely reasons

* how would you diagnose the issue

* what would you change first



Applications that are vague, generic, or focused only on content creation will not be considered.



Bonus



* Experience marketing agencies or service-based businesses

* Strong experience combining organic and paid channels

* Experience improving website conversion rates



If you’re someone who understands how to turn attention into enquiries and can own marketing end-to-end, I’d love to hear from you.



Niki

Designed For Results

title: Photo & Content Editor
description:
We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented, and fast Photo & Content Editor to support our growing content studio.



This is a remote, structured, and ongoing role for someone who is organized, productive, creative, and able to work within a repeatable system. You will be working with photos and short videos from professional photoshoots, helping us organize, edit, and deliver content quickly and beautifully.





Part-time / Project-based with opportunity to grow



Ongoing work



Night shift / flexible availability required



Weekend availability required when needed



Compensation

$500/month for the first 2 months



$550/month for the next 2 months



$600/month for the following 2 months



$650/month ongoing after that



Responsibilities

- Download photo and video files from shared folders and shared albums



- Organize content by client and date



- Select and group usable images



- Apply basic photo editing and color correction in a clean, natural, bright style



- Maintain soft skin tones and a consistent visual aesthetic



- Prepare and export RAW / unedited files for clients



- Create simple short-form videos such as Reels and behind-the-scenes clips



- Edit short photo-based video clips, including 5 to 8 second creative clips made from still images



- Add simple AI effects to photos and videos when needed, such as soft golden rain, sparkles, flower petals, rose petals, diamonds, or other elegant visual effects



- Prepare final folders for delivery



- Upload and send completed files back to the team





Editing Style

- Clean



- Natural



- Bright



- Soft skin tones



- Consistent aesthetic across images



- No heavy or overdone editing





Workflow Expectations

- Fast turnaround is very important



- Content should be processed, edited, and organized within 24 to 48 hours



- Clear file naming and folder structure is required



- Must be able to follow systems and repeat the same workflow consistently



- Must be comfortable reporting tasks, progress, and completed work throughout the day



- Must be willing to use Hubstaff



- Must be comfortable updating the team regularly regarding every task and progress





Requirements

- Must have an Apple device so you can access and download content from shared albums easily



- Good English communication skills



- Basic experience with photo editing in Lightroom or similar software



- Basic to intermediate video editing skills for short clips and Reels



- Ability to create simple AI-enhanced visual effects for both photos and videos



- Strong attention to detail



- Reliable internet connection for large file transfers



- Ability to work nights, weekends, and be available when needed



- Reliable, fast, organized, and easy to work with





Bonus Skills

- Experience working with content creators, photographers, or lifestyle brands



- Understanding of Instagram-style visuals



- Experience organizing large volumes of content



- Creative eye for behind-the-scenes content



- Experience turning still images into short animated visual clips





Important Notes

- This is a fast, structured, and consistent workflow role



- We are looking for someone dependable who can become part of a simple and repeatable system



- Speed, communication, organization, and consistency are just as important as editing skills



To Apply

Please send:



- A short introduction



- Your experience with photo and video editing



- Examples of your work, if available



- Your availability



- Your current device setup



- Your comfort level with Lightroom, Reels, AI effects, and Hubstaff



We are looking for someone reliable, fast, creative, and easy to work with.

title: Senior Software Engineer Architect
description:
???? Senior AI / Machine Learning Engineer (Computer Vision + LLM Systems)

Company: Quicklotz (US-based, high-growth tech + logistics)

We are building AI-powered infrastructure to automate large-scale logistics, refurbishment, and resale operations.

This includes:

Computer vision systems for product identification + grading

LLM-powered pipelines for listing generation, classification, and automation

? Requirements:

Model weights / checkpoints

Fine-tuning workflows

Training vs inference pipelines

title: Freelance Graphic and Video designer for Social Media Content.
description:
Hello!



We're looking to replace our graphic designer who is slow to respond and not reliable. If you're a hard worker, with great creativity, loves great design, and wants to help us create graphics, videos, and maybe t-shirt designs please keep reading!



Here is an example of social media posts we have posted in the past and would need. 



Video 

Video 

Video 

Image 

Image 



What we are looking for:



Short-Form Motion Graphics: Proficiency in After Effects or Premiere Pro for those animated text overlays.



Social media graphics: Understands what catches people's attention. 



Quick Turnaround: We want someone who can turn from an idea into a polished graphic or video within 24 hours.



The work is project based. Some weeks we may need only one video. Sometimes we run a promotion and need a new video for that. Sometimes we need a graphic for promotion to use on
/X. 



When we need something, we will let you know. But at minimum there is at least one video a week we would need from you. Those weekly videos can have a template created once and then we provide images for you to add to it. Simple!



But sometimes we run promotions and need your creativity and skill to help us come up with something that will make people watch. We may have an idea for a t-shirt and need you to create it for us. 



No AI work please. We want designers that love what they do and can create from with their talent. If you're still reading this, put in your reply to me what your favorite movie is and what is one thing you enjoy doing if you have a day off. Also don't make your reply sound like it was copy and pasted. If it sounds boring, then we will look to another designer. 



This is a part time job. We can discuss more to make it clear as to what we're looking for. 



Please share your portfolio so we can see your previous work and also which software you're excellent at using for design. 



Thank you for reading!

title: Operations Specialist (Dispatch & Coordination)
description:
We’re looking for an  Operations Specialist (Dispatch & Coordination) to support a fast-growing operations and logistics platform that powers real-world & on the ground operations (e.g., delivery robots, on-demand moving boxes, and brand events) across the United States.



In this role, you’ll help coordinate staffing, support workers, and keep daily operations running smoothly. You’ll also monitor ongoing tasks, respond to issues, and make sure updates are shared with the team.



This role is a good fit for someone who is organized, proactive, and comfortable solving problems in a fast-moving environment.



Responsibilities

- Support daily operations by coordinating staffing needs, schedules, and operational tasks.

- Fill shifts in real time by communicating with workers and responding to last-minute staffing requests.

- Help workers with questions and make sure they have the information they need to complete their assignments.

- Communicate with clients and internal teams to keep everyone updated on staffing and operations.

- Monitor ongoing operations and flag issues early so they can be resolved quickly.

- Help coordinate day-to-day operational activities when needed (schedules, on-ground tasks, etc.)

- Track updates, schedules, and tasks in internal systems.

- Assist with onboarding and documentation.

- Work with the operations team to improve workflows and processes.

- Create or update SOPs and checklists to help keep operations organized.

- Support operations during busy periods, including weekends when needed.



Requirements:

- 3+ years experience in operations support, staffing coordination, dispatch, customer support, or similar roles.

- 1+ year WFH experience working directly with US-based clients.

- Team Lead or Subject Matter Expert experience preferred.

- Experience in startups or fast-growing companies is a plus.

- Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail.

- Comfortable handling multiple tasks at the same time.

- Able to stay calm, solve problems, and quickly learn new tools and processes in a fast-moving environment.

- Experience using tools such as Google Workspace, Slack, Airtable, Notion, or similar systems.

- Self-starter who asks questions, takes ownership, and looks for ways to improve processes.

- Experience in staffing platforms, marketplaces, logistics coordination, or operations support is a plus.

- Available to work weekends when needed.

- Able to work on a graveyard shift aligned with US business hours.

- Must have a stable internet connection and a reliable work-from-home setup.

- Base salary: 55,000 PHP per month

- 100% remote / work-from-home

- DTC Background: Proven track record working with Direct-to-Consumer brands, with a deep understanding of the "performance creative" ecosystem.

title: IT Support Engineer (MSP)
description:
IT Support Engineer (MSP) – Remote | Ownership, Not Tickets



Location: Remote

Type: Part-time (20 hours/week to start) with potential to grow to full-time

Hours: 10am–2pm UK

Pay: £6 per hour



About the Role:

This isn’t a typical IT support position. You won’t be stuck in a helpdesk queue, passing tickets, or limited to a narrow task list. Instead, you’ll take full ownership of multiple IT environments, solving problems end-to-end and proactively improving systems. We’re looking for someone who asks, “How can this be better?” rather than “That’s not my job.”



Key Responsibilities:

Administer, troubleshoot, and optimize Microsoft 365 (Exchange, SharePoint, Teams, Entra ID)

Support Windows desktops and basic server environments

Manage networking tasks: DNS, DHCP, VPNs, Wi-Fi, and firewalls

Implement cybersecurity improvements and best practices

Assist with onboarding new users and migrations

Communicate directly with users in plain English, not IT jargon

Proactively review systems, identify gaps, and improve environments even when things are quiet



What We’re Looking For:

A well-rounded IT professional comfortable across the full IT stack

Someone who solves problems fully and takes ownership until resolved

Strong understanding that security is part of everything

Ability to work independently, troubleshoot complex issues, and figure things out

Proactive mindset during downtime; reviewing, optimizing, and improving systems



Required Skills & Experience:

Previous experience in IT support or MSP environments

Strong Microsoft 365 knowledge (essential)

Experience with Entra ID & Intune

Solid Windows desktop and basic server support

Strong networking fundamentals

Excellent problem-solving and communication skills with non-technical users



Nice-to-Have (Bonuses):

Google Workspace experience

macOS knowledge

Cybersecurity frameworks (e.g., Cyber Essentials)

Backup and disaster recovery experience

RMM/PSA tool experience



Hours & Growth:

Start with 20 hours per week (10am–2pm UK)

Opportunity to increase to full-time as the role grows

Long-term role with strong progression potential



Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

Modern, serviceable computer (e.g., Windows 11, i5+, 16GB RAM minimum)

Stable, high-speed internet connection

Secure, dedicated workspace

Applicants must provide PC specs and an internet speed screenshot



Why You’ll Love This Role:

Varied and challenging work; no two days are the same

Real autonomy and ownership

Opportunity to impact IT systems directly and improve efficiency

Exposure to business decisions and technology projects

A role where your input matters, not just following scripts



What This Role Isn’t:

Not a call center

Not a “stick to your lane” job

Not a role where you hide behind tickets



How to Apply:

Use “Vixa Hire” in the subject line of your application.

Send your resume and cover letter.

Include your internet speed test result and a screenshot of your laptop specs.

We look forward to receiving your application.

title: Online Operations & Systems VA (Project to part-time)
description:
About the Role

I'm the owner of an online Pilates and movement studio for women 50+. We've been in business since 2012 with a strong social media presence, an active membership community, and our members access classes and programs through our own app and membership platform. We're currently in an exciting growth and relaunch phase.

I need someone who thrives in organized chaos — someone who can look at a busy, fast-moving online business and bring structure, clarity, and follow-through.

This starts as a paid test project and grows into a part-time ongoing role if we're a great fit.



Who I'm Looking For

You are NOT just a task-taker. You're a systems thinker. You notice what's missing, you follow up without being asked, and you don't let things fall through the cracks. You're the person who reads a messy brain dump and turns it into a clean, organized plan.

You also work well with a creative, fast-moving founder who has a lot of ideas — and you know how to keep things on track without slowing things down.



Phase 1 - Paid Test Project

(No logins required)

You'll receive a business overview document and your job is to:



Read and fully understand the business

Map out what exists, what's missing, and what needs attention

Build a simple, clean project tracker or system overview

Identify gaps and flag anything that looks like a leak





Phase 2 - Part-Time Ongoing

(If Phase 1 goes well)



Oversee and document backend systems (Zapier, Kit/ConvertKit, membership platform, website)

Map funnels — what connects to what, where links go, what's working

Keep projects and tasks organized across the team

Check in on ongoing tasks so nothing gets dropped

Potentially manage and coordinate with one other VA





Skills and Tools

Required:



Zapier

Kit / ConvertKit

ManyChat

Metricool

Squarespace (basic understanding)

 and Instagram

Numbers (Apple)

Arketa (basic knowledge — can be learned)

Organized AF — we don't care what tool you use, just that nothing slips



Bonus / Growth:



Basic video editing, compressing and uploading

Canva

TikTok and YouTube (basic platform understanding)





You're a Great Fit If:



You are hyper-detail oriented — nothing slips past you

You're proactive, not reactive

You can manage up — meaning you'll follow up with me if needed

You communicate clearly and consistently





This Is Not a Fit If:



You need constant direction to stay on task

You disappear when things get quiet

You say yes to everything and follow through on nothing





Pay and Hours



Phase 1: Flat project rate of $30-$50 (approximately 3-5 hours)

Phase 2: 5-10 hours per week at $6-$10 per hour, growing over time

Rate reflects experience — the right person will be paid accordingly

I'd love to build a long-term working relationship with natural growth on both sides





To Apply



Put the word PURPLE in your subject line — if it's missing your application will not be reviewed

Send a 2-3 minute talking head video (Loom or similar) and include your Loom link directly in your application message. Your video should cover:



Who you are — and something personal about you. You're a real person and I'd love to get a sense of who that is beyond your resume

How you use AI in your work (if you do) and where you draw the line

Why this role interests you



Applications without a video will not be considered.



Looking forward to meeting you,

Jillian H.

title: Amazon FBA Online Arbitrage Virtual Assistant (Ungated Product Sourcing Specialist)
description:
Job Title: Amazon FBA Online Arbitrage Virtual Assistant (Ungated Product Sourcing Specialist)

Job Type: Part-Time / Full-Time (Flexible)

Pay: $2–$3/hour (based on experience and performance)



Job Description:



We are looking for an experienced Amazon FBA Virtual Assistant who specializes in online arbitrage product sourcing, with a strong focus on ungated products suitable for newer Amazon seller accounts.



The ideal candidate understands how to consistently find profitable, low-risk products that can be sold without approval issues, and has prior experience working with new or ungated Amazon accounts.



Responsibilities:

 • Source profitable products through online arbitrage

 • Focus strictly on ungated, low-risk products

 • Analyze deals using Keepa and SellerAmp (SAS)

 • Ensure products meet profitability criteria (ROI, profit margin, sales rank, competition)

 • Avoid brands/suppliers with high risk of IP complaints or Amazon policy issues

 • Submit daily/weekly product leads with full data (cost, profit, ROI, BSR, etc.)



Requirements:

 • Minimum 1–2 years of Amazon FBA product sourcing experience

 • Proven experience working with new or ungated Amazon seller accounts

 • Strong proficiency in Keepa and SellerAmp

 • Ability to read and interpret Keepa charts accurately

 • Solid understanding of Amazon fees, restrictions, and risk management

 • Reliable, consistent, and detail-oriented

 • Good communication skills



Application Requirements (MANDATORY):

To be considered, you must include ALL of the following:

 • Your updated resume

 • Examples of previous work (product leads, spreadsheets, sourcing reports, etc.)

 • 1–2+ client feedbacks or references from previous employers

(If your profile does not already include client feedback, you must provide this manually)



Applications that do NOT include ALL of the above will be automatically skipped.



Application Process:

 • Submit your application with the required documents

 • If shortlisted, you will be asked to record a 1–2 minute video demonstrating your product sourcing process (live or recorded workflow)

About Us

The Role

title: AI Graphic Design - FB Ads, Ecommerce, Dropshipping
description:
We run a fast-growing d2c apparel brand selling globally. Our products move through aggressive paid social — primarily
 and Instagram — and we scale fast when we find creative that works.

We test a lot. We move quickly. And we need someone who can keep up.



The Role

We need a graphic designer who can produce high-converting static and mixed-media ad creatives and landing page assets — fast, clean, and built for direct response. This isn’t a brand awareness role. Every asset you create is designed to stop a scroll and drive a click.



You’ll be working primarily with AI image generation tools (nano banana etc) alongside Photoshop, Canva, or Figma to produce polished, ready-to-run deliverables.



What You’ll Be Producing

•
 and Instagram static ad creatives (single image, carousel)

• Landing page hero images, product shots, and section graphics

• Ad creative variations for split testing (hook images, overlays, text treatments)

• Lifestyle-style product images using AI generation + retouching

• Thumbnail and graphic support for video ads

• Occasional
 header graphics and promotional banners



What We Need From You

Non-negotiable:

• Proven experience with AI image generation tools (nano banano or similiar)

• Strong Photoshop or equivalent skills — AI output always needs finishing

• Portfolio showing real ad creatives or ecommerce assets (not just portfolio pieces)

• Ability to work within a brand — not just produce pretty things

• Fast turnaround. We brief, you execute. Two-day cycles are standard.

• Clear communication on timelines. If something’s going to be late, we hear about it before the deadline — not after.



Highly regarded:

• Experience in direct response, performance marketing, or ecommerce creative

• Exposure to
 ad creative — knows what makes an image stop a scroll

• Dropshipping or DTC brand background

• Comfortable with ClickUp or similar project management tools



How We Work

We brief in ClickUp. Deliverables go back through ClickUp. Revisions are handled fast. We don’t micromanage — but we do expect ownership of tasks and deadlines.

This starts as a project-based engagement. If output quality and reliability are there, it grows into an ongoing weekly role.



Before You Apply — Answer These Three Questions

Include your answers in your application. No exceptions.



1. What AI image tools do you use? Walk us through how you go from a brief to a final ad creative — what’s your actual process?

2. Share one ad creative you made that you think actually worked commercially. Why do you think it worked?

3. What’s the difference between a design that looks good and a design that converts?



To Apply

Send us the following:

• Your portfolio — specifically any ad creatives, ecommerce assets, or AI-generated image work

• Your answers to the three questions above

• Your availability and typical turnaround time for a standard ad creative brief



We don’t read cover letters. We read portfolios and answers. Show us the work.



One last thing: to confirm you’ve read this listing in full, begin your application with the word BIRD. Applications that don’t include it won’t be reviewed.



Position starts at 20hrs $700usd pro rata per month. 



Opportunity for long term 40hrs per week full time work for the right person

title: Growth Marketer
description:
Company Overview

Kalaidoscope is a web development and growth marketing agency built for founders — the ones with a real vision and not enough hours in the day. We build fast, think like operators, and use modern technology and AI to give small businesses the kind of execution that used to require a much bigger team.







Role Overview

We're looking for a Growth Marketer who lives and breathes numbers, results, and relentless experimentation.



You're the kind of person who checks campaign performance before coffee. You don't just set up an ad and hope — you test, iterate, analyze, and optimize until the numbers move. You care about CAC, CTR, ROAS, conversion rates, and traffic trends not because someone told you to, but because you genuinely find it interesting. You think in funnels. You get excited about a good A/B test. You treat every channel as a hypothesis worth proving.



This is a hybrid strategy-and-execution role. You'll help shape the marketing approach for our clients and then go build it. Paid ads, organic content, SEO, lead gen — you're comfortable across all of it and you know how to prioritize based on where the biggest growth levers are.



What You'll Work On

- Plan, launch, and relentlessly optimize paid campaigns across Google, LinkedIn, Meta, and other relevant platforms — owning targeting, copy, creative direction, bidding strategy, and budget pacing

- Track and report on performance metrics across all channels, with a clear point of view on what's working, what's not, and what to do next

- Run structured experiments — A/B tests, creative variations, audience segments, landing page tests — and document learnings

- Build and manage organic social presence with a content cadence designed to drive real engagement and audience growth, not just impressions

- Conduct SEO and content research — keyword analysis, competitive audits, content gap identification — and turn that research into an actionable content strategy

- Design and execute lead generation systems: lead magnets, landing pages,
 sequences, and top-of-funnel campaigns that convert

- Support founder content strategy — helping position founders as credible, visible voices in their space through LinkedIn and short-form content

- Assist with sales enablement copy and outreach strategy as needed





Must-Haves

- 1–3+ years of hands-on growth marketing or digital marketing experience

- You've managed paid ad campaigns — Google and/or Meta — not just watched someone else do it

- Deeply comfortable with performance data — you know how to read it, interpret it, and act on it

- Strong grasp of SEO fundamentals and experience with research tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, or Google Search Console

- A testing mindset — you form hypotheses, run experiments, and learn from both wins and failures

- Strong writer — you can write ad copy, social content, and
 that actually gets clicks

- Self-directed and organized — you manage your own time, flag blockers early, and deliver without being chased

- Clear communicator





Nice-to-Haves

Experience with LinkedIn Ads

Agency or multi-client background

Familiarity with
 marketing platforms (Brevo, Mailchimp, Klaviyo, etc.)

Experience supporting personal brand or founder-led content

Comfort with AI tools for marketing research, content, and workflows

Bonus points if you've ever built a funnel from scratch and tracked it all the way through to conversion



Role Details

Part-time contract, project-based

Fully remote, flexible schedule 

Room to grow as client volume increases

About Us

We are a fast-growing company dedicated to helping health, fitness, and nutrition professionals start and scale successful online businesses.

Our flagship product is a content and meal planning software designed to help coaches create high-quality content for both client success and marketing growth. Through mentorship, tools, and done-for-you resources, we empower coaches to build profitable, impactful businesses.



About the Role

We’re looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Executive Assistant who thrives in a dynamic environment.



This role includes a mix of:

- Recurring weekly responsibilities

- Project-based tasks that evolve throughout the year



You’ll play a key role in keeping operations running smoothly while supporting growth initiatives across the business.

, replays)

Qualifications

- Availability for 1–2 weekly meetings at 8:30 AM PST

What We’re Looking For

- Wants to grow with a company long-term

.

If you’re someone who loves organization, supporting growth, and being part of a mission-driven business in the wellness space, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Expert Social Media Manager (Remote)
description:
About GlowMD

GlowMD is a fast-growing luxury medical spa in Texas specializing in wellness, aesthetics, IV hydration, and medical weight loss treatments. Our mission is to provide premium, patient-focused care while building a strong and trusted online presence that educates, inspires, and converts potential clients into loyal patients.



We are looking for a creative and marketing-driven Content & Social Media Assistant who understands how to create engaging content that attracts attention, builds trust, and generates leads.



Role Overview

This position is ideal for someone with a social media and digital marketing background who can create compelling content, write engaging captions, and help convert online interest into real patient inquiries.



You will play a key role in building GlowMD’s online presence and supporting our patient acquisition efforts through strategic content and engagement.



Responsibilities

• Content Creation

• Create and post content on Instagram,
, and TikTok

• Write engaging captions designed to educate and convert leads

• Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok)

• Design simple graphics or post layouts

• Repurpose content across multiple platforms



Marketing & Lead Generation

• Create content that drives inquiries and bookings

• Write marketing-style captions and strong call-to-actions

• Support promotional campaigns for treatments

• Turn educational posts into lead-generating content



Blog Writing

• Write up to 5 blog posts per week

• Topics include wellness, aesthetics, patient education, and treatments

• Community Engagement

• Respond to DMs, comments, and messages

• Help nurture conversations that may convert to patients

• Support online community engagement



Content Planning

• Assist with weekly content calendars

• Suggest marketing ideas and trending content formats



Future Projects

• Assist with content for courses, webinars, and digital programs



Requirements

• Previous experience in social media management or digital marketing

• Strong writing and marketing copy skills

• Experience creating engaging and persuasive captions

• Basic video editing skills (Reels / TikTok)

• Organized, reliable, and responsive

•  Comfortable working with content schedules and deadlines

• Experience in health, wellness, beauty, or aesthetics is a plus



Compensation

$5.50 per hour

Remote position



Trial Period:

Shortlisted candidates will complete a 5-day paid trial to evaluate content quality, creativity, reliability, and communication.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

• Consistent content posting

• 5 blog posts per week

• Growth in engagement

• Increased inquiries and leads

• Fast response time to messages



How to Apply

Please send:

• Your resume

• Links to social media accounts you have managed

• Writing or content samples

• A brief explanation of your content creation process



We are looking for someone who understands how to create engaging content that converts interest into real clients. We can't wait to meet you!

description:
???? About the Role

We’re looking for a Creative Director who lives and breathes ideas — someone who understands how to turn attention into action through storytelling, hooks, and powerful visuals.



You’ll be leading creative direction for our real estate and Airbnb education campaigns, helping us produce scroll-stopping ads that inspire people to learn how to build cash flow using creative real estate strategies.



Your role will be to brainstorm, strategize, and direct the production of high-converting ad creatives — using AI tools, competitor research, and creative experimentation.



If you’re the kind of person who loves to say, 'Let’s try this angle…' and thrives in a high-speed, testing-driven marketing environment, this is your dream role.

???? Key Responsibilities

- Lead creative direction for ad campaigns across
, Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok

- Develop unique hooks, scripts, and storyboards for video ads targeting real estate and Airbnb audiences

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, Runway, etc.) to brainstorm, write, and design ad ideas

- Research and model top-performing competitor ads, then test multiple creative iterations daily

- Direct designers and editors to ensure ad visuals match marketing angles

- Constantly analyze ad performance, iterate quickly, and double down on winners

- Keep a pulse on market trends, viral formats, and what’s working in short-form video

- Collaborate with marketing and media buying teams to align creative strategy with data insights

???? Tools & Skills You’ll Use

- ChatGPT / Claude / Perplexity – for copy and idea generation

- Midjourney / Leonardo / Runway / Pika Labs – for AI visual and video creation

- CapCut / After Effects / Premiere Pro – for video editing and storyboarding

- Canva / Photoshop / Figma – for ad design mockups

- Meta Ads Library, TikTok Creative Center – for competitor and trend research

- Google Drive, Slack, Notion, Sheets – for collaboration and tracking

???? Ideal Candidate Traits

- Creative thinker who’s not afraid to test bold ideas

- Understands marketing psychology and how to craft attention-grabbing hooks

- Knows how to analyze ad performance and optimize creatives

- Passion for AI tools and staying on the cutting edge of creative tech

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, testing-heavy environment

- Experience in real estate, finance, or education-based marketing (preferred)

- Can produce or direct multiple ad concepts per day

- Excited to bring imagination + structure to a creative process that drives measurable results

???? Compensation & Perks

- Base Pay: Competitive (depending on experience)

- Bonuses & Incentives: Based on ad performance (CPA, CTR, ROAS improvements)

- Schedule: Flexible hours (EST overlap preferred)

- Payments: Bi-weekly via Wise or PayPal

- Long-term opportunity to lead a creative team as we scale

- Access to AI tools, mentorship, and ad spend data for testing and experimentation

- Freedom to experiment, fail fast, and innovate

???? How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. A 1–2 minute video introducing yourself and your creative philosophy

2. A link to your portfolio or previous ad creatives (especially video ads)

3. A short breakdown of how you approach creating hooks or ad angles

4. List AI tools you’ve used for creative work (visuals, scripts, editing, etc.)

5. Optional: Include an example of a real estate or education ad you admire and why it works

???? Questions

1. What AI tools have you used for ad creation or creative ideation?

2. How do you come up with and validate hooks for paid ads?

3. What’s your process for modeling competitor ads and making them original?

4. How many ad variations do you think should be tested weekly?

5. Do you have experience working in real estate, education, or online marketing industries?

6. What’s your favorite current ad format or style on TikTok or Meta?

7. Why do you think you’re a strong fit for a creative leadership role like this?

title: Airbnb Virtual Assistant (Guest Management + Operations + Tech & AI Tools Expert)
description:
???? About the Role

We’re looking for a smart, tech-savvy, and reliable Airbnb Virtual Assistant to help manage multiple short-term rental properties. This role combines guest management, cleaner coordination, calendar control, operations oversight, and automation management — all while using AI tools to improve efficiency.



This is a mostly passive role — you won’t be working nonstop throughout the day, but you must remain available and responsive to guests, cleaners, and management during your shift. During certain times, you’ll handle active tasks such as confirming cleanings, managing stock orders, or adjusting automations.

???? Responsibilities

Guest & Booking Management:

- Respond quickly and professionally to guest messages (via Airbnb app or desktop)

- Send check-in instructions, access codes, and digital house manuals

- Handle guest issues calmly and coordinate with cleaners or maintenance as needed

- Manage all property calendars across Airbnb, VRBO, and 

- Request 5-star reviews and manage public review responses

Operations, Cleaners & Calendar Management:

- Oversee cleaning schedules — assign, confirm, and track cleanings for each property

- Maintain cleaning and laundry logs, including payments and confirmations

- Monitor and manage the Airbnb calendar to prevent double-bookings

- Track maintenance and repairs, coordinating with appropriate service providers

- Order and restock supplies (toiletries, linens, kitchen essentials) when inventory runs low

- Maintain and update property operations dashboard

Tech, AI & Automation Management:

- Use ChatGPT or other AI tools to generate message templates, reports, and follow-ups

- Manage and optimize automations inside Hospitable, Zapier, or GoHighLevel

- Set up workflows for guest messages, cleaner notifications, and internal alerts

- Maintain Google Sheets or Notion dashboards for reports and automated summaries

- Research and recommend new AI tools to improve communication, operations, and efficiency

Admin & Reporting:

- Maintain occupancy, revenue, and expense reports

- Generate weekly summaries with key insights

- Track cleaning payments, restock expenses, and operational costs

- Assist with refining internal SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

???? Availability & Schedule

• Must be available between 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM EST (Eastern Standard Time)

• Majority of hours are passive availability (you won’t always be actively working but must remain reachable)

• Some active work periods required (cleaning coordination, reporting, updates)

• Weekend availability required (guest check-ins/check-outs, cleaning follow-ups)

• Must stay responsive via phone or messaging apps during assigned hours

? Requirements

• 1–2 years of experience managing Airbnb or short-term rentals (VA or co-host preferred)

• Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken)

• Reliable high-speed internet and backup data plan

• Tech-savvy and comfortable using AI and automation tools

• Strong organizational and problem-solving skills

• Calm, professional, and dependable under pressure

• Capable of multitasking across guest messages, cleaner coordination, and reports

???? Tools You’ll Use (or Learn Quickly)

Airbnb, VRBO, 
, Hospitable, Guesty, Hostaway, ChatGPT, Zapier, GoHighLevel, Pricelabs, Google Sheets, Notion, Slack

???? Compensation & Perks

• $600/month, paid bi-weekly and prorated

• Mostly passive work — minimal active hours but high responsiveness required

• Performance bonuses for guest satisfaction and reliability

• Paid training on new tools and automation systems

• Long-term opportunity with potential to grow into Operations Manager

• Supportive team, flexible hours, and streamlined systems

???? How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. A 1–2 minute video introduction about yourself and your experience

2. A short overview of your Airbnb or hospitality VA background

3. Tell us about an AI or tech tool you’ve used to improve your workflow

4. Describe how you handled a guest issue or emergency successfully

???? Questions

1. What is your internet speed, and do you have a backup connection?

2. Have you managed Airbnb properties before? If yes, how many?

3. Are you available between 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM EST, including weekends?

4. How comfortable are you using Airbnb, ChatGPT, and Google Sheets?

5. How do you typically handle guest complaints or last-minute problems?

6. What apps or tools do you use to stay responsive while working remotely?

7. How do you stay organized managing multiple properties, cleaners, and calendars?

8. Why do you believe you’re a great fit for this role?

title: Business Executive Assistant (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
We are a family business in Charlotte, North Carolina, USA. We run a real estate investment business. We need a reliable, detail-oriented, and proactive virtual assistant to support our business operations and occasionally manage our household logistics.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with us and become indispensable — not a short-term gig. We are looking for someone who takes initiative, follows through without reminders, and brings solutions instead of problems.

Hours & Pay



- Targeting 40 hours/week (8 hours/day, Mon–Fri, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM EST)

- Will start with reduced hours as you prove yourself we will increase you to 40 hours.

- $6–7/hr USD

- Paid holidays + PTO after 90 days



What You Will Do



Business Operations:



- Daily CRM hygiene and lead tracking (ForeFront and REsimpli)

-
 triage and management across multiple inboxes

- Weekly KPI scorecard updates

- Contractor and vendor coordination for active renovation projects

- Transaction coordinator support on active wholesale deals

- Social media monitoring and scheduling

- QuickBooks mileage and expense logging

- Monthly property manager statement review

- Research and admin support as needed



Personal & Household:



- Manage family calendar including appointments, reminders, drive time blocks, and scheduling conflicts

- Track medical and HSA expenses in Google Sheets and organize receipts in Google Drive

- Research and book restaurants, gifts, and appointments

- Make calls to US businesses on our behalf



Requirements



- 2+ years VA or executive assistant experience — personal/household experience strongly preferred

- Strong written and spoken English — must be comfortable on calls with US businesses and vendors

- Proficient with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Drive)

- Experience with CRM systems a plus (ForeFront, REsimpli, or similar)

- Accounting or bookkeeping background a strong plus

- Reliable high-speed internet — minimum 25 Mbps with ethernet connection capability. This is a hard requirement.

- Quiet, professional workspace

- Trustworthy with personal, financial, and family information



Who You Are



- You notice what needs to be done before being asked

- You bring solutions, not just problems

- You follow through on every commitment without reminders

- You communicate proactively — if something is taking longer than expected, you say so before it becomes a problem

- You are organized, fast-learning, and genuinely enjoy making someone's life easier

- You want to be with us for 2+ years and grow as the business grows



How to Apply



Do NOT reply here. Fill out our application form:





The form takes 20–30 minutes and includes a short scenario task and a short video recording. Only applications submitted through the form will be considered.



Please answer this question in your application: Describe a specific time you identified a problem or task your employer didn't ask you about and handled it independently. What did you do and what was the outcome?

title: Full-Cycle Video Producer (Canva/CapCut/Premiere) – HVAC/Roofing FULL-TIME 9-5 EST
description:
We are seeking a highly detail-oriented Video Producer to manage end-to-end short-form video creation for HVAC clients.

This role goes beyond basic editing — we need someone who can research, script, source footage, and produce polished final videos with AI voiceovers and dynamic captions.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Creative Scripting: Draft engaging scripts based on a provided hook and call-to-action (CTA). Structure videos for high engagement and lead generation.

-Advanced Sourcing: Research client websites to find and scrape footage from their
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

-Asset Collection: Source HVAC equipment photos from our brand folders (Canva or Google Drive) or manufacturer websites.

-Local B-Roll Research: Find relevant city and service-area footage from Google or YouTube.

-Voiceover & Audio Production: Use ElevenLabs for all voiceovers. You must be experienced in voice grooming (phonetic spelling, aliases, or dashes) to ensure zero mispronunciations.

-Technical Accuracy: Ensure correct pronunciation of HVAC terms such as SEER, AFUE, BTUs and specific city or service area names.

-Dynamic Captions: Create word-for-word captions highlighted in Yellow and positioned in safe zones (mid-screen) so they are not covered by social media interface elements.



QUALITY & PAYMENT POLICY:

-Accuracy Standard: You are expected to deliver a high-quality first draft. Revisions required due to failure to follow instructions (incorrect phone number, wrong caption color, mispronounced terms, missing assets, etc.) must be corrected promptly.

-Billable Work: Additional payment will only be provided if the client changes the original scope or script after the first approved version.



REQUIREMENTS:

-Expert-level CapCut or Premiere Pro skills.

-Strong Canva experience.

-Pro-level familiarity with ElevenLabs including aliases, phonetic spelling, and pronunciation control.

-Strong English writing skills for technical HVAC scripting.

-Ability to deliver final video assets in three formats:

9:16 (Vertical)

1:1 (Square)

16:9 (Landscape)



HOW TO APPLY:

-Please start your proposal with "HVAC YELLOW" to verify you have read the full brief. 

-Provide 2–3 samples of your best short-form video work featuring dynamic captions and AI voiceovers.

-IF do not have portfolio showcasing work in our niche or prior experience creating HVAC/Plumbing or Roofing video ads, we’d like you to complete a short test project so we can properly evaluate your design skills, creativity, ability to follow directions, and understanding of ad structure.

-ASK: SEND ME TEST

- DO NOT submit your resume or any Figma or websites files as these are not considered as proof of your qualifications. SEND ONLY google drive or canva links to your previous work.

title: Video Editor
description:
About QVM Digital Marketing

QVM Digital Marketing Inc. is a remote-first digital marketing agency based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, serving businesses and non-profits across Canada. We help our clients grow through SEO, website design and development, social media, content creation, and business sales strategies. We're a lean, driven team that takes pride in doing great work for great clients.



Role Overview

We're looking for a skilled and creative Part-Time Video Editor to join the QVM team. In this role, you'll be responsible for editing short-form and long-form video content for QVM's own brand and for our clients. This includes social media reels, promotional videos, testimonial clips, ad creatives, and educational content.



You'll work closely with our content team and report directly to the CEO. This is a flexible, remote role ideal for someone who is self-motivated, detail-oriented, and passionate about creating video content that actually converts.



Key Responsibilities

Edit raw video footage into polished, brand-aligned content for social media platforms including Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube

Produce short-form content such as Reels, Stories, and TikToks with captions, transitions, and on-brand visual elements

Create and edit promotional and ad creative videos for paid ad campaigns (Meta Ads, Google Ads)

Add motion graphics, lower thirds, subtitles, and callouts as needed

Edit on-camera spokesperson videos in a clean, direct, and engaging style

Assist with video content for client projects as assigned

Organize and maintain video asset files in a shared folder system

Deliver files in the correct formats and specs for each platform

Receive feedback and revisions professionally and turn them around within agreed timelines

Stay current on social media video trends, editing styles, and platform algorithm preferences



Qualifications

2+ years of video editing experience, professional or freelance

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, or similar editing software

Strong understanding of short-form video content for social media (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

Experience editing talking-head or on-camera spokesperson content

Basic motion graphics and text animation skills (Adobe After Effects or built-in platform tools)

Strong eye for visual storytelling, pacing, and brand consistency

Reliable internet connection and a professional remote work setup

Ability to meet deadlines with minimal supervision

Strong communication skills; comfortable giving and receiving feedback



Nice to Have

Experience editing video ads for trades, contractors, or professional services

Familiarity with direct-response video style and ad creative best practices

Basic colour grading and audio mixing skills

Experience working within a digital marketing or creative agency

Portfolio of client or brand video work



What We Offer

Flexible part-time hours -- you manage your own schedule

Fully remote, work-from-anywhere setup

Collaborative, supportive team culture

Opportunity to grow your portfolio across multiple industries

Potential to grow into a full-time role as the agency scales

title: B2B Sales VA
description:
We are a U.S.-based wholesale distribution business selling office and janitorial supplies to businesses across the state of Florida. With access to 500+ brands, we offer competitive bulk pricing that often beats major suppliers like Staples, Office Depot, and Amazon.



The Sales Virtual Assistant is responsible for supporting business growth through lead generation, outreach, and customer acquisition. This role focuses on identifying prospective clients, engaging decision-makers, and promoting wholesale office and janitorial supply solutions.



The position involves cold calling,
 outreach, follow-up, and closing support to maintain a consistent pipeline of qualified opportunities. The Sales Virtual Assistant plays a critical role in driving revenue while maintaining organized communication and delivering a high standard of professionalism.



Responsibilities:

 - Research and build lists of potential business customers

 - Reach out via cold calling,
, and messaging

 - Pitch our pricing and product offerings clearly

 - Handle objections and follow up with prospects

 - Keep track of leads and conversations

 - Work towards closing deals or setting up qualified buyers



What You’ll Be Selling

You will be offering office and janitorial supplies that every business already uses, such as:

 - Cleaning products

-  Paper goods

 - Office supplies

-  Breakroom supplies



What We’re Looking For

- Strong English communication (spoken & written)

- Experience in B2B Sales 

- Confident speaking with U.S. businesses

- Sales, cold calling, or lead generation experience preferred

- Ability to handle rejection and stay consistent

- Self-motivated and goal-driven



Compensation will be discussed upon interviewing



IF YOU ARE INTERESTED IN THIS POSITION, PLEASE INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING IN YOUR APPLICATION



What is your previous experience in B2B Sales? Please explain in detail.



What is your favorite activity outside of work, and why?

title: Short Term Rental Property Manager
description:
Overview:

We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant to support our property management operations. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in client and tenant management, maintenance coordination, and administrative tasks. Experience with short-term rentals is required, and mid-term and co-living rental experience is strongly preferred. Knowledge of property management software is required, especially in the short term rental space. 



This is a remote that requires 6 to 8 hours of work per day, with an opportunity for more pay, time and responsibilities depending on performance. We are aggressively looking to expand the business so there is opportunity for growth within the first year and beyond. This company is also heavily incentive-based, with multiple bonus programs based on project or task completion.



Key Responsibilities:

Guest Management:

- Handle tenant inquiries, lease agreements, and communication regarding property-related issues.

- Intimate knowledge of systems and processes relevant to short term rental management

- Track tenant payments, issues, and documentation.

- Assist with tenant screening, move-in/move-out processes, and lease renewals.

- Proactively anticipating needs of tenants and guests with a service and hospitality-driven mindset



Maintenance Management:

- Coordinate maintenance and repair requests, ensuring timely resolution of issues.

- Work with cleaners, vendors, and maintenance teams to ensure efficient service delivery.

- Maintain records of work orders and repairs.



Client Management:

- Maintain regular communication with property owners and potential clients.

- Provide updates on property performance, tenant issues, and upcoming lease renewals.

- Assist in the onboarding of new clients and tenants, ensuring smooth transitions and client satisfaction.

- Proactively anticipating needs of clients with a service and hospitality-driven mindset



Bookkeeping & Accounting (strongly preferred, but not required):

- Assist with rent collection, invoicing, and managing payments.

- Maintain financial records and assist in reconciling accounts as needed.

- Track expenses and provide regular updates to management regarding the financial status of properties.



General Administrative Tasks:

- Expert knowledge of AI tools strongly preferred

- Support and maintain systems and processes specific to short-term rental and mid-term rental management, including property management software, Airbnb, Furnished Finder and other platforms.

- Manage and organize documents, contracts, and property records.

- Schedule appointments and coordinate virtual property showings or inspections.

- Assist in drafting and responding to
s, phone calls, and other correspondence as needed.



Software Management:

- Utilize property management software tools to streamline operations and keep records up to date.



Digital Marketing (Preferred but Not Required):

- Support social media marketing efforts to build the brand, attract potential tenants and promote properties.

- Assist in crafting content and updating social media channels as needed.



Qualifications:

Experience:

- Proven experience in STR property management or real estate support roles required.

- Strong knowledge of property management software tools (e.g., GHL, 
, RentRedi, Hospitable, etc.) is strongly preferred.

- Experience in short-term, mid-term and co-living rentals is strongly preferred



Skills:

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills (strong English proficiency required).

- Technically savvy and comfortable learning and using new software tools.

- Strong organizational and time management skills with the ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously.

- Ability to proactively identify challenges and find effective solutions.



Soft Skills:

- Extremely organized and detail-oriented.

- Ability to work independently and manage tasks without direct supervision.

- Ability to ask questions for guidance when necessary.

- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to think critically.

- High level of professionalism and strong interpersonal skills.



Hours:



6 to 8 hours per day, with flexibility in scheduling based on needs. Opportunity to increase pay and time depending on performance.



Compensation:

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- Bonus commissions available for every successful client acquisition, tenant placement and other bonus incentives



How to Apply:

Please send your resume and a self-recorded video link answering the following questions. If you don't have experience for a particular answer, that's fine. Simply move on to the next question.



Describe one underperforming short-term rental you managed. What were the key metrics you reviewed, what changes did you make, and what were the results in the following weeks/months?



A guest messages at 9:45 PM saying the home isn’t clean. What is your immediate response, and what specific steps do you take in the next hour?



Share a time you sensed a guest was unhappy before they directly complained. What were the signs, and how did you handle it?



An owner says occupancy is down 12% in the last 2 months and blames management. How do you respond, and what data do you reference?



What is one system or process you built or significantly improved in an STR operation? What was the problem, what did you change, and what improved?



What PMS, channel managers, and pricing tools have you used? How do you set up a new property from start to fully operational inside a PMS?



What operational differences exist between short-term rentals and midterm or rent-by-the-room models? What changes in screening, policies, or systems?



If managing 20 properties, how do you structure your daily and weekly workflow to prevent dropped tasks?



If bookings are slow 21 days out, what steps do you take before lowering price?



Describe a situation where you escalated an issue to an owner. Why did you escalate instead of resolving it yourself?



What makes you stand out from other interested candidates?



Ask any questions you have about the role?

About Us

title: Senior Automation & CRM Specialist (GoHighLevel / HubSpot / Airtable / Basecamp)
description:
I run an automation agency building end-to-end systems for service-based businesses.



This role is for someone who can design and build real systems, not just execute tasks.



Core tech stack



You must have strong, hands-on experience with:



* GoHighLevel (advanced workflows, triggers, conditions, pipelines)

* HubSpot (CRM structure, lifecycle stages, workflows)

* Airtable (data structuring and automation support)

* Basecamp (project delivery and client collaboration)



What you’ll be doing



* Designing and building automation systems for client accounts

* Structuring CRMs, pipelines, and lifecycle workflows

* Building lead capture, quoting, and follow-up systems

* Creating multi-step workflows with conditional logic

* Troubleshooting broken or inefficient automations



Internal systems & project delivery (major part of the role):



* Setting up and managing projects inside Basecamp

* Rolling out Basecamp as our core project delivery system

* Structuring client projects, onboarding, and delivery workflows

* Integrating Basecamp into our internal GoHighLevel systems

* Improving our internal systems and customer experience end-to-end



This is not just a build role. You will help design how the business operates internally.



What I’m looking for



You must:



* Have built real client systems end-to-end

* Be confident designing workflows before building them

* Understand automation logic deeply (not just basic sequences)

* Have experience managing or structuring projects (Basecamp or similar)

* Be able to work independently and think in systems



This is NOT a junior role



Please do not apply if your experience is mainly:



* social media

* Canva

* basic
 campaigns

* general VA work



Application questions (required)



Question 1



Describe a system you have personally built using GoHighLevel and at least one other tool (HubSpot, Airtable, or similar).



Include:



1. The business problem

2. How you structured the system (brief but clear steps)

3. The most complex part of the automation logic

4. How you handled edge cases (e.g. early conversion, no response, duplicate triggers)



Question 2 (important)*



A lead enters a workflow and receives a 5-step follow-up sequence.



On day 2, they convert (book or purchase), but they continue receiving the remaining messages.



Explain exactly how you would fix this inside GoHighLevel.



Be specific about:



* what triggers, conditions, or workflow changes you would use

* how you would prevent this happening again across the system



Question 3



You are setting up Basecamp as the main project delivery tool for an automation agency.



How would you structure:



* a new client onboarding project

* task organisation

* communication between internal team and client



Applications that are vague or theoretical will not be reviewed.



Bonus



* Experience with quoting systems or calculators

* API / webhook integrations

* AI within workflows



If you’re someone who takes ownership, builds clean systems, and understands how automation drives real business outcomes, apply below.



Niki

Designed For Results

title: Client Acquisition, SEO & Lead Generation Specialist (Remote)
description:
About GlowMD

GlowMD is a luxury medical spa based in Texas specializing in wellness, aesthetics, IV hydration, and medical weight loss treatments. Our focus is delivering exceptional patient experiences while growing through high-quality, targeted digital marketing.



We are looking for a results-driven Google Ads & Lead Generation Specialist who understands how to generate qualified leads that convert into paying clients.



Role Overview

This is a performance-driven role focused on revenue growth. The ideal candidate understands SEO, Google Ads, sales psychology, and lead generation strategies that bring in qualified leads and convert them into booked services.

You will be responsible for improving online visibility, generating traffic, and turning that traffic into real patients.



Primary Objective

• Generate qualified leads that convert into completed paid services for GlowMD.



Responsibilities

• Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns

• Develop and execute SEO strategies to increase organic traffic

• Perform keyword research and competitor analysis

• Optimize campaigns and pages for cost per lead and conversions

• Improve landing pages and website conversion rates

• Set up and monitor conversion tracking

• Implement retargeting campaigns

• Analyze marketing data and continuously improve performance

• Develop strategies to turn website traffic into booked services



Requirements

• Proven experience in SEO and Google Ads

• Strong understanding of lead generation and online sales funnels

• Experience increasing website traffic and conversions

• Ability to analyze data and optimize campaigns

• Knowledge of conversion optimization and landing pages

• Strong communication and strategic thinking

• Experience in healthcare, wellness, aesthetics, or local service marketing is a plus



Compensation

Base Pay:

• $7 per hour



Phase 1 Bonus:

• $15 per completed paid service generated from your campaigns

• Monthly bonus cap: $1,000



Upgrade Opportunity (After 3 Months of Hitting Cap):

•  $7/hour base

• $10 per completed service

• + 3% revenue after the first 50 services



Trial Period:

Shortlisted candidates will complete a 5-day paid trial to evaluate campaign strategy, performance mindset, and communication.



KPIs

• Increased organic website traffic

• Decreasing cost per lead

• Increasing lead-to-client conversion rates

• Positive ROI from marketing campaigns

• Consistent qualified lead generation



How to Apply

Please send:

• Your SEO and Google Ads experience

• Examples of lead generation results

• Case studies or screenshots of campaign performance

• A short explanation of your strategy to generate leads for a medical spa



We are looking for someone who understands how to turn traffic into real paying clients.

title: Operations & Client Success Manager (Part-Time / Contract)
description:
Company Overview

Kalaidoscope is a web development and growth marketing agency built for founders — the ones with a real vision and not enough hours in the day. We build fast, think like operators, and use modern technology and AI to give small businesses the kind of execution that used to require a much bigger team.





Role Overview

We're looking for an Operations & Client Success Manager who is the kind of person that makes everything around them run smoother — and doesn't wait to be asked.



You're proactive by nature. You spot a gap before it becomes a problem. You follow up without being reminded. You keep clients feeling informed, supported, and confident. And when something needs to get done, you figure out how and you handle it.



This is a hands-on, wear-many-hats role at an early-stage agency. Some days you're managing client communication and keeping projects on track. Other days you're building out a process, organizing information, or solving a problem we haven't solved before. You're comfortable with all of it — and honestly, you kind of love the variety.



You also use AI. Not because it's trendy, but because you're always looking for a smarter, faster, better way to do things. You adopt new tools quickly, figure them out, and find ways to make them work for the team.



What You'll Own

- Serve as the primary point of contact for clients — keeping them informed, managing expectations, and making sure they always feel taken care of

- Own project coordination and follow-through — tracking moving pieces, flagging blockers, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks

- Manage internal workflows and help build systems and processes that keep the agency running smoothly as we grow

- Handle administrative and operational tasks across the business — scheduling, documentation, task management, and light research

- Proactively identify inefficiencies and bring solutions, not just observations

- Use AI and modern tools to streamline repetitive work, improve communication, and help the team operate at a higher level

Support the founder with day-to-day execution so that more time can go toward growth and client delivery





Must-Haves

- Exceptionally organized and detail-oriented — nothing slips past you

- Proactive and self-directed — you take initiative and follow through without needing to be managed

- Warm, professional, and confident communicator — clients trust you quickly

- Comfortable wearing many hats and shifting between tasks without losing quality or 
ntum

- Strong written communication skills — you can draft a client
, summarize a meeting, or write a process doc with equal care

- Tech-savvy and a fast learner — you pick up new tools quickly and actually use them

- Genuinely enjoys finding ways to do things better, faster, and smarter

- Reliable, calm under pressure, and good at prioritizing when everything feels urgent





Nice-to-Haves

- Experience in an agency, startup, or fast-moving small business environment

- Familiarity with project management tools (ClickUp, Notion, Asana, etc.)

- Active user of AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Notion AI, etc.) in your day-to-day work

- Experience with CRM or client communication tools

- Background in client success, account management, or operations

- Interest in web, tech, or the tools founders use to build businesses



Role Details

Part-time contract, flexible schedule

Fully remote

Room to grow as the agency scales
