title: GRAPHIC DESIGNER (Apparel Mockups + Reels Editing)
description:
***IMPORTANT – PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING - THIS IS YOUR FIRST SKILLS TEST***



To confirm you carefully read this job post, please include the word CREATIVE as the first word in your application message.



Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be reviewed.



To be considered for this role you must submit:



A short video introduction (2 minutes or less)



A portfolio showing examples of your work



Your portfolio must include:



• Apparel mockups

• Social media graphics

• Reels or short-form video edits

• Shirt or merch designs if available



Applications without a video introduction and portfolio will not be reviewed.



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are hiring a creative tea
mber to support two growing brands:



Knotted Threads

Buffalo Mentality



This role combines graphic design, apparel mockups, reels editing, and social media campaign execution.



Graphic design is the most important skill for this role. You will also help produce content and collaborate on campaigns that grow our brands online.



We are looking for someone who can take direction, think strategically, and turn ideas into polished designs and engaging content.



This position starts at 20 hours per week with opportunity to grow long term.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Graphic Design (Primary Responsibility)



• Create apparel mockups for incoming quote requests

• Apply logos to shirts, hats, hoodies, and other garments

• Prepare artwork files for production once designs are approved

• Create social media graphics and marketing visuals

• Design marketing materials and occasional pitch decks

• Occasionally design shirt graphics as our product offerings expand



Typical weekly volume:



• 10–20 apparel mockups

• Mockups should typically be completed within 24 hours



Content Creation



• Edit reels and short-form video using CapCut

• Follow brand guidelines and maintain visual consistency

• Produce engaging social content for Instagram and other platforms

• Suggest improvements to increase engagement and reach



Typical weekly output:



• 5–10 reels edited

• 7–10 social posts



Campaign Collaboration



• Work with the owner to develop social media campaigns

• Help organize campaign content and posting schedules

• Turn ideas into structured content plans

• Assist with scheduling and organizing content using Go High Level



TOOLS WE USE



Photoshop

Illustrator

CapCut

Canva

Go High Level

Google Workspace

ClickUp



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



• Strong graphic design skills (Photoshop and Illustrator)

• Ability to create clean apparel mockups quickly and accurately

• Experience editing reels or short-form video

• Ability to take direction and turn ideas into polished visuals

• Organized and detail oriented

• Strong communication during work hours

• Someone who takes initiative and produces high quality work



APPLICATION QUESTIONS



Please answer the following when applying:



Walk us through your process for creating an apparel mockup from a logo and garment.



What elements do you focus on when editing reels to keep them engaging?



How do you stay organized when managing multiple creative projects?



Tell us about a design you created from a client’s idea or direction.



VIDEO INTRODUCTION REQUIREMENT



Your video should include:



• Your name and background

• Your graphic design experience

• Your experience creating social content or reels

• Why you believe you are a strong fit for this role



Keep your video under 2 minutes.

title: Semantic SEO Expert & Manager
description:
With our recent expansion, we're excited to be hiring lively, hard-working SEO professionals to our team! Before we get into the specifics, let us tell you about our company:



Why Join BIG Marketing:



- Work in the US market with a talented team on an exciting mission!

- 14 days paid personal time off.

- Paid time off for US Non-Working Holidays.

- Year-End Bonus.

- Company-sponsored learning.

- Comprehensive pay: $2,800 - $4,000/mo based on experience and knowledge.

- Opportunity for promotion and pay increases based on yearly performance review.



About BIG Marketing:



BIG Marketing is an SEO agency with extensive experience in helping companies grow their profits. We pride ourselves in delivering the most effective SEO strategies that can be delivered. We're among the top 1% of SEO experts on the planet!



Our company focuses on making a positive impact every day. That means we're creating positivity within the company itself, and with our clients. There's no room for drama and negativity here. We take every mistake or incorrect action as an opportunity to learn and grow. The ideal candidate would be someone who likes this type of environment and who feels they can contribute to it!



Some of our core values include:



- Always strive to be better.

- Find your discipline (make yourself a self-starter).

- Lift each other up, professionally and in life.

- Treat others with respect and kindness.

- Be reliable.



We're not just looking for a full-time SEO specialist, we're looking for that perfect person who will be a team player, meet our core values and win with us.



DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES:



Below is a list of some of the various tasks you'll be required to do to perform well on the job:



- Analyzing SEO campaigns to determine the next actions needed for improvement. 

- Writing out detailed instructions on what needs to be done on each campaign. 

- Educating the team on why these actions need to be taken.

- Formulating SOPs for new clients who sign up.

- Run daily SEO meetings to go over critical tasks for the day. 

- Plan out delivery schedules for clients. 



REQUIREMENTS



- Educated on Semantic SEO (Koray Tugberk's Framework)

- In-depth experience with tools like Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Screaming Frog, etc.

- Excellent English speaking skills.

- An expert understanding of technical terms related to SEO and the web.

- A fast learner.

- Experience with WordPress.



- A backup or dual internet connection must be set up.

- At least a quad-core CPU for the computer/laptop you're using (the faster the better!)



BONUS QUALIFICATIONS (Not Required)



If you have any of the following skills, please let us know!



- Web development and coding (mostly for increased website speed and debugging).

- Debugging hacked sites.

- Case studies of your work.

- Website migration.



If you've made it this far, please introduce yourself in a 3-minute video and share it when you apply! Please also add why you believe you'd be a good fit for our team by filling out our application form below:



Application Form: 



Website: 
 



NOTE: We get a lot of applicants on this platform. The applicants we are most serious about considering are those who are willing to introduce themselves in a video and also fill out our application form. We're excited to meet you and look forward to flourishing together!

title: Healthcare Admin Virtual Assistant — Caregiver Recruitment & Onboarding
description:
IMPORTANT: To be considered, the first line of your application message must be: "I have read the full job description." Applications that do not include this phrase will not be reviewed.



What You Will Do



Post and manage caregiver job listings across Indeed,
 groups,  and Craigslist — keep postings fresh and monitor applications daily

Screen applicants, conduct structured phone screens, and make advance or decline recommendations

Conduct three professional reference checks per applicant by phone and document outcomes

Manage credentialing document collection — Florida HHA/CNA licenses, HIV/AIDS and ADRD training certificates, background screening, and contractor agreements

Send and track DocuSign onboarding packets

Monitor background check clearinghouse and report results to the owner

Send OvertureXL access links and confirm caregiver profile setup

Manage caregiver scheduling in OvertureXL — match caregivers to open cases based on availability, location, and client fit

Handle call-off coverage — when a caregiver cancels, work the bench immediately to find a replacement and notify the owner of any gaps

Maintain the applicant and scheduling tracker in real time



What We Are Looking For



3+ years VA experience with US-based clients

Prior experience in US home health, hospice, medical staffing, or healthcare admin — strongly preferred

Experience with credentialing, onboarding documentation, or HR compliance workflows

Experience managing schedules and handling last-minute coverage in a care or staffing environment

Excellent written and spoken English — you will conduct phone screens and write professional communications on our behalf

Strong attention to detail and process-oriented mindset — our work is compliance-sensitive

Able to work independently and manage multiple pipeline items simultaneously

Available during Eastern Standard Time business hours — EST overlap is required

Must be reachable during early morning EST hours for urgent call-off coverage

Reliable internet, quiet workspace for calls, professional phone presence



Nice to Have



Familiarity with Florida home health or nurse registry requirements

Experience with DocuSign, Indeed employer accounts, or ATS tools

Experience managing
 group postings for recruitment

Prior experience supporting a single owner-operator or small business



What We Offer



$900–$1,100/month full-time (40 hrs/week) based on experience | $500–$600/month part-time to start with clear path to full-time

Detailed SOPs and documented processes — you will not be figuring things out from scratch

Direct relationship with the owner — clear communication, fast decisions

Long-term position — we are building an operation, not filling a temporary need

Opportunity to grow into a broader operations role as the business scales



How to Apply



Send a message that includes: the required phrase in your first line, a summary of your VA experience especially any healthcare or credentialing work, your available EST hours and time zone, your expected monthly rate, and one specific example of a process or compliance task you managed — what it was, what you did, and the outcome. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Graphic Designer / Web Design Support (Part-Time, Long-Term Opportunity)



We are looking for a highly skilled graphic designer who can work quickly, communicate clearly, and produce professional, high-quality designs for a growing education and media brand.



This role is ideal for someone who has a strong design eye, understands modern visual design, and can execute projects efficiently without needing constant direction.



We are not looking for basic template editing or AI-generated designs. We are looking for someone who can think like a designer and create custom work that looks polished and professional.



If you enjoy working with a fast-moving team and taking ownership of projects, this could become a long-term role.



Work Schedule



Part-time to start.



Approximately 4 hours per day.



Preferred working hours:



9:00 AM – 1:00 PM EST

or

10:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST



(This is evening to early morning Philippines time.)



Pay



$5 – $6 per hour



Pay will depend on experience and design quality.



Strong performance can lead to long-term work and additional hours.



Responsibilities



You will help support our team with a variety of design projects including:



• social media graphics

• marketing graphics

• landing page design support

• website design and layout improvements

• visual design for presentations and training materials

• updating existing graphics and assets

• occasional simple video thumbnails or marketing visuals

* pdf creation and design editing



Speed and attention to detail are very important.



Required Skills



You must have strong experience with:



• Graphic design and visual layout

• Canva, Adobe, or similar design tools

• Website layout / UX design

• Typography and visual hierarchy

• Creating clean, modern graphics

* Video design editing is not required, but a bonus



You should also:



• work quickly and efficiently

• communicate clearly

• follow instructions carefully

• ask good questions when needed

• meet deadlines consistently



Important



We are NOT looking for someone who only uses AI design tools.



We want a designer who understands composition, spacing, typography, and brand aesthetics.



If you rely heavily on AI design generators, this role is not a good fit.



Communication



We communicate as a team using:



• Slack

• occasional Zoom calls



You should be comfortable providing updates and responding quickly during working hours.



What We Value



We value tea
mbers who are:



• reliable

• proactive

• detail-oriented

• fast learners

• professional communicators



If you take pride in your work and enjoy creating designs that look clean and professional, we would love to hear from you.



To Apply



Please include the following:



A link to your design portfolio



Examples of graphics or websites you have designed



Your years of design experience



Your internet speed



Confirm that you are available during 9 AM – 1 PM or 10 AM – 2 PM EST



Also include the word “REVIVAL” at the top of your application so we know you read the full job post.

title: Cost-Estimator/Project Administrator (Demolition experience desired)
description:
Premium Australian BPO is seeking an experienced Cost-Estimator/Project Administrator for our client, an Australian specialist demolition and civil works company operating across NSW Australia. This client specializes in delivering complex early works, demolition, excavation, civil services and remediation.



This Part-Time (PT) role offers the flexibility to work-from-home (WFH), a market-leading salary package including paid leave + bonuses. Be a key player on a dynamic team supporting tendering, cost-estimating, cost-planning and project administration functions.



Noting this part-time role requires alignment with Australian business hours 9am-1pm AEST Monday through Friday. 



This role is ideal for someone with strong construction estimating fundamentals who understands Australian construction standards and systems and enjoys working closely with project and estimating teams. This role is focused on accuracy, documentation, and internal project support.



****Key Responsibilities Include ****



-Prepare project take-offs and Bills of Quantities (BOQs)



-Utilise established rates for cost-estimating and cost planning



-Support development of early works methodologies for demolition and civil projects



-Assist with tender submission preparation



-Coordinate and review subcontractor pricing



-Support safety systems and documentation



-Work within and support the company’s IMS (Integrated Management System) requirements



-Maintain accurate and well-organised project documentation





*****Required Experience & Skills to apply includes****



- Minimum 4 years proven experience in construction estimating.

- Minimum 2 years proven experience in project administration

- Previous experience with an Australian construction company.

- Previous experience with cost-estimating and construction methodologies for demolition and early civil works. 

- Strong understanding of NSW / Australian construction systems.

- High level of proficiency with Bluebeam software.

- High level of proficiency with Excel and Microsoft Office.

- High level of proficiency with English both verbal and written.

- High level of attention to detail and accuracy.

- Reliable, accountable and deadline oriented.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a dynamic team.

- Comfortable supporting multiple tenders/projects simultaneously.



****WFH Setup**** This role requires candidates have a complete WFH set-up in place including

- Laptop

-Monitor

-Fast and reliable internet

-Back-up internet options

-Back-up power options



****How to Apply**** Please provide the following for your application to be considered



- Your CV

- A brief summary of your experience in construction estimating and project administration.

- A brief summary of your previous Australian experience.



Thank you!

title: Entry-Level Admin Assistant / Associate Account Manager (Fresh Graduates, No Experience Required)
description:
About StoryGen

StoryGen (storygen.agency) is a rapidly scaling B2B lead generation agency focused on building and operating outbound sales teams for clients. We specialize in cold calling, powered by strong systems, automation, and AI.



Our campaigns succeed because of tight execution and coordination and that’s exactly where this role makes an impact.



The Opportunity

We’re looking for an Associate Account Manager to help drive the day-to-day execution of client campaigns. In this role, you’ll work closely with internal teams to ensure campaigns are set up correctly, running efficiently, and consistently improving.



This is a great entry point for someone who’s curious about sales, enjoys working with systems, and thrives in a structured, fast-moving environment. Prior experience in account management isn’t required, we’re more interested in how quickly you learn, solve problems, and take initiative.



You’ll be part of the engine that keeps campaigns organized, optimized, and delivering results.



How to Apply

To keep our hiring process fair and consistent, we use an assessment for all applicants.



If you’re interested, complete the assessment and submit your resume, internet speed test result, and audio recording here:





What You’ll Be Working On

- Set up cold calling campaigns (scripts, ICP targeting, contact lists)

- Draft and refine messaging for calls and follow-ups

- Participate in onboarding and weekly client calls; document key takeaways and action items

- Maintain and organize client materials (ICPs, messaging, campaign notes)

- Coordinate with BDRs to ensure campaign alignment and clarity

- Monitor weekly metrics (meetings booked, attendance rates, etc.) and surface issues early

- Assist in preparing client reports and updates

- Leverage AI tools to improve efficiency in writing, summaries, admin tasks

- Troubleshoot issues or set up across tools like Nooks, HubSpot, and similar platforms

- Support the Account Manager with ad hoc tasks to keep campaigns running smoothly



What We’re Looking For

- Strong communication and writing skills

- Genuine interest in sales and outbound strategy

- Comfortable with technology and quick to learn new tools

- Familiar with AI tools like ChatGPT for prompting (or willing to learn quickly)

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Able to follow structured processes while staying adaptable

- Dependable, resourceful, and comfortable coordinating across multiple teams.

- Reliable and comfortable working across teams

-Positive attitude and willingness to grow mindset



Work Schedule

- Monday to Friday

- 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Eastern Time)



Compensation & Perks

- Monthly pay of USD 1,000 (entry-level role)

- Fully remote setup

- Hands-on training in outbound sales, account management, and AI tools

- Clear progression path: Associate ? Account Manager ? Senior Account Manager

- Opportunities to grow into strategic or client-facing roles

- Work with a fast-growing team in the B2B sales space

- Collaborative and high-performance environment

title: Full-Time Business Operations Associate
description:

- Follow structured ordering procedures while executing time-sensitive purchases accurately and efficiently.

- Respond to dynamic situations with sound judgment, initiative, and clear communication with the team.

What We’re Looking For

----> We are looking for someone who has: 



Ownership Mentality

You take responsibility for your work and treat tasks seriously.

Outgoing & Communicative

Speed + Accuracy

Attention to Detail

----> How to Apply

!!! Only applicants who follow both steps will be considered.



This is not a simple admin job. Each product has its quirks, and you’ll be trained to use a clear process to problem solve and become proficient when handling orders. If you’re motivated and eager to learn, this role is for you.

Satou Agency is a fast-growing international PR & Digital Marketing agency helping exceptional professionals get noticed, trusted, and recognized worldwide. We work with clients across the USA, Europe, Asia, Africa, and CIS markets — specializing in strategic visibility, media placements, industry awards, and high-profile recognition opportunities.

We're a small, close-knit remote team — and we take hiring seriously. We're not looking for someone to fill a seat. We're looking for a person who is technically sharp, communicates with confidence, and wants to grow with us over the long term.



What This Role Is

This is a research, operations, and client communication role at the core of our business. You will build and maintain lead lists, manage CRM systems, support outreach campaigns, create materials, and communicate directly with international clients.

This role requires someone who can think analytically, handle structured data with precision, navigate multiple digital tools confidently, and write professional business English without hesitation. If you're organized, tech-savvy, and thrive in a clear system-driven environment — this role will suit you well.



What You'll Do Day-to-Day

Lead Generation & Outreach



Find and qualify leads on LinkedIn (advanced search) and other platforms

Research companies, decision-makers, and contact details

Build, structure, and maintain accurate contact databases



CRM &
 Automation



Manage and update CRM systems — primarily HubSpot and 

Create and maintain sales funnels and automation workflows

Build and execute targeted
 outreach campaigns, manage mailing lists



Data & Spreadsheet Management



Work with Google Sheets and Excel at a confident level — formulas, pivot tables, data structuring and cleanup

Keep all records organized, accurate, and up to date



Client Communication



Correspond with international clients via
 and messaging — professionally, clearly, and on time

Coordinate tasks and follow up internally to ensure nothing falls through the cracks



Presentations & Materials



Create polished presentations in Canva and PowerPoint for client pitches and internal use

Design basic marketing materials in Canva



AI & Tools



Use ChatGPT and other AI tools to streamline research, outreach, and daily workflows

Adapt quickly to new platforms and troubleshoot minor technical issues independently



Who We're Looking For

This role is best suited for someone with a technical or analytical background — IT, engineering, data, economics, or a related field — who has strong communication skills and is comfortable working in a fast-paced international environment.

Required:



Bachelor's degree in IT, Computer Science, Engineering, Economics, or a related technical field (or equivalent hands-on experience)

Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar role — lead generation, marketing operations, digital assistant, or technical support

Advanced English — written and spoken. You will correspond with international clients. Grammar, tone, and clarity are non-negotiable.

Expert-level Google Sheets / Excel — formulas, pivot tables, data organization

Hands-on experience with HubSpot, 
, or similar CRM / outreach platforms

Proficiency in Canva and PowerPoint for presentation and materials creation

Strong LinkedIn search and lead generation skills

Detail-oriented, self-organized, and able to meet deadlines independently



Strong plus:



Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator or 

Background in B2B marketing, tech, or PR/communications

Experience working with US or European clients directly

Familiarity with Adobe Photoshop, CapCut, or Adobe Premiere Pro





What We Offer



100% remote — work from anywhere

Long-term, stable position with strong preference for internal growth

Direct exposure to international clients and global markets

Clear processes, no micromanagement

Performance-based salary increases

Real growth path: Lead Gen Specialist ? Marketing Ops ? Senior Assistant / Team Lead





How to Apply

Your English level and any experience communicating with international clients

description:

Identify stable listings with consistent sales



Document findings clearly in spreadsheets



Follow sourcing and profitability rules exactly

Strong understanding of Amazon fees, Buy Box, and ranking



Advanced experience using Keepa, especially Product Finder



Ability to read and interpret Keepa graphs correctly



Familiar with common Amazon risks (IP complaints, restrictions, hijackers)



Able to work independently with minimal supervision



Experience working with U.S. Amazon marketplace



Must have first word as FREE



Required Skills:



Strong attention to detail



Data-driven decision making



Consistent and organized workflow



Fast but accurate research ability



Preferred (Not Required):



Experience with online arbitrage or wholesale



Familiarity with tools like SellerAmp or manual sourcing



Important Note:

This position is for someone who already knows Amazon well. Training will be minimal. Results matter.

title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Operations Virtual Assistant

(Process-Driven | High-Precision | Behind-the-Scenes Operations)



Job Overview



Maid In America Cleaning Services is hiring an Operations Virtual Assistant to protect schedule integrity, data accuracy, and operational consistency.



This is a behind-the-scenes execution role. You will not be customer-facing. You will work inside defined systems and SOPs to ensure our operational engine runs cleanly and efficiently every day.



If you enjoy structured work, moving quickly without sacrificing accuracy, and taking pride in clean execution, this role will feel natural to you.



What You’ll Do:



1. Scheduling & Job Management (Primary Responsibility)

You will own scheduling preparation and system accuracy for our TN locations.



This includes:

- Creating and modifying clients, jobs, and visits in Jobber

- Preparing future-day schedules for review and approval

- Creating training tasks in Jobber for new tea
mbers

- Re-sequencing jobs and rebalancing teams within defined guardrails

- Maintaining week-to-week schedule consistency whenever possible

- Flagging and correcting conflicts or inefficiencies early

- Executing same-day scheduling adjustments exactly as directed



2. Data Accuracy & System Integrity

You will ensure operational data is accurate, complete, and reliable.



This includes:

- Updating customer notes, job frequencies, and service details

- Invoicing customers promptly after service completion

- Calculating cost-of-service data after jobs

- Preparing timesheet and tips reports for payroll

- Logging complaints and rectified cleans accurately

- Creating and publishing weekly operational reports

- Manual KPI data entry

- Verifying work-to-labor ratios using company tools



3. Administrative Support

You will support operational structure and remove administrative friction.



This includes:

- Supporting the Assistant Operations Manager with administrative execution

- Maintaining internal trackers and shared documents

- Following established documentation and checklists consistently



What This Role Requires

- High pace with high accuracy

- Comfort with structured, repeatable tasks

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication when issues arise

- Strong adherence defined systems and guardrails

- Ability to work independently within clear expectations



This role involves a high volume of operational tasks that must be completed correctly and consistently. As the company grows, volume will increase — and this role grows with it.



Who We’re Looking For



Detail-Oriented & Reliable

You take pride in doing things correctly and thoroughly.



High Throughput Executor

You can handle volume without losing structure or focus.



Process-Driven

You work well inside defined systems and appreciate clear expectations.



Accountable Communicator

You flag issues early, own mistakes quickly, and ask for clarification when needed.



Tech-Comfortable

You’re comfortable using tools like Slack, Google Suite, Chrome extensions, and scheduling platforms. Experience with Jobber is a strong plus.



Experienced in Fast-Paced Admin or Scheduling

Background in administrative, dispatch, logistics, scheduling, or operations-heavy roles is

preferred.



Work Requirements

- Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM U.S. Central Time

- Reliable internet with backup

- Dedicated workspace

- Backup power options in case of outages

- Fluent written English



Our Core Values

- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If these values resonate with you, we want to hear from you.



Important Screening Step (Read Carefully)



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

1. Complete our Culture Index survey: 

2. Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value you most resonate with (ALL CAPS).

3. Use a minimum of 5 Apply Points when applying

4. In your application message, include one sentence describing the most repetitive task you have performed at a high standard for 6+ months.



Applications that do not follow all instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Video Editor - A PLAYERS PNLY
description:
You will serve as the lead creative and technical operator for our video department. Your primary objective is to produce high-fidelity content by selecting the most efficient AI models for each specific task—balancing quality, speed, and credit consumption.



Requirements

Experience: Minimum of 5 years of professional video editing (Premiere, DaVinci, or After Effects).



AI Model Expertise (Higgsfield Mastery): You must be proficient in using Higgsfield AI as a central hub to deploy and manage:



Sora 2: For hyper-realistic, long-form narrative scenes.



Kling 3.0: For high-motion cinematic realism and product shots.



Runway Gen-4: For character consistency and stylized artistic control.



Cost Management: A deep understanding of the credit-based economy of AI platforms. You must know when to use "Turbo" or "Lite" models for drafts and when to commit high-value credits for 4K final renders (e.g., Nano Banana Pro vs. Seedream).



Synthetic Identity: * ElevenLabs: Expert level at voice cloning, speech-to-speech, and emotional performance editing.



HeyGen: Creation and deployment of high-fidelity talking avatars.



Key Responsibilities

Strategic Pipeline Design: Evaluate project briefs to determine which model (Sora, Kling, or Veo) provides the best ROI for the specific visual style required.



Asset Generation & Polish: Drive the Higgsfield Cinema Studio to execute complex camera moves (Dolly Zooms, FPV Arcs) and use Topaz-powered upscalers for 4K delivery.



Budget Stewardship: Monitor credit usage across platforms to ensure production remains within monthly subscription limits.



Audio-Visual Syncing: Use ElevenLabs and Higgsfield Audio tools to ensure perfect lip-sync and localized voice performances.



How to Apply

Please submit your portfolio and a brief cover letter explaining a time you optimized an AI workflow to save time or costs. Add HappyDays in your subject line to prove you have read this

title: Hybrid Graphic Designer & Video Editor
description:
We are seeking a versatile and creative Hybrid Graphic Designer & Video Editor who thrives in transforming ideas into compelling visual content across both graphic design and video platforms. You will play a crucial role in creating visually engaging graphics and captivating video content aligned with our brand’s storytelling and marketing objectives.



Role Description:

The Hybrid Graphic Designer & Video Editor will collaborate closely with the Visual Content Manager and marketing team to create impactful digital assets, ranging from static graphics to dynamic videos. You'll be responsible for ensuring consistency and quality across all visual media.



Duties and Responsibilities:

- Conceptualize, design, and execute graphics for social media, websites, ads, thumbnails, logos, branding materials, and marketing assets.

- Edit and produce engaging video content including YouTube long-form videos, shorts, Instagram Reels, TikToks, and marketing ads.

- Transform raw footage into visually engaging videos, enhancing them with text overlays, graphics, animations, motion graphics, and sound design.

- Ensure all graphics and videos maintain brand consistency and meet platform-specific guidelines.

- Manage multiple design and video projects simultaneously, from concept to delivery, meeting tight deadlines.

- Stay up-to-date with trends, AI tools, and best practices in graphic design, video editing, and social media.

- Actively revise and optimize content based on feedback and analytics.



Skills and Qualifications:

Technical Skills:

- Strong proficiency in graphic design tools: Canva and Adobe Photoshop required; Illustrator, InDesign, and Figma preferred.

- Proven expertise in video editing software: Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut PC, or DaVinci Resolve required; Adobe After Effects experience preferred.

- Solid understanding of color theory, typography, visual storytelling, layout, and composition.

- Experience creating content optimized for various social media platforms and digital marketing channels.

- Familiarity with UX/UI principles, AI tools, and motion graphics is advantageous.

Soft Skills:

- Exceptional creativity with an eye for aesthetics and detail.

- Strong organizational and time management skills, with the ability to juggle multiple projects and meet deadlines.

- Excellent communication and collaboration skills, capable of effectively interacting with tea
mbers and stakeholders.

- Openness to constructive feedback and ability to proactively implement revisions.

- Independent initiative-taking and proactive problem-solving.



Qualifications:

- 3+ years of proven experience in graphic design and video editing, supported by a strong portfolio showcasing versatile projects.

- Demonstrated ability to translate creative briefs into compelling visual narratives and marketing content.

- Strong understanding of branding, visual storytelling, social media trends, and digital content optimization.



Our Core Values:

Client Wins: Fully committed to exceptional results, making client success our measure of achievement.

Integrity in Action: Honesty and transparency, addressing challenges directly and effectively.

Win-Win Discipline: Seeking solutions beneficial to both clients and the company through strategic thinking.

Team Synergy: Collaborative environment that values perspectives, feedback, and collective commitment.

Empowered Accountability: Encouraging ownership, independent problem-solving, and proactive responsibility.

Join our dynamic team and leverage your dual skillset to create outstanding visual content that drives impactful results.



To Apply, Submit your resume, Portfolio/Relevant Projects

title: Urgent Hiring: Integration Support Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a Technical Onboarding Specialist with strong communication skills and a solid foundation in automation and CRM integrations. This is not a “button-clicking” role — we need someone who truly understands how systems connect, how data flows, and how to build reliable workflows across different platforms.

If you're a systems thinker who enjoys solving technical problems and guiding non-technical users through integrations, this role is for you.

You’ll support the expansion of our Intake 360 service, which provides on-demand reception and intake for U.S.-based law firms. This role focuses on onboarding clients, gathering requirements, and building integrations that connect our systems with client CRMs.

You must be comfortable communicating through
s and video calls, as this role involves direct interaction with both staff and clients. Strong communication skills are non-negotiable.

Note: Please do not message our pages or contact the CEO directly. All applications will be reviewed only through the instructions provided below.



About the Company

We are a dynamic network of companies, each offering specialized expertise:

Turn Key Ops – We provide top-tier virtual staffing solutions that enable businesses to focus on growth across industries such as medical, real estate, legal, and marketing.

Attorney Assistant – We specialize in virtual assistant services exclusively for law firms, helping them operate more efficiently.

In this role, you’ll support our Intake 360 service, integrating with client CRM systems such as Salesforce, Litify, Lead Docket, HubSpot, and others to enable efficient intake workflows and lead management.



About the Role

Technical Onboarding Specialist – Automation & CRM Integrations

You will be responsible for onboarding new clients, gathering technical requirements, and implementing integrations between internal systems and client CRMs.

This is a client-facing, mid-level technical role. You will work directly with U.S.-based law firms, translate business needs into technical workflows, and ensure accurate and reliable data transfer — including sending data via APIs.

This role is ideal for someone who is hands-on, detail-oriented, and comfortable owning integrations end-to-end.



Core Responsibilities

Lead technical onboarding for new Intake 360 clients

Gather, document, and translate client requirements into integration workflows

Build and maintain automation workflows across various platforms (not limited to any single tool)

Send and receive data between systems using APIs, webhooks, and automation tools

Work closely with Client Success Managers to align technical solutions with client needs

Communicate directly with U.S.-based clients to provide updates, support, and guidance

Troubleshoot and optimize integrations for reliability, scalability, and clean data flow

Standardize integration patterns across multiple CRM systems

Create internal documentation, SOPs, and repeatable onboarding processes

Manage multiple onboarding and integration projects independently

Maintain consistent working hours aligned with U.S. Eastern Time (ET)



Core Qualifications (Must-Have)

Minimum 3 years of experience in automation and system integrations

Strong understanding of how automation works across platforms (not limited to specific tools)

Ability to design workflows that handle real-world business logic and edge cases

Experience working with APIs, webhooks, or data transfer between systems

Strong understanding of data structures and CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, Lead Docket, etc.)

Ability to troubleshoot integration issues independently and logically

Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English

Comfortable working directly with non-technical clients and explaining technical concepts clearly

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

High attention to detail and commitment to clean, maintainable system design



Important: Experience using only entry-level tools such as GoHighLevel (GHL) does not meet the required level for this role unless supported by broader automation and integration experience.



Nice to Have

Experience working with law firms or legal intake systems

Familiarity with CTI/dialer tools (e.g., Regal or similar platforms)

Experience with Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 ecosystems

Prior experience in a remote, client-facing role with U.S.-based teams

Experience building multi-step workflows with conditional logic and error handling

title: Technical Grant Writer
description:
We are looking for a Technical Grant Writer to work with our SR&ED (Scientific Research and Experimental Development) team. 



You are responsible for securing funding by researching, writing, and submitting comprehensive grant proposals. This role supports innovation and growth by obtaining financial support through SR&ED and other grant opportunities, ensuring that the clients' projects and R&D initiatives receive the necessary funding to succeed.



Key responsibilities:-



1. Technical Writing & Proposal Development: Draft, edit, and submit high-quality proposals. Convert complex scientific, clinical, or technical concepts into persuasive narratives.



2. Grant Research & Strategy: Identify and prioritize potential funding opportunities from federal, state, and private foundation sources. Maintain an up-to-date calendar of deadlines.



3. Collaboration with Experts: Work closely with internal team, clients (scientists, engineers etc) and subject matter experts to understand project needs, methodologies, and deliverables.



4. Reporting & Follow-up: Be on top of project deadlines and reportings



Key Requirements:-



1. Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Science or Health



2.  Min. 2 years of experience in technical grant writing with proven successful records. 



3. Ability to interpret and synthesize complex information (e.g., data analysis, scientific literature).



4. Professional command of the English language 



5. Strong analytical, editing, and persuasive writing skills and presentation skills



6. Comfortable in doing presentations and dealing with C-level Executives and Government Bodies



7.  Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite or Google Docs (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), grant management software, task manager software, and CRM databases
salary: From USD5 per hour (Based on experience)

title: Advanced Video Editor Needed (AI Voice + Text Replacement Project)
description:
PLEASE add me on
 - hunteratwood77s and send me a message

Advanced Video Editor Needed (AI Voice + Text Replacement Project)





I’m looking for a highly skilled video editor who can help update an existing long-form video (approximately 1 hour 15 minutes) without re-filming it.







This is not basic editing. I need someone who understands advanced tools, precision work, and AI-assisted editing.



Project Overview





I have a fully recorded video that is still 95% usable. The only issue is that certain parts become outdated each year (dates, numbers, charts, and a few spoken words).







Instead of re-recording the entire video, I want to surgically update specific sections so the video feels completely natural and seamless.



What I Need Done

Replace on-screen text (years, numbers, charts, etc.)



Edit visuals/graphics in the video to reflect updated data



Identify and update specific spoken words (example: changing “2025” to “2026”)



Use AI voice tools (if needed) to match my voice naturally



Ensure audio transitions are clean and undetectable



Maintain perfect visual consistency (no obvious edits or patches)



Requirements

Advanced video editing skills (Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar)



Experience with motion tracking and text replacement inside video



Experience using AI voice tools (such as ElevenLabs or similar)



Strong attention to detail — edits must be seamless and unnoticeable



Ability to work on long-form content without degrading quality



Must be able to communicate clearly and show examples of similar work



Important





This is precision work. If edits look obvious, sound unnatural, or feel patched together, it will not work.







I am looking for someone who can make the final result look like the video was originally recorded that way.





PLEASE add me on

title: Sales Manager for Engineering Services
description:
Company Overview:

Lohman Engineering is a leading provider of innovative engineering solutions for industries. We specialize in delivering high-quality, client-focused services that drive operational success.



Job Summary:

We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Sales Manager to lead our sales efforts in engineering services. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background, proven sales experience, and the ability to build and maintain relationships with key clients. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth by identifying new business opportunities, managing customer accounts, and developing strategic sales plans.



Key Responsibilities:

• Develop and implement sales strategies to grow the company’s engineering services portfolio.

• Identify, target, and secure new business opportunities across multiple industries.

• Manage client relationships, understanding their needs and delivering tailored solutions.

• Lead contract negotiations, pricing discussions, and proposal development.

• Collaborate with internal engineering and project management teams to ensure customer satisfaction.

• Track sales performance, forecast revenue, and meet sales targets.



Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, or a related field.

• 3+ years of experience in sales, preferably within the engineering or technical services sector.

• Strong technical knowledge and ability to understand complex engineering solutions.

• Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.

• Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets.

• Ability to travel as required.



How to Apply:

Submit your resume and cover letter.

title: Pricing Analyst
description:
Job Description

The Pricing Analyst maximizes company profitability by developing competitive

pricing strategies based on data analysis, market trends, and service delivery costs. The

Pricing Analyst is expected to coordinate with different departments to ensure the validity

of price information and provide data driven recommendation.

The pricing analyst will:

• Receive and interpret information (request for quotations, contracts and

other formats and be able to input them to pricing models.

• Manage and prepare pricing requests/proposals, discounts and commercial

offers.

• Provide pricing support to procurement/sales teams and communicate rate

structures confidently to stakeholders.

• Troubleshoot pricing discrepancies using rate rules and logical deduction.

• Update and maintain pricing and cost data and assumptions which includes

doing market research and competitor comparisons, among others.

• Track pricing performance and identify opportunities for optimization.

• Ensure pricing practices comply with internal policies and business

guidelines.

Qualifications:

• Preferably with relevant work experience with costing/pricing/financial analysis.

• Proficient in Excel and financial modeling.

• Strong analytical skills, able to translate data into insights.

• Highly collaborative, with good communication and interpersonal skills

title: Dental Revenue Cycle & Insurance Specialist
description:
Remote (Virtual) – Supporting U.S. Dental Practices

(Focused on Insurance Verification, Claims, AR, and Revenue Cycle Functions)



About ZIA



ZIA partners with U.S.-based dental organizations to deliver reliable remote talent across Revenue Cycle Management, insurance verification, billing, and operations support.



Our operating standards:

1. Ownership – You are responsible for outcomes, not just activity

2. Clarity – Clean documentation. Clear communication. No guesswork

3. Consistency – Stable workflow. Reliable execution

4. Integrity – HIPAA-aligned and professionally disciplined

5. Growth – You improve systems and elevate your skill over time



About the Role



We are hiring Dental Revenue Cycle & Insurance Specialists with hands-on experience in insurance verification and core RCM functions.



This role is best suited for candidates who are already comfortable working inside dental insurance workflows and understand how front-end accuracy (verification) connects directly to back-end performance (claims, AR, collections).



You do not need to be an expert in every area of revenue cycle management.

However, you must have strong, practical experience in insurance verification and at least one additional RCM function.



This is a remote role designed for professionals who value structure, accuracy, and accountability.



Core Responsibilities

(Assigned based on specialization, with emphasis on insurance and RCM accuracy)

- Insurance Verification & Benefits (Primary Focus)

- Verify patient eligibility, frequencies, deductibles, and limitations

- Document benefits clearly and accurately in patient records

- Identify pre-authorization requirements and coverage gaps

- Ensure accuracy before appointments to reduce downstream claim issues



Claims Submission & Follow-Up

- Submit accurate claims with proper CDT coding and required attachments

- Monitor claim status and resolve rejections or delays

- Maintain clean, traceable documentation for each claim



Accounts Receivable (AR)

- Work aging reports (30/60/90+) with clear prioritization

- Identify stuck or delayed claims and drive resolution

- Maintain detailed notes for visibility and audit readiness



Denials & Appeals

- Review EOBs/ERAs and identify denial reasons

- Prepare and submit appeals with supporting documentation

- Identify patterns and root causes to reduce repeat denials



Payment Posting & Reconciliation

- Accurately post insurance and patient payments

- Identify underpayments or discrepancies

- Ensure adjustments align with payer contracts and office policies



ZIA Professional Standards (Non-Negotiable)

- Clear, professional written and spoken English

- Proactive communication (issues are surfaced early, not avoided)

- Strong attendance and schedule reliability

- Meticulous documentation inside systems

- HIPAA-compliant handling of patient data

- Private, secure work environment



We protect our clients’ workflows like they are our own.



Required Experience

- Minimum 1–2 years of dental revenue cycle experience required

- Strong experience in insurance verification (non-negotiable)

- Working knowledge of:

> CDT coding

> EOBs/ERAs

> Claim lifecycle

> Deductibles, maximums, and coverage structures

- Experience communicating directly with insurance companies

- Experience with at least one dental software (Open Dental, Dentrix, Eaglesoft, Curve, CareStack, etc.)

- Strong organizational skills and structured written communication



Remote Work Requirements

- Quiet, private workspace

- Reliable computer

- Stable internet (25+ Mbps download recommended)

- Noise-canceling headset

- Ability to attend video meetings when requested



Schedule

- Full-time (40 hours/week), Monday–Friday

- Must align working hours with assigned U.S. client time zone



Compensation

- $700–$800 USD/month (starting)

- Compensation varies based on experience, client assignment, and performance

- Growth potential as scope and responsibility expand

title: Maintenance Coordinator
description:
Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST

Compensation: Starting at $6/hour, with performance-based increases as you grow within the company



About Us



We are a Detroit-based property management company overseeing a portfolio of over 300 rental units. We are currently seeking a dependable and organized Maintenance Coordinator to join our growing team. This role is essential in helping us ensure timely, high-quality maintenance services across all our properties.



Role Overview



The Maintenance Coordinator plays a critical role in ensuring maintenance requests are handled efficiently from start to finish. This includes daily maintenance coordination, vendor communication, compliance tracking, and utility setup. This role requires someone who is organized, proactive, and comfortable following up persistently to ensure tasks are completed.



Key Responsibilities

1. Answer and manage inbound maintenance-related phone calls.

2. Create, update, and manage maintenance tickets in the system.

3. Schedule and coordinate daily maintenance tasks with vendors and tenants

4. Attach invoices to corresponding bills in our internal systems.

5. Close out completed maintenance tickets and process billing accurately.

6. Research and onboard new vendors across service categories:

        • Roofing, Plumbing, HVAC, Electrical, Cleaning, Pest Control

        • Flooring, Windows, Landscaping, Trash-outs, Painting, etc. (Preference for vendors with insurance and
 communication capabilities)

7. Obtain Certificates of Compliance for applicable properties.

8. Coordinate utility turn-ons and service transfers.

9. Collect before-and-after photos of maintenance work and upload to Google Drive folders.

10. Obtain and document ownership approvals for maintenance tasks.

11. Monitor and oversee the completion of all repair work.

12. Schedule and follow up on property re-inspections.

13. Send Lead-Based Paint reports to rental inspectors when required.

14. Track and maintain all Certificate of Compliance documentation.

15. Share “PASSED” inspection reports and corresponding photos with property owners.



Qualifications

• Strong organizational and multitasking skills

• Excellent written and verbal communication

• Comfortable handling phone calls and following up persistently

• Experience in property management or maintenance coordination preferred

• Proficient with Google Drive,
, and task management tools

• Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving ability

• Able to work independently and take ownership of tasks

• Willing to work during night shift



This role offers strong growth potential for candidates who take initiative, improve systems, and contribute to operational efficiency.



How to Apply (Important – Please Read Carefully)

We do not review generic or copy-paste applications. To be considered, please complete the application form below in full:







Only applicants who submit all required information will be considered.

title: Partnership Outreach Specialist (Affiliate Sales)
description:
Role Summary



As a Partnership Outreach Specialist, your role is to connect with businesses and introduce them to our Refer & Earn program—a simple way for them to generate additional revenue by promoting our platform.



You will guide partners through the process of signing up and installing a widget on their website, enabling them to earn commissions from referrals. This role is ideal for individuals who are persuasive, energetic, and motivated by performance and conversions.



What You’ll Do

a. Conduct outbound outreach via calls and
s to introduce the referral program

b. Clearly explain the earning potential and value proposition to business owners

c. Drive partner sign-ups and widget placements

d. Perform consistent and strategic follow-ups to maximize conversions

e. Maintain accurate records of all outreach and progress in the CRM system



How Success is Measured

Your performance will be evaluated based on:

- Number of partners onboarded per week

- Activation rate (partners who successfully install the widget)

- Conversion rate from outreach to signup



Ideal Candidate Profile

We’re looking for someone who is:

- Sales-driven and persuasive, with the ability to sell opportunities—not just products

- Confident in explaining earning potential and ROI-based pitches

- Highly organized and consistent with follow-ups

- Energetic, engaging, and comfortable speaking with business owners

- Results-oriented and motivated by targets and incentives

- Fluent in English with clear and natural communication

title: Part-Time Freelance Project Manager – Mechanical & Plant Engineering
description:
About Us

Lohmann Engineering GmbH is a German engineering firm specializing in mechanical and plant engineering — including pressure vessel design, piping systems, pipe supports, steel structures, and contract manufacturing. We work with clients and suppliers across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia. Our projects are technically demanding and delivery-focused.

The Role

We are looking for a reliable, technically competent freelance Project Manager to support our ongoing engineering projects on a part-time basis (~10 hours/week). You will work directly with the company owner and take ownership of project coordination across multiple workstreams.

Your Responsibilities



Supplier coordination — follow up with fabrication and engineering partners (Egypt, Ukraine, India, Vietnam) to ensure on-time delivery

Schedule tracking & reporting — maintain project timelines, flag deviations early, keep stakeholders informed

Client communication — professional correspondence and coordination with international clients

Drawing & document review — basic technical review of engineering drawings and project documents for completeness and consistency



What We're Looking For



Degree in engineering (mechanical, civil, chemical, industrial, or a related technical field)

Experience in plant engineering, piping, pressure vessels, steel structures, or similar industries is a strong advantage

Proficient in MS Office; experience with MS Project or comparable scheduling tools

Excellent written English — clear, professional, and precise

Self-starter who can manage tasks independently and proactively raises issues

Reliable, structured, and detail-oriented



Working Conditions



Part-time: ~20 hours/week, flexible scheduling

100% remote

Reporting directly to the company owner — initially frequent check-ins, then minimum once per week or as project milestones require

Rate: up to $20/hour depending on experience

Start: immediately



How to Apply

Please send your CV along with a short cover letter explaining your engineering background and any relevant project management experience. Applications without a cover letter will not be considered.

title: Podcast Video Editor

nts for viral short clips

Good luck!

title: Onboarding Lead/Project Manager (CINC Systems)
description:
CINC Platform Onboarding Lead / Implementation Project Manager

Sliceo – Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time | U.S. Eastern Hours



About Sliceo

Sliceo is a technology and operations consulting firm focused exclusively on the community association management (CAM) industry. We help property management companies modernize their technology stack, workflows, and operational infrastructure.



Our work includes:

• Implementing and optimizing property management systems such as CINC Systems

• Designing and integrating software ecosystems for management companies

• Workflow automation and AI enablement

• IT coordination, cybersecurity planning, and system integrations

• Operational process design and training

• Supporting management companies through growth, technology transitions, and modernization



Sliceo works closely with proptech providers, integration partners, and management companies to ensure technology implementations are successful and that clients fully adopt and benefit from their systems.



As Sliceo expands, we are building a world-class onboarding and implementation team to support management companies implementing the CINC platform and related integrations.



Position Overview

The CINC Platform Onboarding Lead / Implementation Project Manager is responsible for coordinating and supporting the successful implementation of CINC Systems and related technology solutions for management company clients.



This role works directly with:

• Management company leadership and operational teams

• Sliceo implementation and consulting teams

• CINC Systems implementation teams

• Integration and technology partners

• Sliceo development and IT teams



You will serve as the primary project coordinator and onboarding guide during system implementation, ensuring that clients successfully configure, adopt, and integrate their technology platform.



This role is highly client-facing and requires strong project management, communication, and organizational skills.



Key Responsibilities

Implementation Project Management

• Coordinate CINC platform implementations for management company clients

• Manage implementation timelines, milestones, and deliverables

• Track progress across multiple concurrent implementation projects

• Ensure successful project completion and client sign-off



Client Onboarding & System Configuration

• Work with clients to understand their current operational workflows

• Assist in designing and documenting best-practice workflows using CINC technology

• Support configuration of CINC modules including community tools, portals, and communication systems

• Coordinate onboarding for WebAxis, CINC Connect, homeowner/board portals, and other platform features



Data Migration Support

• Assist with migration of data from legacy systems into CINC

• Use Excel and data mapping tools to prepare, clean, and validate migration files

• Coordinate with technical teams to ensure accurate data transfers



Integration Coordination

• Work with Sliceo’s development and IT teams to support integration projects

• Help coordinate integrations between CINC and other software platforms

• Assist with rollout of partner technology solutions within the client’s tech stack



Training & Adoption

• Provide onboarding training and guidance to management company teams

• Support clients during early adoption of the platform

• Help create documentation and implementation SOPs

• Ensure clients are comfortable using their systems and workflows



Client Support & Issue Resolution

• Identify configuration issues or system errors during implementation

• Coordinate with technical teams to resolve issues

• Help ensure the client experience remains positive throughout the project lifecycle



Documentation & Project Tracking

• Maintain project documentation and implementation records

• Track tasks and milestones using Sliceo’s project management tools

• Maintain organized documentation within SharePoint and Zoho One systems



Required Skills & Experience

• 4+ years of experience implementing software for external clients or managing onboarding projects

• Experience working in client-facing project management roles

• Strong Excel skills, including data cleanup and migration preparation

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• Strong organizational and problem-solving abilities

• Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

• Ability to work independently and prioritize tasks without supervision

• Experience coordinating with multiple teams and departments



Preferred Experience

• Experience working with CINC Systems or similar property management platforms

• Experience in community association management (HOA/condo management)

• Experience implementing or supporting SaaS platforms

• Familiarity with property management software ecosystems

• Experience coordinating system integrations



Tools & Systems Used

You may work with tools such as:

• CINC Systems platform

• Excel and data migration tools

• Zoho One project management systems

• SharePoint documentation systems

• Time tracking tools

• Collaboration and implementation tracking software



Work Environment

• Fully remote position (Philippines-based)

• Full-time role working U.S. Eastern Time hours

• Work directly with U.S.-based leadership and clients

• Opportunity to grow into Senior Implementation Manager or Director of Implementations



What Success Looks Like

Within your first 90 days you will:

• Successfully support multiple client implementations

• Help coordinate system onboarding and training

• Manage implementation timelines and documentation

• Assist with data migration and system configuration

• Ensure clients are confident using their new platform



Compensation

Competitive compensation for experienced implementation specialists based in the Philippines.

Performance bonuses and advancement opportunities available.



How to Apply

Please submit:

1. Your resume

2. A short video introduction (2–3 minutes) explaining:

o your experience with software implementations

o your project management experience

o any experience with property management systems

title: CINC Systems Expert – Configuration, Modules & Automation (HOA / Condo)
description:
Job Title

CINC Systems Expert – Configuration, Modules & Automation (HOA / Condo)



READ THIS FIRST 

This role is for someone with deep, hands-on ownership of CINC Systems.

If your experience is limited to using CINC, assisting with setup, or following instructions created by someone else, do not apply.

We are specifically looking for someone who has built, configured, and owned multiple parts of CINC Systems in real HOA/Condo environments.



ROLE SUMMARY 

We are hiring a CINC Systems expert with a deep understanding of how CINC works end-to-end. You will be responsible for configuring, improving, and supporting multiple CINC modules, automations, workflows, and reporting structures.

This is not a narrow role. You are expected to understand how different modules interact and how configuration decisions impact operations, accounting, boards, and homeowners.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES 

You will personally:

• Configure and maintain CINC Systems environments

• Set up, customize, and optimize multiple CINC modules, such as:

o     Violations

o     Work Orders / Maintenance

o     Accounting-related workflows

o    Owner & Board portals

o    Vendors and services

o    Reporting and dashboards

• Build and manage:

o    Automation rules

o    Triggers and workflows

o    Custom fields and layouts

• Support system launches, migrations, and cleanups

• Create clear documentation for system logic and configuration

• Troubleshoot complex CINC issues independently

• Act as a senior internal resource before escalating to CINC support



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE  (Non-Negotiable)

You must clearly demonstrate all of the following:

• Direct, hands-on experience building inside CINC Systems

• Experience configuring multiple CINC modules, not just one

• Strong understanding of how CINC behaves across:

o    Operations

o    Accounting

o    Compliance

o    Board and homeowner workflows

• Ability to explain why configuration and automation decisions were made

• Comfort owning systems without step-by-step instructions

If you have only “helped,” “assisted,” or “supported” CINC work created by others, this role is not a fit.



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS 

Applicants should be prepared to:

• Submit a resume with their application

• Discuss systems they have personally built

• Explain automation decisions and tradeoffs

• Demonstrate ownership, not assistance

You will be asked to give real examples. General or vague answers will be disqualified.



WORKING CONIDTIONS 

• Full-time remote, Independent Contractor

• Flexible EST-aligned hours

o    Pre-launch: Flexible, provided deliverables and communication are met

o    Post-launch: Expected overlap with standard business hours (9–5 or 10–6 EST)

• Occasional weekend work during launch phases

o    Not frequent

o    Communicated in advance

• Time tracking required (Hubstaff)



Must have:

• Personal computer used exclusively for work

• Backup computer, internet, and power

• Quiet, professional workspace



Compensation & Growth

• $9/hour starting rate

• Hourly rate increases based on performance and contribution

• Long-term contractor relationship intended

• Opportunity to help shape systems, processes, and your own role as Sliceo grows

This role is designed for someone looking for long-term stability and ownership, not short-term task work.



CONFIDENTIALITY 

This role involves access to sensitive systems, internal strategy, and proprietary information. Strict confidentiality is required.



REQUIRED APPLICATION QUESTIONS 

Applicants must answer the following:

Describe your hands-on experience with CINC Systems.



Include:

1. Which CINC modules you personally configured or built

2. One automation or workflow you owned end-to-end

3. A system decision you made and why you made it

4. How many years have you used CINC Systems?



***Applications without a resume or without clear ownership examples will not be reviewed.

s, zooms, and dynamic cuts when appropriate

(CapCut-only editors will not be considered)

title: OPERATIONS MANAGER- digital platforms in production
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a key hire. You will be the operational backbone of a group of six digital platforms — all built and owned by one founder. Your job is to make sure everything is moving, everyone knows what they're doing, and nothing falls through the cracks.

You don't need to be a developer or a designer. But you do need to understand how websites work, what it takes to get them ranking on Google, and how to manage a small remote team without being micromanaged yourself.

You will report directly to the CEO and be the first point of contact for all staff, contractors, and VA hires across the portfolio.



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

This is not a data entry position. It is not a junior VA role. It is not an easy ride.

You are stepping into the operational lead position of a growing multi-platform business. The CEO is hands-on but moves fast — and he needs someone who can keep up, think ahead, and take real ownership of the day-to-day without being led by the hand.

If that sounds like the kind of work you want to be doing, this role has a lot to offer.

 



SALARY AND GROWTH

Starting salary: USD $900 per month, 3 month probation and if successful $1200 per month full-time 

This is not a fixed ceiling. Salary is reviewed as the business hits defined revenue milestones — and the team's output is what drives those milestones. The faster the platforms grow, the sooner that review happens.

We are building something with a long runway. The person in this role is expected to still be here in Year 3 — with a title, a salary, and a team that reflects everything they helped build.

 



 WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

• Someone who is mature and has managed remote staff or freelancers before and knows how to keep people accountable without creating conflict

• Comfortable with digital tools — Google Workspace, project management platforms, basic analytics

• Understands SEO well enough to review a VA's work and know if it's good or not

• Clear written communicator —
s and updates should be direct and professional, not long-winded

• Organised and self-directed — you don't need to be told twice, and you don't wait to be chased

• Honest about problems — you flag issues early, not after they've compounded

• Based in the Philippines or Southeast Asia — and available during reasonable overlap hours with UAE time (GMT+4)

 

WHAT YOU WILL OVERSEE

You are responsible for the day-to-day running of all six platforms. That includes:

• Making sure VA staff are completing their tasks on time and to the right standard

• Tracking what's live, what's in progress, and what's blocked — and reporting that to the CEO daily

• Managing contractors on Upwork: briefing them, checking deliverables, and releasing payment only when work passes a checklist

• Keeping the team's shared workspace (Notion) up to date so everything is organised and visible

• Setting up and maintaining the tech tools the business runs on —
 accounts, CRM, analytics, and reporting dashboards

• Identifying when something isn't working and flagging it before it becomes a problem

 



SEO AND WEBSITE KNOW-HOW

You don't need to write code. But you do need to understand what makes a website perform — and be able to have an informed conversation about it.

Specifically, you should be comfortable with:

• What on-page SEO means and why it matters — page titles, meta descriptions, headings, internal links

• How Google Search Console and Google Analytics work — reading basic traffic reports and identifying what's growing and what isn't

• What a website rollout involves — domain setup, DNS, hosting, going live — enough to manage a developer and know when something is wrong

• What a good-quality website looks like from a business perspective — clean layout, clear calls to action, fast loading, mobile-friendly

• How to brief a developer or VA on a web task clearly, without needing to write the code yourself

 



OUTREACH RESPONSIBILITIES

Alongside managing staff, you will handle certain outreach tasks yourself — particularly in the early months before the team is fully built out.

This includes:

• Following up with API suppliers and business partners on behalf of the CEO — using pre-approved
 templates

• Submitting the business to directories, travel platforms, and relevant industry listings

• Coordinating affiliate programme applications — tracking status, following up, and confirming live links

• Supporting the VA team on influencer and supplier outreach by reviewing their work and maintaining quality standards

You are not expected to write original content or build partnerships independently. The CEO handles all commercial negotiations. Your role is to execute, track, and report.

title: Do you love making people feel cared for? Support our CEOs as an Executive Personal Assistant!
description:
Title: Executive Personal Assistant



Important: Make sure to read the full listing for application instructions.



Do you love making people feel cared for? Are you the one who remembers everyone’s birthdays, plans amazing gatherings, makes fun plans, and brings warmth into the lives of those around you?



This is NOT your typical assistant job. It’s deeply personal. You’ll work with a kind but intense U.S.-based pair of brothers (proven entrepreneurs working as Co-CEOs of the same business) to support their lives, not the company they are building. From keeping friendships alive and planning meaningful experiences to sending thoughtful gifts and helping them stay on track with personal goals, you’ll be part organizer, part cheerleader, part coach. If you’ve ever been called the “mom” of your group and you’re looking for a decades-long position, this might be your dream job.



Your Role

* Build trust by executing on tasks and communicating clearly, which will lead to taking on more responsibility, which will then lead to increases in pay.

* Keep relationships thriving by managing a personal CRM and helping stay in touch with friends and family.

* Use technology to help automate certain tasks that are repetitive.

* Track habits, support routines, and act as an accountability partner for personal goals.

* Pick out thoughtful, creative gifts for birthdays and other special 
nts.

* Research products, tools, and ideas to make life easier, better, or more fun.

* Plan and book unforgettable travel, great hotels, and the perfect dinner spots.

* Jump in on special personal projects wherever a helping hand is needed.



What’s In It for You

* A Long-Term Role: This is meant to last. The entrepreneurs who you'd be an assistant to are looking for a lifetime assistant.

* Great Place to Work: These entrepreneurs are known to have a super high retention rate of employees and create a great work environment.

* Creative Work: From planning memorable trips to picking out the perfect gift, this role lets you flex your creative muscles and thoughtful side every day.

* Variety: No two days will feel the same. You’ll get to research, plan, coach, organize, and more.

* Paid Leave: You'll get at least 10 days of paid leave plus major holidays.

* Remote Flexibility: Work from the comfort of your home and gain flexibility with hours once trust is built.



Desired Attributes

* Extremely caring, social people-person who will excel in personal tasks

* High attention to detail and organizational skills

* Very strong written and oral English skills

* Minimum 50 Mbps Internet Speed

* Designated office space in your home
