title: Job Title: Sales and Solutions Specialist – phone sales, online sales, customer service
description:
Sales and Solutions Specialists for Willis Lawn Services



About the Role

Are you a people person who loves solving puzzles? We are looking for a Sales & Solutions Specialist to join our team in 2026. This isn't just about "closing deals"—it’s about listening to our neighbors and providing real solutions that make their lives easier. You will be the first point of contact for our sales leads, ensuring they feel heard and valued from the very first hello!

Our company helps homeowners create beautiful yards by providing effective solutions for lawn and insect problems. While prior knowledge of our specific services isn't required, we are looking for candidates who are eager to learn the details of what we do!



What You’ll Do

- Engage with Leads: This role is primarily phone-based. You will spend your day talking directly to interested leads, acting as the friendly, professional voice of our company.

- Answer In-Depth Questions: Our customers are looking for experts. You will be expected to answer a high volume of questions with patience, clarity, and a "help-first" attitude.

- Precision Quoting: Use modern online mapping and measurement tools to accurately assess customer properties and generate custom quotes.

- Consultative Selling: Guide interested leads through our process and handle the signup for those ready to hire our team.

- Build Trust: Ensure every interaction reinforces our commitment to showing customers that they truly matter to us.



What We’re Looking For

 - Strong English Proficiency: Because you will be the primary point of contact for our sales leads, you must have excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

- Exceptional Communicators: You can turn a phone call into a relationship and explain services clearly.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable using CRM systems to manage your workflow, ready to learn how to measure properties online for quotes.

- Solution-Oriented: You don't just sell; you listen and recommend what is best for the customer’s specific situation.

- Detail-Oriented: Accurate measurements lead to accurate quotes—you take pride in getting the details right.



This job will be a graveyard shift position. We need someone to work 9am to 5:30pm Central Standard Time (CST) Monday through Friday, which is 11pm to 7:30am Philippine Standard Time (PST) Tuesday through Saturday  (10pm to 6:30am PST when the United States is under Daylight Savings time from Sun, Mar 8, 2026 to Sun, Nov 1, 2026). 

**This includes a 30 minute UNPAID lunch break, for a total of 40 hours worked per week. You may also take two PAID 10 minute breaks, during your shift.**



To Apply:

To be considered, please submit your resume with a link to a Loom video at the very top of your message.  In the video, please introduce yourself and explain why you’re a great fit for our team, our mission to provide real solutions for our neighbors, and our commitment to making every customer feel valued!

title: Video Editor (Short-Form Content)
description:
The Video Editor will be responsible for creating engaging short-form video content and storytelling optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, Meta Ads, and YouTube Shorts. This role focuses on transforming raw footage, creator-style content, and educational wellness material into high-performing social media videos that drive engagement, reach, and conversions.



The ideal candidate understands social media storytelling, current platform trends, and how to structure videos that capture attention within the first few seconds. They should be comfortable editing UGC-style content, founder-led educational videos, and paid advertising creatives while maintaining a clean, calming, and authentic wellness brand aesthetic.



This role also requires the ability to identify trending content formats on TikTok and adapt them for brand use, as well as leverage AI tools to improve editing efficiency and content production workflows.



A test project will be required as part of the interview process.





Responsibilities:

• Short-Form Video Editing

   - Edit engaging short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, Meta Ads, and YouTube Shorts

   - Optimize videos with strong hooks in the first 1–3 seconds

   - Create fast-paced, engaging edits without feeling overly edited

   - Use jump cuts, silence removal, and retention techniques

   - Implement mobile-first editing with captions and visual cues

   - Add light motion graphics and visual enhancements

• Viral Content & Trend Awareness

   - Identify and analyze trending content formats on TikTok and other short-form platforms

   - Adapt viral formats to align with brand messaging

   - Propose new content ideas based on emerging trends

   - Understand patterns that drive engagement, shares, and watch time

• UGC & Authentic Content Editing

   - Edit a variety of creator-style and authentic content, including:

   - Smartphone-shot videos

   - Founder / expert talking-head content

   - Customer testimonials

   - Lifestyle and “day in the life” content

   - Creator-style UGC

• Educational Video Storytelling

   - Structure educational wellness videos using formats such as: Hook, Problem, Quick explanation, Solution or tip, Call to action

• Motion Graphics & Text Overlays

   - Create clean captions optimized for mobile viewing

   - Use kinetic text and key tip callouts

   - Add subtle transitions and engagement indicators

   - Design animated subtitles and highlight boxes

• Brand Aesthetic

   - Maintain a consistent wellness brand look, including: Clean and minimal design, Calm and natural pacing, Soft transitions. Consistent visual style across content

• AI & Workflow Optimization

   - Use AI tools to improve content production efficiency, such as: AI caption generation, AI editing tools, AI clip selection, Content repurposing, Automation for social media workflows





Requirements

• Experience: 

   - 2+ years of experience editing short-form social media content

   - Experience editing for DTC wellness, health, beauty, or supplement brands

   - Strong understanding of social media psychology and content virality

   - Experience editing both paid ads and organic content

• Editing Tools

   - Experience with one or more of the following: Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, AI-assisted editing tools

• Ideal Candidate

  We are looking for someone who is: 

   - Highly trend-aware

   - Comfortable working with UGC and imperfect raw footage

   - Creative while able to follow brand guidelines

   - Detail-oriented with strong grammar

   - Able to balance paid ad performance with organic engagement

   - Curious and proactive about new editing tools and AI workflows

   - Able to deliver fast turnaround times





Portfolio Requirements

• Candidates should provide a portfolio that includes:

   - Content for wellness brands (supplements, hormones, gut health, skincare, fitness, etc.)

   - Short-form videos used in social media ads or organic content

   - Examples of UGC-style editing





If you’re interested, please send a copy of your updated resume and portfolio showcasing relevant work (especially paid ads, UGC content, and ecommerce design).

title: Wellness Compliance Officer (with USRN / LVP / LVN Certification)
description:
We are hiring a Wellness Compliance Officer to help us out with Compliance needs:



Responsibilities:



Clinical Oversight & Resident Wellness



- Lead virtual clinical oversight of resident wellness programs across multiple communities.

- Monitor resident health status and wellness trends; provide guidance on individualized care protocols.

- Review and support clinical documentation and ensure compliance with care plans and regulatory requirements.

- Act as a clinical resource for community-based teams, residents’ families, and external partners.



Regulatory Compliance & Quality Assurance



- Ensure all wellness-related policies and practices adhere to federal, state, and Assisted Living regulatory standards, including Title 22 requirements.

- Perform regular compliance audits, identify risks, and coordinate corrective action plans.

- Lead preparation and response activities for surveys and regulatory reviews.

- Stay current on changes to healthcare compliance standards and share updates with internal stakeholders.



Education & Staff Support



- Coach and support community clinical staff on compliance, best practices, documentation standards, and resident care expectations.

- Provide remote education on regulatory topics such as HIPAA, safety protocols, and care management processes.



Communication & Collaboration

- Serve as a liaison between clinical and operational teams to promote consistent care delivery and adherence to policies.

- Communicate effectively with leadership, community teams, residents, families, and external providers regarding clinical trends, compliance issues, and care strategies.

- Contribute to interdisciplinary meetings and care review processes. 



Qualifications:



- Active LVN/LPN or RN License in good standing with a U.S. state (compact licensure preferred).

- Proven experience in senior care management — Assisted Living, Skilled Nursing, Home Health, Hospice, or similar continuum.

- Strong understanding of healthcare regulations and compliance requirements, including state-specific Assisted Living regulations and Title 22.

- Ability to interpret clinical documentation and care plans while ensuring compliance with quality standards.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with ability to collaborate effectively in a remote environment.

- Demonstrated leadership, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills.

- Experience with electronic medical records (EMR/EHR) and data-driven quality improvement.

- Must be amenable to work during Pacific Standard Business hours

title: AI Data Operations Specialist (Technical Research & Data Structuring)
description:
We’re on the lookout for an AI Data Operations Specialist (Technical Research & Data Structuring) to help us collect, structure, and validate mechanical component data for our early-stage AI company. In this role, you’ll work on building an intelligent agent that performs foundational mechanical design work for industrial systems, including data center electrical and cooling infrastructure. Plus, you’ll collaborate with a supportive team while contributing to process improvements in our AI data pipelines.



We’re looking for someone who loves research, thrives in spreadsheets, and enjoys turning messy technical data into clean, structured datasets. You’ll need to be comfortable using AI tools daily, handling large volumes of data, and performing quality checks to ensure accuracy. This role is research-driven, fast-paced, and requires precision—you’ll help power the AI system that’s at the heart of our operations.



Above all, we need someone self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to work independently while collaborating with the team asynchronously. If this sounds like the challenge you’re looking for, we’d love to hear from you!



Responsibilities:

- Research industrial mechanical and electrical components (terminal boxes, lugs, fuses, wires, enclosures, compressors, etc.)

- Locate manufacturer data sheets and technical documentation online

- Extract detailed specifications from PDFs and other technical documents

- Use AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, or other extraction tools) to scrape, structure, and reformat data

- Reformat messy documentation into clean, structured datasets

- Validate AI outputs for correctness and completeness

- Organize all data in Google Sheets and structured catalogs, maintaining consistency in formatting and categorization

- Cross-reference data between sheets and prepare clean datasets for AI training and analysis

- Perform QA checks to ensure accuracy before data enters the AI training pipeline

- Work within a structured team workflow with research assignments

- Participate in cross-team QA reviews

- Communicate clearly and asynchronously with the team

- Contribute ideas for improving processes, speed, and efficiency

- Work in short, rapid cycles (1–2 day turnaround targets per component category)

- Focus on delivering structured, high-quality output efficiently while adapting quickly as priorities evolve



Requirements:

- 5+ years of experience in BPO Customer Support, Operations, or Documentation Management, especially with US-based businesses.

- Experience working at a US-based startup is a major plus!

- Exceptional research skills and ability to find accurate technical information efficiently

- Extremely detail-oriented and comfortable working with technical specs and numbers

- Strong Google Sheets proficiency (formulas, cross-sheet referencing, data organization)

- Comfortable handling large datasets across multiple files

- Regular user of AI tools and curious about improving workflows

- Strong written communication skills

- Self-starter who works independently but collaborates effectively

- Comfortable asking questions and clarifying ambiguity

- Fast learner who can absorb processes quickly

- Comfortable working in a remote, async-first team

- Able to work on a graveyard shift aligned with US business hours

- Must have a stable internet connection and a reliable work-from-home setup



Bonus (Not Required):

- Exposure to mechanical, electrical, or industrial systems

- Experience working with technical documentation or engineering data

- Previous AI training, AI ops, or data structuring experience

- Experience handling structured product catalogs.



Salary and Benefits:

- Base salary: 55k PHP per month.

- Paid Time Off + Paid Holidays.

- 100% WFH.



When applying, send your resume link, explain why you're a good fit. Also copy and paste this Job ID: recVi9bgoKW7Hdwyg into your
 response, along with this message: “I’m excited to be applying to Job ID:recVi9bgoKW7Hdwyg!” This will let us know what job you’re applying for as well as show us that you actually read this entire job description (attention to detail is everything). Thanks and hope to hear from you soon!



Note: 

If you are shortlisted for the next stage of the process, you will receive an
 with the title "Operations Specialist". This is our internal company title for this role. The responsibilities and scope remain aligned with the job description above.

title: Opus Pro Specialist & Video Editor (Short-Form Content Manager)
description:
We are looking for a tech-savvy, detail-oriented Video Editor and Content Manager to take full ownership of our TikTok content workflow. You will be responsible for transforming long-form video content into viral short-form clips using Opus Pro, refining those edits for quality, and managing the scheduling/posting across our accounts.



The ideal candidate is someone who understands the short-form video editing and is comfortable navigating opus pro. (Bonus points if you usually schedule the content you make)



Key Responsibilities

Opus Pro Management: Upload long-form videos to Opus Pro and manage the dashboard.



- Quality Control: Review all AI-generated clips. You won't just "accept" what the AI gives you; you will adjust framing, captions, and timing to ensure every clip is high-quality.

- Video Editing: Perform manual corrections (cutting out dead air, fixing caption errors, or adjusting B-roll) using your preferred software (CapCut, Premiere Pro, etc.).

- Posting & Scheduling: Handle the full scheduling and posting process on our TikTok/Social accounts.

Communication: Keep us updated on progress as we refine this new workflow together.



Required Skills & Qualifications

- English Fluency: Excellent written and verbal English skills are a must.

- Fluid Video Editor: You must be comfortable with video pacing, visual hooks, and making manual edits to AI-generated content.

- Opus Pro Familiarity: Experience with Opus Pro is a huge plus. We can provide training, but you must be tech-savvy and quick to learn.

- Reliability: Since this is a new project, we need someone dependable who can manage their hours effectively

Attention to Detail: To show you read this full post, please put the word "ORANGE" in the subject line of your application.



Working Hours & Duration

- Status: This is a new project. We aren't exactly sure how long it will take each day or how long the project will run, but we are starting with an assumption of 1-4 hours per day.

- Flexibility: As we grow, there may be opportunities for more hours.



How to Apply

To apply, please send a message with the following:



Portfolio: If you have any portfolio proof of your opus experience with please send it. If not a link to short-form videos (TikToks/Reels) you have edited. 

Tool Experience: Your level of familiarity with Opus Pro or other AI video tools.

Rate: Please state your desired hourly rate in USD.



If you have experience with Opus Pro please lead with that, those applications will be heavily prioritized

title: Merchandising Associate
description:
IMPORTANT: We will only process applications of those who will apply through this link





Company and Vision



PlanetArt’s vision is to be the leading seller of personalized and make-on-demand products worldwide. We provide consumers with unmatched tools and content and an unparalleled end-to-end customer experience that result in high-quality, meaningful finished products and memorable celebrations of life events.



The company’s brands include the popular FreePrints and FreePrints Photobooks apps and the industry leading SimplytoImpress card and stationery site, as well as Personal Creations, CafePress and ISeeMe! Visit 
 to learn more about our brands.



We have more than 500 tea
mbers across multiple offices, primarily in Calabasas CA, San Diego CA, Woodridge IL, Minneapolis, MN and Pleasanton, CA. We also have tea
mbers in two company-owned offices in China, as well as in Europe.





Job Overview



PlanetArt is looking for a Merchandising Associate to support the company’s Merchandising department.

The successful candidate will be a detail-oriented professional with a strong understanding of e-commerce best practices, product development, data management + analysis, inventory oversite and website aesthetic + functionality.



At PlanetArt, the Merchandising Associate is responsible for supporting in a wide variety of product research, development and analysis.

This role provides an opportunity to use a combination of analytical and creative skills!

Daily responsibilities include but are not limited to; website and product updates, product research and selection, asset management, cost/pricing requests, creative briefs, inventory checks, data management and communicating with internal and external partners.



This is a remote, work-from-home position.





What You’ll Do

Key Responsibilities



Assortment Planning - Research & Development



Assist with a variety of research and analysis with product and pricing

Conduct competitive analysis as we build product assortments

Conduct competitive analysis for pricing research

Conduct competitive analysis for product research

Research new products & vendors and help build assortments for upcoming launches

Assist with inventory management – Help research inventory status of products featured in upcoming promotions

Sample Management – Manage sample orders



Cost & Pricing Requests

 

Create and manage cost and pricing request using our internal system in collaboration with cross-functional teams

Maintain documentation and version control for product cost and pricing updates

Communicate with cross-functional teams to assist with gathering COGS across product categories

Conduct competitive analysis on product pricing across product categories as we onboard new products

Pricing Updates – Learn our internal tools and assist with updates as needed



Website Support

 

Assist with website and product management: Learn internal tools and help with on-site merchandising updates

Product Copy – Help ensure the correct product attributes are listed in product detail pages

Monitor and analyze the aesthetic and performance of product and category pages, seeking ways to improve the online catalog based on data

Enhance the shopping experience by maintaining site organization through filters, search tags, and keywords.

Maintain site integrity by overseeing product status and updating product and color changes as needed

Perform periodic audits to maintain product accuracy across homepages, landing pages, and product category pages

Learn our internal tools and help with homepage zone, pills and general website updates

Filter updates & research – Learn about filters and how to use filter tagging tool



Marketing Campaigns

 

Assist in selecting merchandise for promotional use in marketing assets, aligning with strategic goals

Collaborate with marketing and creative teams to create visually compelling presentations of products in marketing materials.

Review marketing materials for accuracy, consistency, and visual appeal, providing feedback and recommendations.

Create creative briefs requesting assets based on brand and seasonal needs

Filter updates & research – Learn about filters and how to use filter tagging tool



What You Should Have

Skills, Qualifications, and Requirements:

 

Associate or bachelor's degree in Merchandising, Business, or a related field.

1-3 years of experience in e-commerce, merchandising, buying or a similar role

Strong analytical skills with ability to manage large datasets

Strong understanding of online retail and e-commerce best practices

Strong proficiency with Excel, PLM and ERP systems are a plus!

Experience with Jira and project management systems is a plus!

Experience with Shopify or basic website build is a huge plus!

Experience with Adobe Creative Suite is a plus!

Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Ability to adapt to changing priorities and work in a fast-paced environment





What You Can Expect

Working Conditions:

Position requires long-term and fully remote work scheduled from 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM US Pacific Time

Position requires regular, continuous use of computer.

Position requires regular sitting and standing.

Position requires regular interaction with tea
mbers through the following methods: phone, WebEx, Slack, or
.

Position requires time and screen tracking via Hubstaff

Private, distraction-free environment (if applicable)

title: Senior Video Editor & Creative Partner (E-commerce Skincare Brand)
description:
About Us

We’re a fast-growing skincare e-commerce brand looking for a top-tier video editor who can create scroll-stopping ads that convert. This is NOT a “just follow instructions” role — we want a creative partner who brings ideas, challenges assumptions, and edits with a performance-first mindset.





Your Role

You’ll be responsible for editing and producing high-performing ad creatives for Meta Ads 
/Instagram), with the ability to adapt content for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and other platforms. You’ll work closely with our marketing team, using performance data and creative insights to iterate and improve results.



What You’ll Do

- Edit direct-response style video ads optimized for Meta Ads, with strong hooks, pacing, and clear CTAs.

- Adapt creatives to multiple formats/aspect ratios (1:1, 4:5, 9:16) and platform-specific best practices.

- Work with AI video tools such as Sora 2, Google Veo 3.1 , Higgsfield, Arcads, ElevenLabs — and explore new tools as they emerge for generating hyperrealistic AI UGC Videos and B-Rolls.

Integrate UGC content and skincare product footage into polished, scroll-stopping ads.

- Apply strong sound design, captions, motion graphics, and light color grading to elevate the creative.

- Use ad performance data to refine and optimize future creatives.

- Bring your own creative ideas and strategic input to every project.



What We’re Looking For

- Experience with the latest AI LLM's (mainly Sora 2 and Google Veo 3.1) for generating AI UGCs and B-Rolls

-  Proven experience editing ads for e-commerce/DTC brands (ideally in beauty or skincare)

- Strong portfolio of Meta Ads or direct-response video creatives (must provide links).

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

-  Understanding of performance metrics (CTR, watch time, ROAS) and how to edit for results.

- Skilled in motion graphics, typography, captions, and sound design.

- Experience with UGC integration and creator content is a plus.

- Fluent in English and comfortable collaborating via Slack/Zoom.

- Independent, proactive, and solutions-oriented — someone who feels like a partner, not just an editor.



Bonus Points If You Have

- Experience in scriptwriting or storyboarding ads.

- Familiarity with AI image generation tools (higgsflied, Sora etc.) for asset creation.

- Knowledge of the skincare/beauty space and its consumer psycho



Why Join Us

- Work on a brand with a clear mission and a loyal customer base.

- Opportunity to experiment with creative concepts and have your ideas tested in real campaigns.

- Be part of a data-driven, fast-moving, and creative environment.

- Bonus Payment: We like to reward you for high performing videos that you create with bonus payments

title: AI Video Editor
description:
Are you a fast, detail-oriented video editor who knows how to make AI-generated content look incredibly natural and engaging?



We are looking for a dedicated AI Video Editor to join our team. Your main tool will be HeyGen, and your daily mission will be to produce 16 high-quality, short-form AI avatar videos per day. You won’t just be clicking "generate" .You will be taking the raw AI output and polishing it in your preferred editing software by adding dynamic captions, B-roll, motion graphics, and sound design to make the final product feel human and ready for social media.



What You Will Do (Responsibilities)



High-Volume Production: Generate and edit 16 short-form videos (TikTok, IG Reels, YouTube Shorts) per day using HeyGen AI avatars and our provided scripts.



Refine & Polish: Clean up any AI artifacts, adjust pacing, fix awkward pauses, and ensure lip-syncing and expressions look as natural as possible.



Post-Production Magic: Add engaging captions, relevant B-roll, sound effects, background music, and smooth transitions to maximize viewer retention.



Workflow Management: Maintain a highly organized file system and consistently meet daily delivery deadlines.



Brand Consistency: Ensure all videos strictly align with our brand guidelines, colors, and visual style.



Who You Are (Requirements)



Proven Experience: Strong portfolio showcasing short-form video editing (preferably for TikTok/Reels/Shorts).



Tech Stack: Experience using HeyGen (or similar AI tools like Synthesia) AND proficiency in professional editing software (CapCut PC, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve).



Speed & Efficiency: You have a streamlined workflow that allows you to comfortably handle 10 videos a day without sacrificing quality.



Attention to Detail: You have a sharp eye for catching unnatural AI movements and audio-video syncing issues.



Tech Requirements: A fast, reliable computer and a strong, stable internet connection (minimum 25-50 Mbps) to handle heavy video rendering and uploading.



Language: Excellent written and spoken English.





How to Apply

Attention to detail is critical for this role. To prove you have read this entire job description, please include the word "AVATAR" in the subject line of your application message.



In your application, please include:



Your updated resume.



A link to your portfolio (please specifically point out any short-form content or AI-generated videos you have edited).



A brief, 2-3 sentence explanation of your current editing workflow and how you plan to efficiently tackle 10 HeyGen videos a day.

title: Video Editor - Long Term
description:
Do not apply if you have never edited videos for a faceless YouTube channel.



I’m looking for one dedicated individual video editor for a long-term collaboration on a YouTube channel.



What You’ll Be Editing:

- Videos are 18–24 minutes long

- 2 - 3 videos per week.

- Voice-overs will be provided.

- You will be responsible for sourcing the footage.



Style & Expectations:

- The content is informational and story-driven.

- The most important part of this role is:

- Carefully listening to the voice-over

- Finding appropriate footage

- Placing the right footage at the right 
nts





Important Notes (Please Read Carefully)



- You must be communicative and respond quickly

- You must be fluent in English

- You must be comfortable joining calls when needed

- You must be reliable and straightforward



Availability



- Intended to be a full-time collaboration 

- Long-term mindset is essential



Payment:



Pay: $3 per finished minute

average video length: 20 minutes

Uploads: 2 - 3 videos per week

TOTAL per month: 728$ (depending on how much videos)



If you’re an experienced YouTube editor who values quality, communication, and long-term work, I’d like to hear from you.



To apply, send me past work you have done.

title: tiktok video editor
description:
Part-time Capcut / TikTok Editor with potential for more



Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcut.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:

Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.



Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.











B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.









You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 3-4h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as you are consistent and videos are being completed)

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



$300-$400/month + bonuses for 3-4h a day MAX (this should be about 10-12 videos a day or more a day, takes me about 1 hours to edit 6 talking head videos) and potential full time work in the future with a salary increase.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max)



Below is a Google drive with the original files you will need to re-create with a reference video:



Google drive: 

 





Please complete the following steps:

Broll:

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch together to complete the voiceover

Find the corresponding footage to match what is being said in the voiceover

Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

Message me with a link to the re-created video 



Talking Head and overlays are the same thing basically so just make one video 

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Cut out all dead space between videos

Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

Tip: cut the clip .2-.3 seconds shorter than the end of the word said.

Do not use transitions between clips, static clips only.

Message me a link to re-create video



Overlay

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Cut out all dead space between videos

Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

Tip: cut the clip .2-.3 seconds shorter than the end of the word said.

Using the reference video and context, place overlays in the proper spots

Pay attention to overlay position and length

Make them big enough to see/read, but not so big they dominate the screen

Do not use any transitions, static overlays only

Message me a link to re-create video



Please Respond back to me beginning with the word “purple”

title: Real Estate Underwriter/Sales Analyst
description:
**Work From Anywhere | Join a Fast-Growing Real Estate Investment Firm

We’re looking for a detail-oriented Real Estate Underwriter to support our acquisitions team by evaluating deals, assessing risk, and delivering accurate financial and market analysis.



**About the Role

Position: Real Estate Underwriter

Location: Anywhere – 100% Remote

Work Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM Pacific Time

(Occasional weekend work up to 4 hours)

Work Duration: 40 hours/week



In this role, you’ll focus on underwriting potential acquisitions, analyzing property financials, running comps, and evaluating market conditions to determine deal viability. You will play a key role in helping the team make data-driven investment decisions.



**Key Responsibilities

-Analyze and underwrite residential real estate deals (fix & flip, rental, or other investment strategies)

-Run comparable sales (comps) using MLS, Zillow, Redfin, and other platforms to support valuation

-Evaluate ARV (After Repair Value), rehab costs, and investment returns

-Build and maintain underwriting models and deal analysis spreadsheets

-Review property details, photos, and inspection reports to assess risk and opportunity

-Communicate with agents, contractors, and internal teams to validate assumptions and gather data

-Support acquisitions team with due diligence and deal evaluation

-Present clear, concise investment summaries and recommendations



**Qualifications

-Minimum 1 year of experience in real estate underwriting, acquisitions analysis, or a similar role (REQUIRED)

-Strong understanding of real estate investment concepts 

-Proven experience underwriting deals and running comps accurately

-Ability to assess risk and identify strong vs. weak investment opportunities

-Experience working with real estate agents and gathering market data

-High attention to detail with strong analytical and critical-thinking skills

-Strong written and verbal communication skills

-Proactive, resourceful, and able to work independently with minimal supervision



**Technical Requirements

-Stable, high-speed internet connection

-Reliable laptop or desktop computer and smartphone

-Strong proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets (financial modeling, formulas, pivot tables)

-Experience with real estate tools (MLS, Zillow, Redfin, PropStream, or similar)



**Compensation

-$5-$7/hour (based on experience)

-Bi-weekly Pay



**Benefits Package (Applicable once the employee is regularized after the probationary period)

-10 days of paid time off (PTO)

-Maxicare health insurance coverage

-Sales bonus for every real estate property successfully sold

-SV anniversary gifts

-Birthday gift

-13th Month Pay, with the potential to earn two to three times the standard amount, depending on individual performance and overall company results



---------------------------------------

How to Apply - Please submit:

1. Resume (PDF or Word)

2. Internet speed test screenshot

3. Computer specs

4. Short video (Loom or YouTube) introducing yourself explaining your experience running comps and supporting real estate analysis





Ready to grow with us?

Apply now and join SV Ventures — where data-driven insights power smart decisions.

title: Creative Media Specialist
description:
APPLY HERE OR YOU WILL NOT BE CONTACTED: 







LOOKING TO START ASAP



We're hiring a Creative Media Specialist to produce high-quality images and videos for our agency and our clients. This is NOT a sales role, NOT a strategist role, and NOT a client-facing position.



This role is for someone who can take a brief or reference and turn it into polished, scroll-stopping creative — using both AI tools and hands-on editing skills.



What you'll be doing

Your work will be a mix of AI-generated content and manual editing/production, based on creative briefs and examples we provide.



Main responsibilities include:



Creating high-quality static images and short-form video ads for Meta 
/Instagram)

Using AI image and video generation tools (Midjourney, Runway, Kling, Pika, Leonardo, etc.) to produce professional creative assets



Editing and post-producing video content (cuts, transitions, text overlays, captions, sound design, color grading)

Taking raw footage, stock clips, or AI-generated clips and assembling them into polished final deliverables



Producing UGC-style and direct-response ad creatives for the home remodeling/contractor niche

Iterating quickly on creative variations (new hooks, thumbnails, aspect ratios) for ad testing



Organizing and delivering final assets with correct naming conventions and specs

Following creative SOPs and replicating winning formats across multiple client accounts



You will not be:



Talking to homeowners or clients



Writing ad strategy or media buying



Making creative decisions without direction (unless asked)



Must-haves (read carefully)



Strong portfolio showing image and video work (AI-generated and/or traditionally edited)



Proficiency with video editing software (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or After Effects)



Hands-on experience with at least 2-3 AI creative tools (Midjourney, Runway, Kling, DALL-E, Flux, Leonardo, etc.)



Eye for design, composition, and what looks good in a social media feed



Able to match a reference or style guide and replicate it consistently



Fast turnaround — comfortable producing multiple assets per day



Strong attention to detail on specs, formatting, and file delivery



Reliable, consistent, and organized



Willing to work U.S. business hours



Nice to have (not required)



Experience creating ads specifically for Meta 
/Instagram)



Familiarity with direct-response or performance marketing creative



Motion graphics or animation skills



ClickUp experience



Prior agency experience or experience producing creative at volume

title: Experienced Medical Coder/Biller
description:
Overview:

Please note this is job where you will have your camera on the entire shift where you would interface with internal teammates and at times, patients. This is not a job that can be done with another job. If you are looking for an easy, data entry job, this is not the right fit for you as this is not a "cruising" job. This is a job that will help you learn and grow for those looking to further advance themselves as a biller for a long term career that will eventually become a lucrative and rewarding one. If you are interested in investing your career as a professional biller, please send a message with your resume, intro video, and phone interview availability. When sending a message expressing your interest, please add to the subject line at the end, what is your favorite hobby that you enjoy during your free time.

We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Medical Coder/Biller/Account Administrator to join our team. While prior billing is not a requirement, we will prioritize and prefer candidates who have had prior medical billing experience. Pay rate will also be reflective of this. 



In this role, you will be responsible for managing client accounts, ensuring accurate record-keeping of billing claims, and serving as the primary point of contact for patients with billing and account questions/concerns. Compensation is DOE or raises will be given according to how quickly one learns and starts contributing to the role with autonomy. 



Responsibilities:



Manage and maintain patient accounts, including billing, collections, and payment posting

Prepare and submit insurance claims accurately and on time.

Monitor accounts receivable and follow up on unpaid claims or balances.

Communicate with patients regarding billing inquiries, payment plans, and insurance coverage. Educate them on how insurance billing works and resolve all accounting issues.

Maintain accurate and confidential patient financial records in compliance with HIPAA.

Collaborate with front office staff, providers, and insurance companies to resolve account or billing issues.

Generate reports related to billing and collections as needed.

Collaborate with internal teams to ensure patients' accounts are in good standing, follow up for payment as necessary.



Requirements:



Experience in account management or administrative support roles not necessary, willing to train the right candidate if there is eagerness to learn.

Proven strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word) & Google Sheets, Gmail

Ability to work independently as well as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.

Attention to detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality work.

Job Type: Full-time

title: Video Editor IAfi for Ad Creatives — Full-Time ($$$)
description:
Who are we?

We run multiple e-commerce brands in the French market. 

We're a small, family-run team that works with trust, 

good energy, and high standards. We're growing fast 

and we need someone to grow with us — long term.



Why this role?

We need a full-time creative who can produce high-performing 

ad content every single day. Not someone who executes 

instructions blindly — someone who thinks, learns fast, 

and takes ownership of their work.



What you'll create:

- Meta & Snapchat Ads: short-form videos from 15 sec to 1 min

- TikTok organic: hook-first videos, trends, educational content

- Static creatives: product visuals, ad images for Meta feed

- AI-generated content: Sora, Veo, Kling, Midjourney, 

  Higgsfield or similar

- Volume: ~30 creatives per week

- All content is in French



Hard skills required:

- 2+ years creating content for paid social (Meta/Snapchat) 

  and organic (TikTok)

- Strong portfolio showing video AND static creatives

- Hands-on experience with AI tools (Sora, Veo, Kling, 

  Midjourney) — not just basic usage

- CapCut, Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve

- Canva, Photoshop or Figma for statics



What we value as much as skills:

- Motivation and genuine interest in e-commerce & content

- Fast learner — you figure things out without being told twice

- Curious — you watch what's working on Meta and TikTok 

  and you bring ideas

- Autonomous — you don't wait to be micromanaged

- Fast executor — you deliver on time, every time

- Punctual and reliable — fixed schedule, no exceptions



Work schedule:

Monday to Saturday

Fixed hours to be defined together based on your availability



What we offer:

- Long-term position — we don't hire for one project

- Salary that grows quickly based on your commitment

- Performance bonuses based on your creatives' results

- Profit-sharing bonuses as the brands grow

- Growth opportunities: more responsibility, team leadership



How to apply — incomplete = ignored:

1. Portfolio: Meta ads, TikTok videos, static creatives 

   and AI-generated content

2. In one sentence: what makes the first 2 seconds 

   of a Meta ad work?

3. Your main editing software

4. Which AI tools do you use and for what?

5. Why you and not someone else?

6. Are you available Monday to Saturday on a fixed schedule?

title: Meeting Setter/Cold Caller
description:
Job Title: Appointment Setter / Cold Caller (Website Services)



Compensation: Base + Commission (performance-based)



$2.50 USD - 3.50 USD (hourly) 



About Us:

We are a growing marketing agency focused on building high-converting websites that help businesses outperform competitors and convert more customers.



Role Overview:

We’re looking for a confident and driven Appointment Setter / Cold Caller to reach out to potential clients, spark interest, and book qualified calls. You will be the first point of contact, so strong communication skills and professionalism are essential.



Responsibilities:



Make outbound cold calls to businesses

Introduce and position our website services

Identify client needs and qualify leads

Book appointments for the sales team

Track activity and update CRM systems



Requirements:



Experience in customer service, sales, or cold calling

Strong spoken English (clear, confident, professional)

Comfortable speaking with business owners and decision-makers

Tech-savvy (CRM tools, dialers, spreadsheets, etc.)

Reliable internet and a quiet work environment

Self-motivated and results-driven



Bonus (Not Required):



Experience selling marketing or website services

Familiarity with lead generation tools



What We Offer:



Flexible remote work

High commission potential

Opportunity to grow into a closing/sales role

Fast-paced, growth-focused environment



How to Apply:

Please submit the following:



Short Introduction

Tell us who you are, your experience with sales/cold calling, and why you’d be a good fit.

Voice Recording (Required)



Record yourself saying the following script clearly and confidently:



“Hi, I’m [Your Name] calling from Fortune Design. We noticed you haven’t updated your website in a few years, just wanted to ask, is there any reason for that?”



(We are looking for tone, confidence, and clarity, not perfection.)

title: Real Estate CRM Manager
description:
Real Estate CRM Virtual Assistant



We are currently expanding support for a growing real estate business and are seeking a reliable Virtual Assistant to assist with CRM management, client follow up, and lead engagement. This role is ideal for someone who is organized, proactive with communication, and comfortable speaking with people over phone,
, and text.



You will be responsible for helping maintain consistent communication with new, old, and stale leads by re engaging them and assisting in keeping client conversations organized within the CRM. This role also includes additional real estate related administrative tasks as needed.



Responsibilities:



Manage CRM follow ups with new, old, and inactive leads

Make outbound calls to reengage potential clients

Send
s and text messages to maintain communication with leads and clients

Assist with keeping conversations organized and updated in the CRM

Help track client responses and follow up timelines

Support with additional real estate related administrative tasks when needed



Qualifications:



Experience working with a CRM system preferred

Comfortable making phone calls and communicating professionally in English

Strong organization and follow up skills

Reliable internet connection and work environment

Previous experience working as a virtual assistant or in customer support is a plus



Compensation and Structure:



Weekly or monthly payments via Wise or another mutually agreed payment method

Long term and stable position

Opportunity for growth as the business expands

Bonuses available for strong performance and reliability



How to Apply:



Please send the following:



1 Your resume or CV

2 A short introduction about yourself and why you believe you are a good fit for this role

3 A screenshot of your internet speed test

4 An example of a simple Excel or Google Sheets project you have created



Important Application Test:



When applying, include the number 51 at the end of your name in the subject line.



Example

Real Estate CRM VA John Smith 51



Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered. This helps ensure the full job description has been read.

title: Real Estate Bookkeeper - QuickBooks - Fix Flip and Rental Properties
description:
Job Title: Real Estate Bookkeeper – QuickBooks Online Setup & Ongoing Bookkeeping



About the Role

New Jersey-based real estate investor seeking an experienced real estate bookkeeper to set up and manage QuickBooks Online for our portfolio of fix-and-flip and rental properties across multiple LLCs.



Priority Project

Set up QuickBooks Online from scratch across multiple LLCs, each owning multiple properties — some fix-and-flip, some rental. This includes building out the chart of accounts, class tracking by property, and establishing clean workflows for ongoing bookkeeping.



Requirements

title: Real Estate Media Virtual Assistant
description:
Are you someone who thrives in a dynamic environment and enjoys taking on a variety of tasks throughout the day? Do you have a passion for organization and helping businesses run smoothly? If so, we'd love to have you join our team!



About Us:

We are ZABE Media, a growing real estate photography business that prides itself on delivering high-quality visuals to our clients. We believe in working hard, having fun, and supporting each other along the way!

We're looking for a Virtual Assistant who shares our values and is eager to help us streamline our operations.



What You'll Be Doing:

- Quality Control & Photo Delivery: Review edited photos each morning in Lightroom when they return from our editors. Check for straight lines, proper brightness, and overall consistency before delivering them to clients. You will be the final set of eyes before galleries are sent out!

- Retouch Requests: Manage photo revision requests by communicating clearly with editors, tracking updates, and ensuring clients receive changes promptly.

- Client Acquisition: Use our Instagram outreach system to send outbound messages daily, track conversations, and follow up with potential new clients.

- Customer Success: Maintain strong relationships with our current clients by responding to messages professionally, following up after shoots, and keeping them informed about updates and new services from ZABE Media.



What We're Looking For:

- Willingness to Work in Central Time (8am – 12pm CT): Since most of our clients are based in this time zone, we need someone available and responsive during these hours.

- Strong Written English: Clear, professional communication is important since you will be interacting with clients directly.

- Attention to Detail: Quality matters to us. We need someone who takes pride in catching small mistakes before clients see them.

- Reliability & Organization: You should be dependable, able to manage multiple tasks, and comfortable following systems.

- Positive Attitude: We value a friendly, respectful, and team-oriented environment.

- Flexibility & Adaptability: We are growing quickly, so being open to learning and adjusting as we improve our systems is important.



Why You'll Love Working with Us:

Supportive Team: You’ll be working with just two owners, and we will be here every step of the way to answer any questions you may have.

Clear Systems & Expectations: We value structure and consistency, so you’ll always know what success looks like.

Room to Grow: As our business expands, there will be opportunities for a higher workload and more hours. 

If you are interested: 



Apply on onlinejobs platform and
 your resume, a screenshot of an internet speed test, and a video introducing yourself highlighting 3-5 points on why you’re a good fit to 
 and we will reach out with next steps!

title: Legal Assistant/Paralegal
description:
Position Overview



Are you a perfectionist who thrives on organization, precision, and proactive problem-solving? We are seeking a highly motivated, meticulous, and resourceful legal assistant/paralegal to join our fast-paced US based legal team. In this pivotal role, you will be the backbone of our casework—supporting attorneys, managing complex matters, and ensuring outstanding accuracy and operational excellence for every client. If you take pride in flawless execution, anticipate needs before they arise, and are committed to continuous improvement, we want to hear from you.







Key Responsibilities



Hours & Accountability

Consistently achieve or surpass the firm’s case requirements by maintaining sharp focus, discipline, and time management.



Meticulously track and document activities for client matters in legal software for assigned client matters.



Case Management Leadership

Oversee and drive the progression of cases through established processes, ensuring all steps and timelines are executed with precision.



Hold the team to the highest standards for timely and accurate case movement, promptly flagging and escalating any delays for swift resolution.



Legal Research and Drafting Excellence

Conduct thorough, high-level legal research and distill complex information into clear, concise memos, zoning applications, Power Point presentation and correspondence, with minimal oversight.



Deliver documents virtually free of revisions, typos, or errors, setting a high bar for accuracy and clarity.



Operational Support & Process Improvement

Model the firm’s core values by responding to clients and tea
mbers within 24 hours, proactively advancing cases, and sharing knowledge to elevate collective performance.



Champion operational excellence: rigorously follow established processes, leverage AI tools, and proactively recommend workflow and system improvements.



Nurture a community of professionalism and connection by treating every client, colleague, and partner with warmth and respect.



Speak up confidently and constructively when you see opportunities for improvement, demonstrating leadership and unwavering commitment to excellence.







Qualifications



Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in Law, Paralegal Studies, Political Science or a related field strongly preferred.

Proven experience as a paralegal or legal assistant in a US based law firm, with a demonstrated track record of accuracy and high performance.

Exceptional organizational, communication, and analytical abilities, with an eye for detail that sets you apart.

Advanced proficiency with legal research tools and technology, including AI-powered platforms.

Ability to excel independently and collaboratively in a demanding, fast-paced environment.





Core Values



Bias for Action: You don’t wait—you initiate, anticipate, and deliver.

Learning and Curiosity: You are always seeking to improve, learn, and ask the next question.

Operational Excellence: You set and maintain the highest standards in every task.

Community and Connection: You build trust and foster positive relationships at every level.

Familiar with scheduling tools

Experience managing social accounts for a brand, business, or client - not just personal accounts

Organized, proactive, and can work independently without constant check-ins

Comfortable working with a US-based team across time zones





Nice to Have



Experience with event, nightlife, or entertainment brands

Basic graphic design or video editing skills (Canva, CapCut, etc.)

Experience with Meta ads or paid social





Details



Fully remote

Part-time to start, with a path to full-time



How to Apply

Send your resume/portfolio and links to social media accounts you've managed - whether it's a brand page, a client account, or your own if it's strong. We want to see your work, your aesthetic, and how you think about content.

title: Direct phone marketer This role is for high-level communicators only
description:
Fluent in English with exceptional verbal clarity

Highly organized and disciplined

 A confident, persuasive communicator who can command attention

 Skilled at building trust quickly with physicians



If you know how to open doors with doctors, build relationships fast, and drive real conversions, this is your lane.



We’re looking for top-tier marketing agents who can:

 Connect directly with physicians and clinic decision-makers

 Present a compelling opportunity in QME (Qualified Medical Evaluations)

 Bring doctors into a growing, revenue-driven medical network



This is not passive marketing, this is direct response, relationship-driven outreach.



What you’ll be doing:

• Calling on clinics and medical offices

• Leading structured, high-impact conversations with physicians

• Positioning Prime Medical Evaluators with clarity and authority

• Guiding doctors to join our group or begin the QME pathway



 Performance tracking is mandatory — all outreach, conversions, and activity metrics are measured. Accountability and results are non-negotiable.



 High earning potential for true closers who execute.



If you’re confident on the phone, understand physician psychology, and can move conversations to action, we want to hear from you
